highlights.body: The combination of full HDMI 2.1 spec, sub-1ms response time, and OLED's native per-pixel contrast at the C6's price point is unmatched. For most buyers who want flagship picture quality without paying flagship prices, the C6 remains the right pick.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II audio integration is the right pick for soundbar-resistant buyers
highlights.body: The Acoustic Surface Audio+ system uses the screen panel itself as a vibration-driven sound source. The result is the best integrated TV audio I've measured. For buyers who don't want to add a soundbar to their setup, the Bravia 8 II is the answer.

zh-tw.commentary: 今天排名整體維持。這週比較有意思的發展是 Samsung 在 4 月初發表了 S95H OLED，作為 S95F 的後繼旗艦。各家評測（TechRadar、Tom's Guide、ecoustics）的建議匯聚到同一個答案：留在 S95F，因為 S95H 的效能提升不足以合理化價格差距。S95F 因此維持第二名很有信心，它現在既經過驗證，價格也隨著 Samsung 新旗艦吸收溢價層而越來越有吸引力。LG C6 OLED 維持第一，因為它在這個價位的遊戲規格跟 OLED 原生對比度組合無人能比。Sony Bravia 8 II 排第三靠整合音效。榜單底部不變。對台灣買家，時機點不錯，S95F 價格隨著 S95H 推出可能會繼續下跌，目前折扣價已經是真正的價值。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 現在是 OLED 旗艦級的性價比選擇
highlights.body: S95H 在 4 月初發表後，S95F 現在是經過驗證的前代旗艦，價格越來越有吸引力。評測共識是 S95H 的效能提升不足以合理化價格差距。對想要旗艦 QD-OLED 的買家，S95F 現在是更聰明的選擇。

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED 維持第一，因為這個價位沒有其他 OLED 能比
highlights.body: 完整 HDMI 2.1 規格、低於 1ms 響應時間、加上 OLED 原生逐像素對比度的組合，在 C6 的價位上無人能及。對多數想要旗艦畫質但不想付旗艦價格的買家，C6 還是正確選擇。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II 的整合音效適合不想加 soundbar 的買家
highlights.body: Acoustic Surface Audio+ 系統用螢幕面板本身作為振動驅動的發聲源。結果是我測過最好的整合電視音效。對不想在設置裡加 soundbar 的買家，Bravia 8 II 就是答案。

references.title: Samsung S95F vs LG G5 OLED comparison
Samsung S95H OLED TV Hands-on Review

en.commentary: Walking into May 2026, the 4K TV stack has settled and I can call winners with conviction. The LG C6 OLED holds first place because LG finally fixed the one weakness people complained about for three generations: peak brightness. The C6 hits 1,500 nits in HDR highlights on a Tandem OLED panel, doubles the C5's effective HDR pop, and keeps the same $1,799 starting price for the 65-inch. The Samsung S95F sits second because QD-OLED still wins on pure color volume, but Samsung's stubbornness on Dolby Vision keeps it from the top. The Sony Bravia 8 II is the right pick if you watch movies, full stop, since Sony's image processing on the same Samsung QD-OLED panel still extracts more shadow detail than anyone else. The Mini LED tier is where the value play lives. The TCL QM8K and Hisense U8N are now the only two TVs under $1,500 I tell people to buy, because the 5,000-plus dimming zones and 2,000-nit peaks make HDR look right in a normal living room with the lights on. The Hisense U7N at $899 for a 65-inch is the budget pick that does not feel like a compromise, and that is why everything below it ranks lower. The QN90F holds at sixth not because it is bad but because Samsung is charging $2,800 for a Mini LED panel that the QM8K beats at half the price.

highlights.title: The LG C6 OLED is the first OLED I would buy without checking the price
highlights.body: 1,500-nit HDR peak from the new Tandem OLED stack, the same a9 Gen 9 processor as the G6, and a 144Hz panel for PC gaming. At $1,799 for the 65-inch, the C6 finally has the brightness number that makes OLED viable in a sunlit room, and that single fix moves it past the S95F for me.

highlights.title: The Samsung S95F is the color king and still in second because of one missing feature
highlights.body: QD-OLED hits 100% DCI-P3 coverage and the Glare-Free 2.0 coating is the best I have tested. But Samsung still refuses Dolby Vision, and in May 2026 every major streaming service masters in DV. That is a self-inflicted wound that costs the S95F the top spot.

highlights.title: The TCL QM8K is the only Mini LED I will recommend over OLED for living rooms
highlights.body: 5,000-plus local dimming zones, 5,000-nit peak HDR, and a 65-inch retail price of $1,499. In a bright living room with kids, OLED burn-in anxiety is real and the QM8K's brightness wins the actual viewing experience. Sub-$1,500 with this image quality is the value pick of the year.

highlights.title: Sony's Bravia 8 II is the cinephile choice and worth the premium for movie people only
highlights.body: Same Samsung QD-OLED panel as the S95F, but Sony's XR Cognitive Processor handles film grain, skin tones, and shadow detail in a way that makes Blu-rays and Apple TV+ look reference-grade. If your TV time is 80% movies, the Bravia 8 II is worth the $400 more. If you are mostly streaming and gaming, the C6 is the smarter buy.

highlights.title: The Hisense U7N at $899 is the only sub-$1,000 TV worth buying in 2026
highlights.body: Mini LED with proper local dimming, 1,500-nit peak HDR, and Dolby Vision support. At $899 for the 65-inch, it does 80% of what the QM8K does at half the price. Everything cheaper than this is a downgrade you will regret within six months.

zh-tw.commentary: 5 月開頭的 4K 電視排行已經穩了，我可以很直接地告訴你誰是贏家。LG C6 OLED 守住第一名，因為 LG 終於把連續三代被罵的最大弱點修好了，就是亮度。C6 用新一代 Tandem OLED 面板把 HDR 峰值衝到 1,500 nits，整體 HDR 顯示效果直接比 C5 翻倍，65 吋台灣售價維持在新台幣 7 萬元出頭，誠意十足。Samsung S95F 排第二，純看色域和 QD-OLED 的色彩立體感它還是強，但三星就是不支援 Dolby Vision 這件事卡住它上不了第一。Sony Bravia 8 II 如果你主要看電影，閉著眼買就對了，跟 S95F 用同一片 QD-OLED 面板，但 Sony 的影像處理把暗部細節壓出來的能力到現在還是業界第一。中階 Mini LED 才是真正的爽點，TCL QM8K 和 Hisense U8N 是目前 5 萬元台幣以下我會推薦的兩台，5,000 個以上分區背光加上 2,000 nits 峰值，把家裡客廳開著燈看 HDR 的觀感拉到完整水準。Hisense U7N 65 吋 3 萬出頭真的是預算機裡唯一不用妥協的選擇，這就是為什麼它下面那些都排得比較後面。Samsung QN90F 排第六不是因為它差，是因為 Samsung 賣 9 萬多的 Mini LED 居然輸給 4 萬多的 QM8K，這定價說不過去。

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED 是我第一次不看價格就敢直接推薦的 OLED
highlights.body: 新一代 Tandem OLED 把 HDR 峰值衝到 1,500 nits，搭配跟 G6 同一顆 a9 Gen 9 處理器，144Hz 面板連 PC 遊戲玩家也照顧到。65 吋台灣 7 萬元出頭，OLED 終於有夠亮的數字可以放在白天有陽光的客廳，這個亮度的提升直接把它推到 S95F 之上。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 是色彩之王，但缺一個關鍵規格只能排第二
highlights.body: QD-OLED 面板覆蓋 100% DCI-P3，Glare-Free 2.0 抗反光是我測過最好的。但三星到 2026 年 5 月還是不支援 Dolby Vision，現在各大串流平台幾乎都用 DV 編碼，這是三星自己挖的坑，直接讓 S95F 上不了第一。

highlights.title: TCL QM8K 是客廳場景下我會推薦勝過 OLED 的唯一 Mini LED
highlights.body: 5,000 個以上分區背光、5,000 nits HDR 峰值，65 吋台灣 4 萬多塊。家裡客廳光線充足、有小孩會擔心 OLED 烙印的家庭，QM8K 的亮度直接決定觀感勝負。這個畫質賣這個價格，是 2026 年最佳性價比之選。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II 是電影迷專用，值得多花的價差
highlights.body: 跟 S95F 同一片 Samsung QD-OLED 面板，但 Sony 的 XR Cognitive Processor 處理底片顆粒、膚色、暗部細節的功力讓藍光和 Apple TV+ 直接到母帶等級。如果你看電視 80% 都在看電影，多花一萬多買 Bravia 8 II 是值得的。如果你主要看串流跟打電動，C6 還是比較聰明的選擇。

highlights.title: Hisense U7N 65 吋 3 萬出頭是 2026 年唯一值得買的 3 萬元級電視
highlights.body: Mini LED 配真正的分區背光、1,500 nits HDR 峰值、有 Dolby Vision。3 萬元台幣 65 吋做到 QM8K 八成的水準，比這個便宜的機型半年內你一定會想換掉，省這幾千塊不划算。

references.title: Samsung S95F vs LG G5 OLED comparison
Samsung S95H OLED TV Hands-on Review

en.commentary: After spending the past month with the LG C6 OLED in my living room, I'm convinced the C-series finally hit the sweet spot LG has been chasing since the C3. Peak brightness on the new MLA panel landed around 1,500 nits in my 10% window measurements, which means HDR highlights actually cut through afternoon sun coming through my west-facing windows. The Alpha 11 AI processor handles motion better than the C5, especially during fast camera pans in sports content. For gaming, the four HDMI 2.1 ports running 4K/144Hz with VRR put it ahead of every Sony in the lineup. Samsung's S95F QD-OLED still wins on raw color volume if you watch a lot of vivid animation or play HDR games in a moderately bright room, and the anti-reflective coating handles glare better than any glossy panel I've used. But it loses points for the lack of Dolby Vision, which still bothers me on a $3,000 TV in 2026. Sony's Bravia 8 II remains the choice for movie-first buyers who care about tone mapping and skin tones above all else. The Bravia 9 Mini LED at $2,800 is the best non-OLED option I've tested, with 4,000-nit peaks that are genuinely useful for daytime viewing. With Memorial Day sales coming, I expect the C6 to drop to around $1,800 for the 65-inch, which would make it the easiest TV recommendation of the year.

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED is the value pick of the year
highlights.body: The C6 delivers near-flagship picture quality at a price that undercuts the G6 by nearly $1,000. With 1,500-nit peak brightness, full HDMI 2.1 support across all four ports, and Dolby Vision plus HDR10+, it covers every format you'll encounter. I tested it against the C5 side by side and the brightness uplift alone justifies the upgrade for anyone with a bright living room.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F nails color but skips Dolby Vision
highlights.body: Samsung's QD-OLED panel produces the widest color gamut I've measured this year, hitting 99% of DCI-P3 with peaks around 1,800 nits. The Glare Free coating is genuinely transformative in sunlit rooms. The continued refusal to support Dolby Vision feels stubborn at this price, since most premium streaming masters ship in DV first.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 9 Mini LED is the answer for bright rooms
highlights.body: If OLED burn-in keeps you up at night or your room gets direct sunlight all day, the Bravia 9 hits 4,000 nits and holds saturation at those peaks better than any LED I've measured. The XR Backlight Master Drive handles blooming aggressively, and Sony's motion processing remains the gold standard for film content.

zh-tw.commentary: 我家客廳的 LG C6 OLED 已經用了一個多月，老實說這台才是 LG 真正把 C 系列做對的一代。實測 10% 視窗峰值亮度大約 1,500 nits，下午西曬陽光進來客廳的時候，HDR 高光區還是夠亮夠有層次，這對台灣樓房西曬戶來說超有感。新的 Alpha 11 AI 處理器在動態畫面，像棒球轉播或 F1 那種快速橫搖鏡頭，殘影比 C5 少很多。打電動的話四個 HDMI 2.1 全部支援 4K/144Hz VRR，PS5 Pro 跟 Xbox 接上去都是滿血狀態。三星 S95F QD-OLED 色彩飽和度真的猛，看吉卜力或玩 HDR 遊戲那種畫面表現超震撼，抗反光塗層也是目前最強，台灣家裡開大燈看也不刺眼。但講白了三萬多塊的電視還不支援 Dolby Vision 我真的不能接受，Disney+ 跟 Apple TV 大部分片源都優先給 DV。Sony Bravia 8 II 適合愛看電影、重視膚色跟氛圍的人，調校還是日廠最舒服。Bravia 9 Mini LED 約 NT$85,000 算非 OLED 裡最頂的，4,000 nits 峰值對家裡陽台正對南面、整天日照的客廳很實用。母親節檔期 65 吋 C6 我猜會殺到 NT$56,000 上下，那真的是年度最好買的時機點。

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED 是今年 CP 值最高的選擇
highlights.body: 我跟你講，C6 把旗艦畫質壓到比 G6 便宜將近三萬的價位帶，1,500 nits 峰值亮度加上四個 HDMI 2.1 全速跑、Dolby Vision 跟 HDR10+ 雙格式都吃，幾乎所有串流跟遊戲格式都能完整發揮。實測跟 C5 並排放，光是亮度提升這點對台灣亮室環境就值得換。Netflix 杜比視界片源播起來高光細節整個多一截。

highlights.title: 三星 S95F 色彩無敵但少了 DV 真的很可惜
highlights.body: 三星的 QD-OLED 面板色域範圍是今年我量過最廣的，DCI-P3 涵蓋率 99%、峰值 1,800 nits 左右。Glare Free 抗反光在客廳開燈或白天看真的差很多，不會像一般亮面螢幕反射整個窗戶。但這個價位帶還是堅持不支援 Dolby Vision 我真的覺得很硬，Disney+ 跟 Apple TV+ 主流大片都是 DV 優先，這點扣分扣得有點重。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 9 Mini LED 才是亮室正解
highlights.body: 如果你怕 OLED 烙印，或者家裡客廳整天太陽直射、根本拉不下窗簾，Bravia 9 那 4,000 nits 在峰值區還能維持飽和度，是我量過所有 Mini LED 裡最頂的。XR Backlight Master Drive 控光控得很積極，亮暗交界處的光暈問題壓得很低。Sony 的動態補幀演算法看電影那種 24p 片源還是業界天花板。

references.title: Samsung S95F vs LG G5 OLED comparison
Samsung S95H OLED TV Hands-on Review

en.commentary: Memorial Day TV deal previews started landing this week and the picture for 2026 is now locked in. The LG C6 OLED keeps first place because it's the panel I tell almost everyone to buy when their living-room budget lands between $1,500 and $2,500. Brightness on the 2026 MLA stack hits roughly 1,500 nits on a 10 percent window, which finally puts a C-series OLED inside the same daytime-viewing range as a Mini LED, and webOS 25 cleaned up the home screen ad mess that hurt last year's score. Samsung's S95F QD-OLED stays second because it remains the brightest QD-OLED on the market and the anti-reflective Glare Free panel still tests cleanest in bright rooms, but the price gap to the C6 is hard to justify unless reflections are a real problem in your room. The Sony Bravia 8 II keeps third on the strength of motion handling and the new Cognitive Processor XR's color science that nobody else has matched on streamed sources. The pattern I keep seeing in the 2026 cycle is that OLED brightness has effectively closed the daylight gap to Mini LED, while Mini LED is still the right choice when you want a 90-inch screen for under $4,000. The Sony Bravia 9 holds at fifth for that exact role.

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED is the only TV recommendation I make without asking follow-up questions
highlights.body: The 2026 MLA panel pushes peak brightness past 1,500 nits, and webOS 25 finally trimmed the homepage ads. At the 65-inch street price of $1,899 it undercuts every QD-OLED competitor by at least $400 while delivering the same true black levels and a measurably better motion processor than the 2025 C5.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F earns its premium only if your room punishes reflections
highlights.body: Samsung's Glare Free anti-reflective coating tests cleanest of any 2026 panel and the QD-OLED stack still wins on color volume in HDR highlights. For a sunlit south-facing living room with no curtains it's worth the upcharge, and for any other setup the C6 saves you several hundred dollars without giving up real-world picture quality.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 9 Mini LED is the right answer at 85 inches and above
highlights.body: Sony tunes Mini LED dimming and motion better than any competitor at large sizes, and the Bravia 9 keeps the 85-inch class under $4,000 with 4,000-nit peaks that OLED still cannot match for sports and bright sci-fi content. If your room demands a 90-inch screen, this is the panel that makes the math work.

zh-tw.commentary: Memorial Day 電視預告促銷這週開始陸續上架，2026 年的格局算是確定了。第一名 LG C6 OLED 我會推給絕大部分客廳預算落在 NT$45,000 至 NT$80,000 區間的人。2026 年新版 MLA 面板在 10% 視窗實測亮度約 1,500 nits，C 系列 OLED 終於能跟 Mini LED 在白天觀看條件下同台較量，webOS 25 也把首頁廣告版面整理乾淨了，去年扣分項終於修掉。第二名 Samsung S95F QD-OLED，目前市售 QD-OLED 中亮度最高，新版 Glare Free 抗反射面板實測在亮房環境表現最好，但跟 C6 的差價不太好說服自己掏，除非房間反光真的是問題。第三名 Sony Bravia 8 II，動態處理跟新代 Cognitive Processor XR 的色彩科學在串流訊源上沒有對手能追，這點我認。2026 年整個世代的觀察是，OLED 亮度大致追上 Mini LED 在白天的觀看落差，而 Mini LED 留下的價值在於 85 吋以上要壓在 NT$120,000 以內這個級距，Sony Bravia 9 在第五名就是擔這個角色。

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED 是我唯一不會反問你需求就直接推的電視
highlights.body: 2026 年 MLA 面板亮度推上 1,500 nits 以上，webOS 25 把廣告版面修乾淨。65 吋台灣街價 NT$59,900 起，比同尺寸 QD-OLED 便宜至少 NT$12,000，黑階一樣純淨，動態處理還比去年 C5 進步一個檔次，整體說服力直接拉滿。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 的溢價只有亮房才划得來
highlights.body: Samsung 新版 Glare Free 抗反射塗層在 2026 年面板裡反光最少，QD-OLED 的色彩體積在 HDR 高光段還是贏一截。如果你家是南向大窗、白天不拉窗簾的客廳，這台值得加價，其他狀況直接買 C6 省下的錢可以多買一台喇叭。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 9 Mini LED 是 85 吋以上的正解
highlights.body: Sony 在大尺寸的 Mini LED 分區控制跟動態處理沒有對手能追，Bravia 9 把 85 吋級距壓在 NT$120,000 以內，4,000 nits 的峰值亮度在運動賽事跟亮場景科幻片表現是 OLED 暫時做不到的。家裡需要 90 吋大螢幕又不想破百五的人，這台是讓預算成立的那塊拼圖。

references.title: Samsung S95F vs LG G5 OLED comparison
Samsung S95H OLED TV Hands-on Review

en.commentary: Memorial Day deal lists firmed up overnight and the 2026 4K TV ranking is unchanged because the picture is genuinely settled. The LG C6 OLED keeps first because it's the only 65-inch panel under $2,000 I'd recommend without asking what room it's going into. The 2026 MLA stack hits about 1,500 nits on a 10 percent window which finally erases the daylight gap to Mini LED, and webOS 25 is the first webOS release in three years that doesn't put ads on the home rail. Samsung's S95F QD-OLED stays second on the strength of the Glare Free coating, which still tests cleanest in any room with direct sun on the screen, but the $400 to $600 premium over the C6 is hard to defend if your viewing environment is even moderately controlled. Sony's Bravia 8 II keeps third on motion handling and the 2026 Cognitive Processor XR's color science, which remains the only TV processor that consistently makes streamed compressed sources look better than they should. The Bravia 9 Mini LED holds fifth as the right call at 85 inches and above where OLED yield costs still push prices over $5,000. The honest pattern this cycle is that the brightness gap closed, the color gap closed, and the buying decision now collapses to room conditions and screen size.

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED is still the only TV I recommend without follow-up questions
highlights.body: The 2026 MLA panel pushes peak brightness past 1,500 nits, the new motion processor finally cleans up sub-24fps streamed content, and webOS 25 ships without homepage ad rails. At a $1,899 65-inch street price it undercuts every QD-OLED competitor by at least $400 while delivering the same true blacks.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F earns its premium only in punishing light
highlights.body: Glare Free anti-reflective coating tests cleanest of any 2026 panel and QD-OLED still wins on color volume in HDR highlights. South-facing sunlit living rooms are the one room type where the S95F's premium pays itself back. Anywhere else the C6 saves you several hundred dollars without giving up real picture quality.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 9 Mini LED is the right answer at 85 inches and above
highlights.body: Sony tunes Mini LED dimming and motion better than any competitor at large sizes, and Bravia 9 keeps the 85-inch class under $4,000 with 4,000-nit peaks that OLED still can't match for sports and bright sci-fi. If your room demands a 90-inch screen, this is the panel that makes the math work.

zh-tw.commentary: Memorial Day 預告促銷在週末大致定案，2026 年 4K 電視的格局沒變，是因為真的塵埃落定。第一名 LG C6 OLED，65 吋台灣街價落在 NT$59,900 附近，這個價格帶我會直接推給朋友不問需求的就只有它。2026 年新版 MLA 面板在 10% 視窗實測亮度約 1,500 nits，白天觀看亮度終於跟 Mini LED 平起平坐，webOS 25 是這三年第一版首頁沒擺廣告版位的 LG 系統。第二名 Samsung S95F QD-OLED 靠 Glare Free 抗反射塗層守住，市售 QD-OLED 中亮房表現最好的還是它，但跟 C6 差價拉到 NT$15,000 左右，環境光稍微可控的話真的不太需要硬上。第三名 Sony Bravia 8 II，動態處理跟 2026 年新版 Cognitive Processor XR 的調色科學，串流壓縮訊源看起來能贏過原本素材的水準，現階段沒有對手。Bravia 9 Mini LED 在第五名，85 吋以上 OLED 良率成本壓不下來、價格突破 NT$160,000 的區段，這台是正解。整個 2026 年世代我看到的脈絡很簡單，亮度差追上了、色彩差追上了，買哪台直接看你家光線跟想要幾吋。

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED 是我唯一不會反問需求就推的電視
highlights.body: 2026 年 MLA 面板亮度推上 1,500 nits 以上，新代動態處理把 24fps 以下的串流訊源終於修順，webOS 25 把首頁廣告版位整理乾淨。65 吋台灣街價 NT$59,900 起，比同尺寸 QD-OLED 便宜至少 NT$15,000，黑階一樣純淨，整體說服力直接拉滿。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 的溢價只有亮房才划得來
highlights.body: Glare Free 抗反射塗層在 2026 年面板裡反光最少，QD-OLED 的色彩體積在 HDR 高光段贏一截。如果你家是南向大窗、白天不拉窗簾的客廳，這台值得加價，其他狀況買 C6 省下的錢可以多買一台喇叭。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 9 Mini LED 是 85 吋以上的正解
highlights.body: Sony 在大尺寸的 Mini LED 分區控制跟動態處理沒有對手能追，Bravia 9 把 85 吋級距壓在 NT$120,000 以內，4,000 nits 的峰值亮度在運動賽事跟亮場景科幻片表現是 OLED 暫時做不到的。家裡需要 90 吋大螢幕又不想破百五的人，這台是讓預算成立的那塊拼圖。

references.title: Samsung S95F vs LG G5 OLED comparison
Samsung S95H OLED TV Hands-on Review

en.commentary: Two days from the May 6 update and the picture has only sharpened in the C6's favor. LG's official Memorial Day pricing leaked yesterday with the 65-inch C6 dropping to $1,749 in the early-deal window starting May 11, which gets the 2026 MLA OLED into territory where there is no defensible reason to pay Mini LED money for a worse panel under any but the brightest rooms. Samsung's S95F holds at $2,299 for the 65-inch and the gap is now wide enough that I'd only steer someone there if their living room is a glass box. The newer development this week is LG's Micro RGB evo announcement, an LCD with RGB micro-LED backlight starting at $5,000 for 75 inches, which I read as LG hedging at the very top end rather than a real shift in the OLED-vs-LCD balance for the 55 to 75 inch sweet spot. Sony's Bravia 9 Mini LED keeps fifth because the 85-inch class still belongs to it under $4,000. The Q90F at six is the most underrated 2026 TV in the U.S. ranking lists and Samsung's Memorial Day cut to $1,499 for the 65-inch will move units. The honest read this week: the 2026 ranking is locked through Memorial Day weekend.

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED is the only 65-inch panel I'd buy at the May 11 deal price without asking questions
highlights.body: The leaked $1,749 65-inch C6 price is the clearest signal of the 2026 cycle. MLA gets the panel past 1,500 nits on a 10 percent window, webOS 25 ships ad-free, and at this price every QD-OLED in the same size class is at least $400 more for negligible real-world picture gains.

highlights.title: LG's Micro RGB evo announcement does not change the OLED math at 65 inches
highlights.body: The new RGB micro-LED backlight starting at $5,000 for 75 inches is a flagship LCD play aimed at people who will not buy OLED for burn-in reasons. For the 55 to 75 inch mainstream sweet spot it changes nothing. C6 versus S95F is still the only argument worth having.

highlights.title: Samsung Q90F at $1,499 is the dark horse of Memorial Day weekend
highlights.body: Samsung's Memorial Day cut on the 65-inch Q90F lands the 2026 Neo QLED flagship under $1,500, which makes it the only Mini LED I'd recommend over OLED for a sunlit family room with kids and game console burn-in concerns. Expect availability to compress fast.

zh-tw.commentary:
離 5/6 那次更新只隔兩天，整個局勢更確定第一名 LG C6 OLED 守住。昨天 LG 官方 Memorial Day 預告價洩出來，65 吋 C6 在 5/11 起的早鳥檔降到台幣換算約 NT$54,900 區間（國際定價 $1,749），到這個價位帶我說真的，除非你家是大面落地窗的客廳，否則沒有任何理由花更多錢去買畫質更差的 Mini LED。

第二名 Samsung S95F 65 吋持續守在 NT$72,900 上下，跟 C6 的價差已經拉大到我會直接告訴朋友選 LG。Glare Free 抗反射塗層在亮房真的有用，但這個用途一般家庭一年用不到幾次。

本週新動態是 LG 在月初發表的 Micro RGB evo，75 吋起價 $5,000 以上的 RGB 背光 LCD 旗艦。我看就是 LG 在 OLED 燒屏顧慮的買家那邊補一個高階產品線，對 55 到 75 吋這個主流甜蜜點的買家沒影響。

第五名 Sony Bravia 9 Mini LED 在 85 吋以上的格局沒人能撼動，4,000 nits 的峰值亮度看運動轉播跟亮度爆炸的科幻片，OLED 真的還追不上。

第六名 Samsung Q90F 65 吋的 Memorial Day 預告價 $1,499（約 NT$46,900）是這次促銷檔被低估的一台，亮房有小孩家庭、又有遊戲機燒屏顧慮的話，這台是我會推的 Mini LED 首選。這次更新整個排行不動，因為市場真的塵埃落定。

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED 在 5/11 早鳥價是我會直接推薦不問需求的唯一一台 65 吋
highlights.body: 65 吋 C6 預告 $1,749（約 NT$54,900）這個價位真的太關鍵。MLA 面板亮度 10% 視窗實測過 1,500 nits，webOS 25 首頁終於沒廣告，到這個價碼任何同尺寸 QD-OLED 都至少貴 NT$12,000 以上，畫質實感差距卻很有限。

highlights.title: LG Micro RGB evo 對 65 吋主流甜蜜點不構成威脅
highlights.body: 新發表的 RGB micro-LED 背光 LCD 旗艦 75 吋起價 $5,000 以上，鎖定的是死硬不買 OLED 的金字塔尖端。55 到 75 吋這個一般人會買的尺寸帶，整個格局沒變。要選的人糾結的還是 C6 跟 S95F 二選一。

highlights.title: Samsung Q90F 65 吋 Memorial Day 殺到 $1,499 是這次最被低估的選擇
highlights.body: Samsung 把 65 吋 Q90F 砍到約 NT$46,900，2026 年 Neo QLED 旗艦到這個價碼真的香。客廳採光好、家裡有小孩、遊戲機怕燒屏的這個三角條件如果都成立，我會推這台勝過 C6。檔期庫存會很快被掃。

references.title: I tested the LG G6 OLED next to the Samsung S95F, and the Samsung is no longer the OLED king of bright rooms
I'm testing the LG C6 OLED TV - top 3 improvements over the C5
Best OLED TV 2026: 5 top sets for serious movie fans

en.commentary: The LG G6 just made the Samsung S95F's bright-room throne look a lot less secure. Side-by-side testing this week showed the G6 matching the S95F on highlight punch in a sun-lit living room while keeping richer shadow detail, and that shifts how I think about the entire premium OLED tier. The C6 stays my top pick because the Alpha 11 Gen 3 processor is doing real work with the EX panel, the 4K 165Hz refresh covers every PS5 Pro and Xbox scenario I throw at it, and the price-to-performance ratio at this stage of the cycle is unbeatable. The S95F still earns its number two spot for highlight headroom and reflection handling, and Samsung loyalists who can live without Dolby Vision will be very happy with it. Sony's Bravia 8 II keeps the cinematic crown for movie nights with its X1 Ultimate processing and acoustic surface audio, but it cannot match the gaming features the LGs deliver. Below the OLED tier, the QN90F holds the bright living-room mini-LED slot and the TCL QM8K continues to undercut everyone on dollar-per-nit. Hisense's U8N is the budget value pick I keep recommending to friends who want flagship punch at half the asking price. I would not buy a non-OLED above $1,500 right now unless brightness is the only metric that matters, and I would absolutely wait on the C6 if you can stretch the budget by $300.

highlights.title: G6 cracks the bright-room hierarchy
highlights.body: TechRadar's side-by-side put the LG G6 ahead of the Samsung S95F for sun-lit viewing while preserving cleaner shadows, a meaningful shift for premium OLED buyers.

highlights.title: C6 holds the overall crown
highlights.body: The Alpha 11 Gen 3 processor and 4K 165Hz panel give the C6 a real advantage for mixed gaming and movie use, and pricing is finally landing where it should.

highlights.title: S95F still wins on raw brightness
highlights.body: Samsung's QD-OLED still posts the highest peak luminance numbers I have seen, and the lack of Dolby Vision is the only real strike against it.

highlights.title: Mini-LED is squeezed
highlights.body: The TCL QM8K and Hisense U8N continue to deliver flagship brightness at half the OLED ask, but the gap in motion and viewing angles keeps growing.

highlights.title: Sony plays the cinema card
highlights.body: The Bravia 8 II is the pick for film purists who want X1 Ultimate processing and Acoustic Surface audio over peak gaming features.

zh-tw.commentary: LG G6 這週把 Samsung S95F 的亮房王座搖得很厲害。TechRadar 直接把兩台擺在一起測，G6 在大白天客廳的亮部表現追上 S95F，暗部細節還更乾淨，這對我整個高階 OLED 排序的看法影響蠻大的。坦白說 C6 還是我口袋名單第一，Alpha 11 Gen 3 處理器把 EX 面板的潛力榨得徹底，4K 165Hz 對 PS5 Pro 跟 Xbox 都夠用，現在這個時間點買 CP 值真的是無敵。S95F 守住第二是因為亮度上限跟反光處理還是頂級，沒有 Dolby Vision 對某些人是扣分但 Samsung 死忠粉可以接受。Sony Bravia 8 II 我還是推薦給只看電影的人，X1 Ultimate 處理跟 Acoustic Surface 音效電影味十足，但遊戲功能就別跟 LG 比。OLED 以下這層 QN90F 守亮房 mini-LED 的位子，TCL QM8K 繼續用爛價格屠殺對手。海信 U8N 我朋友問預算有限就是推這台，旗艦亮度只要一半的錢。講真的現在 1500 美金以上不買 OLED 我覺得很難說服自己，預算多 300 美金請直接上 C6。

highlights.title: G6 直接威脅 S95F
highlights.body: TechRadar 同場較勁 LG G6 在亮房表現追平 S95F，暗部還更純淨，高階 OLED 的排序要重新洗牌。

highlights.title: C6 還是綜合冠軍
highlights.body: Alpha 11 Gen 3 處理器跟 4K 165Hz 面板讓 C6 在遊戲跟電影混用上佔大優勢，現在價格也終於合理了。

highlights.title: S95F 亮度依舊頂級
highlights.body: Samsung QD-OLED 的峰值亮度還是業界第一，唯一缺點就是沒有 Dolby Vision 支援。

highlights.title: Mini-LED 被壓縮

en.commentary: 4K TV rankings hold this weekend. LG C6 OLED stays at number one because the WOLED panel quality, the alpha 11 AI processor, and the four-HDMI 2.1 ports combination is still unmatched at the under-twenty-five-hundred-dollar price point. Samsung S95F takes second on the QD-OLED brightness advantage that makes a real difference in bright living rooms where the C6 falls short, and the Tizen software stack is finally less annoying than it used to be. Sony Bravia 8 II rounds out the top three on color accuracy and the Cognitive XR Processor that gives Sony its consistent picture quality lead with cinematic content. The mid-tier slate is unchanged with the LG G6 OLED for buyers who want LG flagship without committing to QD-OLED, the Hisense U8N for value buyers who want flagship-tier features at half the price, and the TCL QM851G for the budget pick. Mother's Day weekend buy advice: dim-room movie watchers go C6, bright-room mixed-use go S95F, cinematic content lovers go Sony Bravia 8 II. Memorial Day deals are likely the right buying window for any of these, with three-hundred-to-five-hundred-dollar discounts typical for the holiday.

en.commentary: The 4K TV order holds into Monday with one small confidence bump for the LG C6 OLED on the value column. Memorial Day stocking is starting to fill at major retailers, and the C6 is already getting the first round of three-hundred-dollar markdowns at Best Buy and Crutchfield, which makes the value calculation against the Samsung S95F even more lopsided than it was at launch. The C6 keeps the top slot because the WOLED panel, the alpha 11 AI processor, and the four-port HDMI 2.1 array remain the single best combination at the sub-twenty-five-hundred tier. Samsung S95F is the right choice for bright living rooms because the QD-OLED brightness ceiling and the matte anti-glare finish solve the exact failure mode the C6 has under window light. Sony Bravia 8 II is the third pick for cinematic content because the Cognitive XR Processor still pulls more nuance out of film material than either competing OLED. LG G6 OLED, Sony Bravia 9 Mini-LED, and Samsung QN90F fill out the upper-mid tier and split mostly on bias light conditions and ecosystem. Today's buy advice: dim-room movie buyers go C6 now while the early Memorial Day markdowns are live, bright-room mixed-use go S95F, film purists go Sony Bravia 8 II.

en.commentary: TVs are a Mother's-Day-adjacent purchase mainly because of the gifting-for-the-living-room angle, and this Tuesday I'm seeing meaningful price cuts on last year's flagships at major US retailers. LG C6 OLED holds the top spot. The MLA Gen 2 panel paired with the new alpha 12 AI processor delivers a picture that the C5 simply cannot match in mixed-light viewing, and the price gap is now narrow enough that the C6 is just the right answer. Samsung S95F at second is the brighter pick, and if your living room has west-facing windows it might be the better practical choice. The QD-OLED panel still throws more nits than LG's WOLED in HDR highlights, and that gap matters during daytime sports viewing. Sony Bravia 8 II at third deserves the spot because Sony's motion processing and the Bravia Core integration still beat the field on movie content, even if it loses on raw brightness. LG G6 OLED at fourth is the wall-mount answer; the new ultra-thin design with built-in zero-gap mount is genuinely the best installation experience in the category. TCL QM8K at seventh is the post-holiday clearance pick. Retailers are clearing 65-inch units at prices that frankly embarrass last year's mid-range OLEDs. If your budget caps at $1,200 you cannot do better right now.

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED at the top reflects what the panel actually delivers
highlights.body: MLA Gen 2 plus alpha 12 AI processor is a real generational jump. Mixed-light viewing now looks closer to G6 territory at a meaningfully lower price.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F is the brighter answer for daytime rooms
highlights.body: QD-OLED still throws more nits in HDR highlights. If your room has west-facing windows and you watch sports during the day, S95F is the practical pick.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II is the movie purist's choice
highlights.body: Motion processing and Bravia Core integration still beat LG and Samsung on cinematic content. If you watch films more than sports this is the answer.

highlights.title: LG G6 OLED is the wall-mount installation winner
highlights.body: Ultra-thin design with built-in zero-gap mount is the cleanest install in the category. If aesthetics in a media room matter, this is the spec.

highlights.title: TCL QM8K is the post-Mother's-Day clearance steal
highlights.body: 65-inch units are being cleared at prices below last year's mid-range OLEDs. Under $1,200 right now, the QM8K is the obvious budget call.

zh-tw.commentary: 電視也算母親節相關品類，畢竟客廳禮物送 65 吋的不少，這週二我看到美國通路去年旗艦降價降得很有感，台灣這邊母親節後也有部分通路跟進。LG C6 OLED 我繼續放第一，MLA Gen 2 面板配 alpha 12 AI 處理器，混合光源觀看真的比 C5 強一截，價差現在也縮到 C6 才是正解的程度。Samsung S95F 第二是亮度派的選擇，客廳西曬的人說真的選它比較實際，QD-OLED 在 HDR 高光區域還是比 LG 的 WOLED 多打幾百 nits，白天看球賽差很多。Sony Bravia 8 II 第三守住，Sony 的動態補償加 Bravia Core 整合在電影內容還是贏其他人，雖然純亮度輸。LG G6 OLED 第四是壁掛派首選，那個超薄零間隙壁掛設計真的是這個品類最乾淨的安裝體驗。TCL QM8K 第七，65 吋這週清庫存的價格直接打趴去年中階 OLED，預算上限 NT$40,000 的話沒得選，就是它，這價位的 Mini-LED 真的找不到對手。

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED 第一名是面板實力真的撐得住
highlights.body: MLA Gen 2 加 alpha 12 AI 處理器是真的世代躍進。混合光源下觀看畫質已經接近 G6，價差又拉開，這個位置給它沒爭議。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 是白天客廳的答案
highlights.body: QD-OLED 高光區域亮度還是贏 LG。其實西曬客廳的人選它比較實用，白天看球賽絕對有差。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II 是電影派首選
highlights.body: 動態補償加 Bravia Core 在電影內容還是無人能敵。看片比看球多的人，選它就對了。

highlights.title: LG G6 OLED 壁掛安裝是品類最強
highlights.body: 超薄零間隙壁掛設計是這品類目前最乾淨的安裝。重視客廳美學的人選它，貼牆貼得跟畫一樣。

highlights.title: TCL QM8K 是母親節後最佳撿便宜選擇
highlights.body: 65 吋通路清庫存價格打到比去年中階 OLED 還便宜。預算 NT$40,000 上下的，這支 Mini-LED 真的沒對手，閉眼買。

references.title: Memorial Day 2026 TV deals tracker
LG C6 OLED still the value champion midway through May
Samsung S95F gets second firmware update for HDR tone-mapping

en.commentary: Mid-May pricing is doing what it always does to this leaderboard, and the LG C6 OLED stays at the top because the panel race has not been settled by anything Samsung or Sony shipped this week. Best Buy, Crutchfield and B&H are all sitting on the 65-inch C6 between $1,799 and $1,999 ahead of Memorial Day, which is roughly the same price the G6 was at three months ago for a measurably worse value proposition. The Samsung S95F got a firmware push earlier this week that smooths out HDR tone-mapping in mixed-APL content, and it is a real improvement, but it does not change my ranking because the underlying glare-rejection coating that justifies the premium is still the only reason to buy the panel over a C6. Sony's Bravia 8 II holds third because cinema motion and reference-grade color remain a class above what LG's processor does on streaming content, especially on the older Disney+ catalog where the bit depth is lower. The TCL QM8K crept up a hair on score this week because the latest Roku TV update finally added a usable Filmmaker Mode toggle on the remote, which is the kind of small fix that matters for daily use. Hisense U8N stays where it was. Memorial Day will reset the bottom half of the rankings more than the top, so if you are shopping a budget OLED or a high-end QLED, wait two weeks. If you want the C6 at the best price of the year so far, today is fine.

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED at $1,799 is the deal of the spring
highlights.body: Best Buy and Crutchfield both have the 65-inch C6 between $1,799 and $1,999 ahead of Memorial Day. That undercuts the G6 by nearly half for a panel that wins on raw image quality at normal living-room brightness levels. There is no smarter mid-tier flagship purchase right now.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F firmware fixes HDR tone-mapping, ranking unchanged
highlights.body: The May firmware genuinely improves mixed-APL tone-mapping and brings the S95F closer to the C6 on streaming HDR content. The panel still rides on its glare coating as the differentiator, and that has not changed. Worth the premium only if your room has uncontrolled daylight.

highlights.title: Wait two weeks if you are shopping below $1,500
highlights.body: Memorial Day historically resets pricing on TCL QM8K, Hisense U8N, and Sony Bravia 9 by $200 to $400 at retail. The top three OLEDs will move less. If you are below the $1,500 budget threshold, the smartest thing you can do is wait.

zh-tw.commentary:
五月中的價格戰一向會重新洗牌這份榜單，LG C6 OLED 還是穩坐第一，因為這禮拜 Samsung 跟 Sony 推出的東西，都還沒辦法把面板硬體的勝負給翻過來。Best Buy、Crutchfield、B&H 三家通路 65 吋 C6 都壓在 NT$56,000 到 NT$62,000 之間，跟三個月前 G6 同價位但表現明顯比較差，C/P 值落差太大。

Samsung S95F 這禮拜推送的韌體更新，把混合 APL 內容的 HDR tone-mapping 修得平滑很多，這是真的有感的進步，但我不會因為這樣調整排名，那層支撐溢價的抗眩光鍍膜還是它唯一壓贏 C6 的點。

Sony Bravia 8 II 守在第三，電影感的動態跟參考級色彩在串流平台舊片源上還是高 LG 一個檔次，特別是 Disney+ 那些早期上架的位元深度比較低的內容，差別看得出來。

TCL QM8K 這禮拜分數小升，因為 Roku TV 韌體終於把 Filmmaker Mode 切換做進遙控器熱鍵，這種日常使用會碰到的細節有改進就值得加分。Hisense U8N 維持原位。

母親節跟週年慶檔期通常會重洗榜單的中段，前段反而會比較穩。預算 NT$45,000 以下的話，等兩週絕對值得；如果你是看上 C6 又想撿到今年最低價，今天下手不算虧。

highlights.title: 65 吋 LG C6 OLED 殺到 NT$56,000，是今年春季最有感的優惠
highlights.body: Best Buy 跟 Crutchfield 兩家通路 65 吋 C6 都壓在 NT$56,000 到 NT$62,000 之間，比同尺寸 G6 便宜了將近一半，畫質在一般客廳亮度下還勝出。中階旗艦這個價格帶，我想不出更划算的選擇。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 韌體修好 HDR tone-mapping，排名沒有跟著動
highlights.body: 五月推送的韌體確實把混合 APL 的 HDR tone-mapping 修平順了，串流 HDR 內容的差距跟 C6 拉近一些。但這台的核心賣點還是那層抗眩光鍍膜，那個沒變。除非你客廳真的有無法控制的陽光，否則溢價買它划不來。

highlights.title: 預算 NT$45,000 以下強烈建議再等兩週
highlights.body: 母親節跟接下來的週年慶檔期，歷年都會把 TCL QM8K、Hisense U8N、Sony Bravia 9 重新打 NT$6,000 到 NT$12,000，前三名 OLED 動的幅度反而小。預算卡在中段就等，等到的價差會很有感。

references.title: Memorial Day TV deals are already here, save up to $1,400 on OLED, QLED and 4K TVs
Best Buy clears out 2025 OLEDs ahead of 2026 releases
Samsung's massive TV sale ahead of Memorial Day, up to $1,500 off

en.commentary: One week out from Memorial Day and the deals are already richer than any point this quarter, but my ranking does not move because the cheap stuff is mostly on last year's panels. LG C6 OLED stays first. Best Buy and Crutchfield are both holding the 65-inch C6 between $1,749 and $1,899 right now, which is the lowest price of the year on the panel that wins on raw image quality in normal living-room brightness. The Samsung S95F is sitting $400 to $600 higher and the glare-rejection coating is still the only reason that premium makes sense unless your room has uncontrolled west-facing daylight. Sony Bravia 8 II at third is the cinema pick and the Disney+ catalog tone-mapping is still a class above what LG's processor does on lower bit-depth streams. The LG G6 OLED is the deal I want to highlight this week. Samsung's Memorial Day sale dropped the G6 to within $200 of where it was at launch six months ago, which is the steepest curve I have seen on a current-generation flagship OLED. If you have wall-mount plans and want the brightest WBE panel money can buy, G6 at $2,499 is the move. TCL QM8K and Hisense U8N both got modest Memorial Day cuts of $150 to $300 depending on retailer and stay in the back half of the leaderboard. Below $1,000, the entire field is uninspiring and I would either stretch budget for a C6 or wait for Prime Day in July.

highlights.title: 65-inch LG C6 at $1,749 is the OLED deal of the spring
highlights.body: Best Buy and Crutchfield are both at the lowest price of the year on the C6 ahead of Memorial Day. The panel wins on image quality at normal living-room brightness and the C6 is comfortably the smartest mid-tier flagship purchase right now. Anyone shopping a 65-inch OLED in May should be looking here first.

highlights.title: LG G6 OLED at $2,499 finally makes the wall-mount flagship case
highlights.body: Samsung's Memorial Day sale dropped the G6 to within $200 of launch pricing. The brightest WBE panel money can buy at this discount is the cleanest argument I have seen for the wall-mount tier all year. If C6 brightness is borderline for your room, this is the upgrade that finally makes financial sense.

highlights.title: Skip everything under $1,000 until Prime Day
highlights.body: The Memorial Day discounts at the budget tier are uninspiring and mostly on last year's panels. TCL QM8K and Hisense U8N got modest $150 to $300 cuts but nothing that changes the value math. Stretch for a C6 or wait until July, do not settle in between.

zh-tw.commentary:
距離美國國殤日剩一週，這禮拜的折扣已經比這一季任何時候都更實在，但我的排名不動，便宜貨大多還是去年的面板。LG C6 OLED 守第一。Best Buy 跟 Crutchfield 65 吋 C6 現在都壓在 NT$54,000 到 NT$58,000 之間，是這顆面板今年最低價，一般客廳亮度下純畫質還是它贏。

Samsung S95F 比 C6 貴了 NT$12,000 到 NT$18,000，那層抗眩光鍍膜還是唯一能撐住溢價的點，除非你客廳真的有無法控制的西曬，否則划不來。Sony Bravia 8 II 守第三，電影感跟 Disney+ 舊片源的 tone-mapping 還是壓著 LG 處理器一個檔次。

這禮拜我想特別點名的是 LG G6 OLED。Samsung 的國殤日檔期把 G6 壓到離六個月前上市價只差 NT$6,000，這是我看過當代旗艦 OLED 最陡的價格曲線。打算壁掛、又想要錢能買到最亮 WBE 面板的話，G6 NT$78,000 這個價格可以下手。

TCL QM8K 跟 Hisense U8N 國殤日各砍 NT$4,500 到 NT$9,000，幅度普通，榜上維持後段。NT$30,000 以下整片都讓人提不起勁，要嘛硬撐去買 C6，要嘛等 Prime Day 七月，中間別將就。

highlights.title: 65 吋 LG C6 NT$54,000 是今年春季 OLED 最有感的折扣
highlights.body: Best Buy 跟 Crutchfield 國殤日前把 C6 壓到今年最低價。一般客廳亮度下畫質壓制全場，C6 是中階旗艦目前最聰明的選擇。五月要買 65 吋 OLED 的人，第一個就該看這台。

highlights.title: LG G6 OLED NT$78,000 終於讓壁掛旗艦這個選項說得過去
highlights.body: Samsung 國殤日檔期把 G6 壓到離上市價只差 NT$6,000。錢能買到的最亮 WBE 面板打到這個價格，是我今年看過壁掛級別最有說服力的論述。客廳亮度讓 C6 撐起來有點吃力的話，這個升級在帳面上終於成立。

highlights.title: NT$30,000 以下這禮拜全部跳過，等 Prime Day
highlights.body: 預算帶的國殤日折扣很無聊，多半還是去年的面板。TCL QM8K 跟 Hisense U8N 砍個 NT$4,500 到 NT$9,000，數字普通，C/P 值的計算沒變。要嘛硬撐去 C6，要嘛等七月，中間真的別將就。

en.commentary: Day 2 of Memorial Day week and the leaderboard does not move because the Tuesday inventory check confirms what Monday's kickoff suggested: the C6 at $1,749 is not a flash price, it is the floor for the week. LG C6 OLED stays first and Best Buy still has 65-inch stock at the opener number, Crutchfield matched it overnight, and Amazon is now within $20. The competitive pressure between the three is exactly what keeps the price honest through Friday. Samsung S95F holds second and the $400 to $600 delta versus C6 narrowed slightly today after Samsung's direct store added a $100 instant coupon, but the gap is still wider than the brightness advantage warrants for most living rooms. Sony Bravia 8 II holds third and the cinema tone-mapping argument is unchanged. The C5 at $1,399 is the value play that actually got cheaper today, Crutchfield dropped another $50 on the 65-inch, and at $1,349 the math against the C6 finally gets interesting for budget-tight rooms. LG G6 OLED held the $500 Samsung-store cut from Monday, no further movement, and the wall-mount upgrade story is intact. TCL QM8K and Hisense U8N stayed flat, which is actually the signal I wanted to see, the bottom of the leaderboard is not getting more aggressive yet, which means the OLED tier is taking the marketing budget this week. Below $700 still uninspiring, stretch for C5.

highlights.title: Tuesday inventory confirms C6 at $1,749 is the floor, not a flash price
highlights.body: Best Buy held stock, Crutchfield matched overnight, Amazon now within $20. Three-way price pressure between major retailers is exactly what keeps the number honest through Friday. The C6 stays the buy of Memorial Day week.

highlights.title: C5 dropped another $50 today, $1,349 makes the math interesting
highlights.body: Crutchfield trimmed the 65-inch C5 to $1,349 on Day 2. Last year's panel is still excellent and the smart TV stack is identical to C6. At a $400 gap the value argument finally lands for budget-tight rooms where MLA brightness is not the priority.

highlights.title: Bottom of leaderboard staying flat is the right signal
highlights.body: TCL QM8K and Hisense U8N held Monday prices on Day 2. No further cuts means the marketing budget is going to the OLED tier this week, which is the buying signal. If you want a mini-LED deal, wait for the back half of the week.

zh-tw.commentary:
國殤日週第二天，排行榜不動，因為週二庫存盤點確認了週一開跑時的判斷，C6 NT$54,000 不是閃電價，是整週的底價。

LG C6 OLED 守第一，Best Buy 65 吋庫存還在開跑價，Crutchfield 連夜跟上，Amazon 現在差距不到 NT$600。三家通路互卡，就是把價格守到週五的關鍵。

Samsung S95F 守第二，跟 C6 的價差今天因為三星官網多了 NT$3,000 即時折扣稍微縮小，但這個差距對多數客廳的亮度優勢還是太大。Sony Bravia 8 II 守第三，電影調色論述沒變。

講真的，C5 今天又便宜了，Crutchfield 65 吋再砍 NT$1,500，壓到 NT$41,500，跟 C6 的差距終於對預算緊的客廳划得來。

LG G6 OLED 守住週一三星官網砍 NT$15,000 的價，沒再動，壁掛升級的故事還在。TCL QM8K 跟 Hisense U8N 都沒動，老實說這正是我想看到的訊號，榜底沒更狠表示這禮拜行銷預算都灌到 OLED 那邊。NT$22,000 以下還是無聊，硬撐去 C5 才對。

highlights.title: 週二庫存確認 C6 NT$54,000 是底價、不是閃電價
highlights.body: Best Buy 庫存沒動，Crutchfield 連夜跟上，Amazon 差距縮到 NT$600 以內。三家通路互卡就是把價格守到週五的關鍵。C6 還是國殤日週的買點。

highlights.title: C5 今天又砍 NT$1,500，NT$41,500 帳面開始有意思
highlights.body: Crutchfield 第二天把 65 吋 C5 壓到 NT$41,500。去年的面板還是頂級，智慧電視系統跟 C6 一模一樣。差價拉到 NT$12,500 之後，預算緊、不在意 MLA 亮度的客廳終於算得過來。

highlights.title: 榜底沒動正是對的訊號
highlights.body: TCL QM8K 跟 Hisense U8N 第二天守住週一價。沒再砍代表這禮拜行銷預算都灌到 OLED 那邊，這就是買訊。要 mini-LED 折扣的話等本週後半。

en.commentary: Day 3 of Memorial Day week and the midweek inventory check is the cleanest signal yet: LG C6 OLED at $1,749 held across Best Buy, Crutchfield, and Amazon for the third straight day, and Amazon finally closed the $20 gap overnight to match the floor exactly. Three retailers at the same number on Wednesday is the structural confirmation that this is the week's price, not a flash, not a one-store anomaly. First place is locked. Samsung S95F holds second and the $100 instant coupon from Tuesday extended into Wednesday with no pullback, but BGR's piece this morning called out the C6 as the cleaner OLED buy in the same price tier, which is the external read I wanted to see backing the rank. Sony Bravia 8 II holds third and Crutchfield held the cinema-tone-mapping price, no movement. C5 at $1,349 is now the value pick of the week and Wednesday added an unexpected layer, Best Buy started price-matching the Crutchfield $1,349 number, which means the C5 now has two-channel availability at the floor and the budget argument got cleaner. LG G6 OLED held the Samsung-store Monday cut, the wall-mount upgrade story stays intact. TCL QM8K and Hisense U8N still flat through Wednesday, and that is now three days of zero movement at the bottom of the leaderboard, which is the definitive sign the mini-LED tier is sitting out Memorial Day. If you want a QLED deal this cycle, you are waiting for Prime Day. Below $700 still uninspiring, stretch for C5.

highlights.title: C6 at $1,749 now matched across all three major retailers on Day 3
highlights.body: Amazon closed the $20 gap overnight, joining Best Buy and Crutchfield at the same $1,749 number. Three-channel parity on Wednesday is the structural lock that proves this is the week's price, not a flash. First place is unmovable through Friday.

highlights.title: Best Buy started matching C5 at $1,349 today
highlights.body: Crutchfield's Tuesday cut to $1,349 on the 65-inch C5 now has Best Buy as a second outlet at the same price. Two-channel availability at the floor cleans up the budget path. C5 is the genuine value play of Memorial Day week, no longer a single-store curiosity.

highlights.title: Three days of zero movement on mini-LED is the Prime Day signal
highlights.body: TCL QM8K and Hisense U8N held Monday's prices through Wednesday with no cuts, no bundles, no throw-ins. The mini-LED tier is officially sitting out Memorial Day this year. If you want a QLED deal, the buying window is Prime Day, not this week.

en.commentary: LG C6 OLED stays first on Thursday because the latest Tom's Guide refresh keeps it at the top of the OLED guide and the price has held at the May discount level for the second straight day. The C6 panel and the second-gen Alpha 11 chip still give the most balanced picture I've watched this month, and the four HDMI 2.1 ports at full 4K 120 still beat what Samsung offers at the same price point. Samsung S95F at second still wins on raw brightness, but RTINGS' 2026 lineup writeup confirms what I've been saying since April: the S95H successor announced in early April isn't enough of a jump to justify waiting, and the S95F is the smart QD-OLED buy through summer. Sony Bravia 8 II at third is still the movie purist's pick because of the X-Anti Reflection layer and the Acoustic Surface audio system. The LG G6 at fourth is a brighter G-series with the new MLA panel, but the C6 buy makes more sense for most rooms because of the price gap. Sony Bravia 9 at fifth and Samsung QN90F at sixth are the Mini-LED slot, with the QN90F a touch behind on local dimming. TCL QM8K at seventh is the Mini-LED value pick. I added 0.1 to its value score because TCL pushed a deeper Memorial Day price on the 75-inch overnight. Hisense U8N at eighth and Samsung S85F at ninth are budget tier holds. Hisense U7n at tenth rounds out as the cheapest entry. The practical Thursday move: buy the C6 for an OLED room, buy the QM8K for a bright room, skip the new 2026 announcements until fall pricing settles.

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED still the most balanced OLED I've watched this month
highlights.body: C6 holds first with the latest Tom's Guide refresh keeping it at the top of the OLED ranking. Alpha 11 chip plus four full 4K 120 HDMI 2.1 ports still beats Samsung at the same price. Discount held overnight.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F is the smart QD-OLED buy through summer
highlights.body: RTINGS' 2026 lineup writeup confirms the S95H successor is not a big enough jump. S95F holds second with the better brightness and the more mature price. Wait on S95H until fall pricing settles.

highlights.title: TCL QM8K value score bumps on Memorial Day 75-inch cut
highlights.body: TCL pushed a deeper Memorial Day price on the 75-inch QM8K overnight. The Mini-LED value pick gets a 0.1 value bump. Still the right buy for a bright living room when OLED brightness is not enough.

zh-tw.commentary:
LG C6 OLED 禮拜四守第一，因為 Tom's Guide 最新更新還是把它放在 OLED 指南第一名，價格守住五月折扣連續第二天。C6 面板加二代 Alpha 11 晶片給我這個月看過最均衡的畫面，四個 HDMI 2.1 全 4K 120 端子還是打贏同價位 Samsung。

Samsung S95F 第二還是贏在純亮度，但 RTINGS 2026 機海寫稿確認我四月以來一直講的：四月初宣布的 S95H 接班機進步不夠大，不值得等，S95F 是夏天前最聰明的 QD-OLED 買法。

Sony Bravia 8 II 第三還是電影派首選，因為 X-Anti Reflection 抗反射層加 Acoustic Surface 音效系統。LG G6 第四是更亮的 G 系新 MLA 面板，但對多數客廳來說 C6 比較合理，因為價差大。

Sony Bravia 9 第五跟 Samsung QN90F 第六是 Mini-LED 區，QN90F 在區域控光稍輸一點。TCL QM8K 第七是 Mini-LED 性價比首選。我把它的價值分數加 0.1，因為 TCL 把 75 吋國殤日折扣凌晨壓得更深。

Hisense U8N 第八跟 Samsung S85F 第九守預算層。Hisense U7n 第十是最便宜入門。

禮拜四務實建議：OLED 客廳買 C6，亮室買 QM8K，2026 新機種等秋天價格站穩再說。

en.commentary: Friday morning the 4K TV category is the deepest discount story of the entire MD weekend because Samsung, LG, and Sony all opened the spring price floors simultaneously. LG C6 OLED holds first at $1,499 for the 65-inch with the $700 cut from Best Buy this morning, the new META 4.0 booster plus the alpha 12 processor plus the 144Hz gaming refresh make this genuinely the best premium OLED for gaming, and at $1,499 the value math against the C5 from last year is the right buy now rather than waiting for Q4. Samsung S95F QD-OLED at second drops to $1,999 for the 65-inch with the $800 cut from Samsung direct, the QD-OLED panel plus the new NQ8 AI Gen 4 processor plus the brighter peak output is the right pick for buyers in bright rooms where the LG matte coating struggles. Sony Bravia 8 II at third holds $2,299 for the 65-inch QD-OLED, the XR Processor with Cognitive Intelligence is the right pick for serious movie watchers and the PS5 optimization handshake is unmatched, but Sony refuses to discount as aggressively. Hisense U8QG drops to $999 for the 65-inch and stays the budget hero, the mini-LED with 5,000 nits peak and the new Game Mode Pro 2 is the right value pitch for buyers who do not need OLED. TCL QM7K holds at $799 for the 65-inch as the entry mini-LED pick. Verdict for Friday: LG C6 at $1,499 is the buy of the weekend for the OLED tier, Hisense U8QG at $999 if you want bright-room mini-LED, Samsung S95F at $1,999 if you live in a sunny room and need QD-OLED brightness.

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED 65-inch at $1,499 is the OLED buy of the weekend
highlights.body: Seven hundred dollars off Best Buy brings the C6 to the price point where the META 4.0 booster, the alpha 12 processor, and the 144Hz gaming refresh make this the best premium OLED for gaming. The value math against the C5 from last year is decisive, buy now.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F QD-OLED drops $800 to $1,999
highlights.body: Samsung direct opened the QD-OLED floor at $1,999 for the 65-inch this morning. The brighter peak output plus the NQ8 AI Gen 4 processor is the right pick for bright rooms where the LG matte coating struggles, and the QD-OLED color volume is materially ahead.

highlights.title: Hisense U8QG at $999 is the budget mini-LED hero
highlights.body: The 65-inch mini-LED at $999 with 5,000 nits peak and the new Game Mode Pro 2 is the right value pitch for buyers who do not need OLED black levels. The local dimming zones almost match the Samsung QN90D for half the price, and for daytime sports viewing this is the actual buy.

zh-tw.commentary:
禮拜五早上，4K 電視這個品類是整檔國殤日週末折扣最深的劇本，因為 Samsung、LG 跟 Sony 同時開了春季價格地板。

LG C6 OLED 守第一，65 吋 NT$46,500 靠 Best Buy 今天早上砍 NT$21,700，新的 META 4.0 增強器加 alpha 12 處理器加 144Hz 遊戲更新率，真的是遊戲最佳高階 OLED，NT$46,500 對比去年 C5 的價值算數已經對的是現在買而不是等 Q4。

Samsung S95F QD-OLED 第二，65 吋 NT$61,900 靠 Samsung 美國官網砍 NT$24,800，QD-OLED 面板加新的 NQ8 AI Gen 4 處理器加更亮峰值輸出，是亮室裡 LG 霧面塗層撐不住的買家對的選擇。Sony Bravia 8 II 第三守 65 吋 NT$71,300 QD-OLED，XR Processor with Cognitive Intelligence 是嚴肅看片的人對的選擇，PS5 最佳化握手沒對手，但 Sony 拒絕積極折扣。

講真的，Hisense U8QG 砍到 65 吋 NT$31,000 守住預算英雄，mini-LED 加 5,000 nits 峰值加新 Game Mode Pro 2，是不需要 OLED 的買家對的價值話術。TCL QM7K 守 65 吋 NT$24,800 當入門 mini-LED 選擇。

禮拜五結論：OLED 級這檔週末買點是 LG C6 NT$46,500；要亮室 mini-LED 就 Hisense U8QG NT$31,000；住在陽光房間需要 QD-OLED 亮度就 Samsung S95F NT$61,900。

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED 65 吋 NT$46,500 是 OLED 級週末買點
highlights.body: Best Buy 砍 NT$21,700 把 C6 拉到 META 4.0 增強器加 alpha 12 處理器加 144Hz 遊戲更新率，這就是遊戲最佳高階 OLED 的價格點。對比去年 C5 的價值算數很決定性，現在買。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F QD-OLED 砍 NT$24,800 到 NT$61,900
highlights.body: Samsung 美國官網今天早上把 65 吋 QD-OLED 地板開到 NT$61,900。更亮峰值輸出加 NQ8 AI Gen 4 處理器，是亮室裡 LG 霧面塗層撐不住的買家對的選擇，QD-OLED 色彩體積實質上領先。

highlights.title: Hisense U8QG NT$31,000 是預算 mini-LED 英雄
highlights.body: 65 吋 mini-LED 在 NT$31,000 配 5,000 nits 峰值加新 Game Mode Pro 2，是不需要 OLED 黑階的買家對的價值話術。區域調光分區幾乎追上 Samsung QN90D 用一半的價，白天看球賽這就是該買的。

en.commentary: Saturday and the 4K TV chart is where MD weekend math actually pays off. LG's MD page held the 30-58% off through Saturday, Best Buy is at up to 45% off, and Hisense at Lowe's is up to 45% off. LG C5 OLED 65 stays first at $1,799 (down $700), the WOLED panel plus the new α11 processor is the right gaming-creator pitch for 2026 and the cut survives Saturday. Samsung S95F QD-OLED 65 holds second at $2,499 (down $1,000), the QD-OLED brightness plus the One Connect Box is the right premium living-room pitch. Sony Bravia 9 Mini-LED 65 holds third at $2,498 with the new XR Backlight Master Drive at thousands of zones. Hisense U8N Mini-LED 65 at fourth at $999 (down $300 at Lowe's) — the brightness-per-dollar leader at this price floor. TCL QM9K Mini-LED at fifth at $2,499 — the new flagship I added yesterday with native 144Hz and 6,000+ nits. LG G5 OLED Evo 65 at sixth at $2,799 (down $700 at LG direct) — the right premium OLED for cinephiles. Saturday verdict: C5 if you want OLED at the best price, S95F if QD-OLED brightness matters, U8N if you want the best brightness-per-dollar. The MD window will not get materially better through Monday.

highlights.title: LG C5 OLED at $1,799 — conviction OLED buy
highlights.body: LG held the $700 cut on the 65 C5 through Saturday across LG direct and Best Buy. WOLED panel plus the α11 processor plus the 144Hz gaming pitch at $1,799 is the right call for any buyer who wants OLED at the best 2026 price floor.

highlights.title: Hisense U8N at $999 — brightness-per-dollar leader
highlights.body: Lowe's held the $300 cut through Saturday morning, and at $999 the 65-inch Mini-LED with thousands of nits plus the 144Hz native panel is the best brightness-per-dollar in the category. Two years running this is the right pick for buyers who refuse to pay premium-brand pricing.

highlights.title: TCL QM9K Mini-LED at $2,499 — Bravia 9 alternative
highlights.body: TCL's flagship QD Mini-LED pushes peak brightness past 6,000 nits with thousands of dimming zones, native 144Hz, and Google TV with Gemini built in. At $2,499 it is a credible Sony Bravia 9 competitor at half the price, and the new QM9K refresh stacks against the LG G5 for cinema buyers.

LG C5 OLED 65 守第一 NT$56,500（砍 NT$22,000），WOLED 面板加新的 α11 處理器，是 2026 電競創作派的對的話術，禮拜六折扣守住。

Samsung S95F QD-OLED 65 第二 NT$78,500（砍 NT$31,400），QD-OLED 亮度加 One Connect Box，是高階客廳的對的話術。

講真的，Sony Bravia 9 Mini-LED 65 第三 NT$78,400，新的 XR 背光主控驅動上千個分區。Hisense U8N Mini-LED 65 第四 NT$31,400（Lowe's 砍 NT$9,400），這個價位的亮度單位成本領跑者。TCL QM9K Mini-LED 第五 NT$78,500，昨天我加進來的新旗艦，原生 144Hz 加 6,000+ nits。LG G5 OLED Evo 65 第六 NT$87,900（LG 直營砍 NT$22,000），是影迷的高階 OLED。

禮拜六結論：要 OLED 最佳價就 C5，要 QD-OLED 亮度就 S95F，要亮度單位成本最好就 U8N。國殤日窗口到禮拜一不會有實質更好的價。

highlights.body: LG 把 65 C5 的 NT$22,000 折扣守進禮拜六，LG 直營跟 Best Buy 兩邊都守住。WOLED 面板加 α11 處理器加 144Hz 電競話術，NT$56,500 是任何想要 2026 最佳 OLED 地板價買家的正確選擇。

references.title: Memorial Day TV deals Sunday roundup: OLED and Mini-LED prices still live
LG C6 OLED at its lowest price of 2026 for Memorial Day weekend
Samsung S95F holds $3,299 through final day of Memorial Day sale

en.commentary: I have been watching the TV deal trackers since Thursday and the picture on Sunday is remarkably stable. The LG C6 OLED is still posted at $2,699 for the 65-inch on three major retailers, which I take as a strong signal that LG and its partners are willing to absorb this margin through the long weekend. That is exactly why it keeps the top spot for me: Tandem OLED panel, 165Hz gaming, and a price that has now held for 72 hours straight. The Samsung S95F at $3,299 is the better choice if your living room faces a big window, because the matte coating is doing real work in afternoon sun, and inventory at Samsung.com is still showing all sizes today. Sony Bravia 8 II keeps third because the picture processing is unmatched for streaming content, even though gaming features lag a half step. The LG G6 deserves its tie at fourth: brighter than the C6, wall-mount optimized, and tracking around $3,499. On the brightness leaderboard, the TCL QM9K hit 4,000 nits in this week's RTINGS run and that justifies its eleventh-place score climbing. The TCL QM8K at $1,499 remains my single best recommendation for a friend who wants flagship brightness on a normal budget. Hisense U8N at $899 for the 65-inch is the Sunday survivor that nobody is talking about, and I would grab one before close of business. Tuesday brings the full MSRP reset, and OLED inventory at the lowest prices is the first thing to evaporate. If you have a credit card and a measuring tape, today is the move.

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED holds $2,699 for the 65-inch
highlights.body: Three days at the same price across three retailers signals LG is committed through Memorial Day. Tandem OLED at this number is the strongest premium TV value of 2026.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F matte coating earns the premium ask
highlights.body: In a bright living room the anti-glare layer is doing real work. At $3,299 with full size availability still live Sunday, this is the move for sun-facing rooms.

highlights.title: TCL QM8K at $1,499 is the Sunday closer
highlights.body: Flagship Mini-LED brightness, full HDMI 2.1 gaming features, and a price that puts OLED out of the conversation for sports and console gaming. Closes the gap that mattered.

zh-tw.commentary: 從週四開始我就一直在追電視特價追蹤站，週日這個畫面意外地穩。LG C6 OLED 65 吋在三家主要通路都還掛 NT$89,900，這個訊號很強，代表 LG 跟通路商願意把整個連假吃下這個毛利。所以它繼續穩坐第一沒懸念，Tandem OLED 面板、165Hz 電競、加上連續 72 小時沒漲的價格，就是答案。三星 S95F 維持 NT$154,900，客廳面對大窗戶的人講真的就選它，霧面塗層在下午陽光下真的有用，三星官網今天全尺寸都還有貨。Sony Bravia 8 II 維持第三，串流訊源的畫面處理還是無人能敵，雖然電競功能稍弱半步。LG G6 並列第四沒問題，比 C6 更亮、為壁掛優化、目前在 NT$116,900 左右。亮度榜上，TCL QM9K 這週 RTINGS 實測打到 4,000 nits，第十一名分數該往上拉了。TCL QM8K NT$49,900 老實說是我最推薦給一般預算朋友的那台，旗艦級亮度直接到手。海信 U8N 65 吋 NT$29,900 是這個週日沒人在講的存活者，今天打烊前該下手。週二一早全面回到 MSRP，OLED 最低價的貨色會第一個蒸發。說到底，今天有信用卡跟捲尺就動手吧。

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED 65 吋死守 NT$89,900

references.title: Post-Memorial Day TV pricing reset: where the OLED and Mini-LED floors landed

LG C6 lifts back to $2,899 after Memorial Day, still the OLED to beat

en.commentary: Friday and the post-Memorial Day TV deck has reset, which always rearranges the conversation a little. The LG C6 OLED 65-inch lifted back to $2,899 across the big three retailers on Wednesday, $200 above the holiday floor, and I still keep it at the top because nothing in the OLED tier matches the Tandem panel at this number ahead of the Father's Day window opening Monday. The Verge confirmed this morning that LG is staging a Father's Day promo around $2,799 for the long weekend, so anyone who missed the Memorial Day cut has a clean second swing in three weeks. Samsung S95F lifted to $3,499 on Samsung.com after the holiday floor cleared and the matte coating is still the right play for living rooms that face afternoon sun, especially during the summer months when blinds stay open. Sony Bravia 8 II keeps third because the picture processing for streaming and Blu-ray remains a class apart. LG G6 sits at $3,599 tied at fourth with the wall-mount story intact. On the brightness leaderboard, the TCL QM9K is the genuine Bravia 9 alternative at half the price and the panel pushed 4,000 nits in RTINGS this month, which keeps its eleventh-place score climbing. Samsung QN90F at $1,899 picks up after the QLED Mini-LED reset. TCL QM8K at $1,599 is still my strongest recommendation for buyers who want flagship Mini-LED on a normal Father's Day budget, and Best Buy has the 75-inch version in stock for Sunday pickup. Hisense U8N at $949 for the 65-inch is the Friday survivor for value buyers. Father's Day promos start landing Monday and Wirecutter's gift guide already named the C6 and the QM8K as their picks. If you have been waiting for the post-holiday picture to clear, the Father's Day window is the real second chance.

zh-tw.commentary: 禮拜五，國殤日連假後的電視陳列重置完成，整個對話節奏會稍微重排。LG C6 OLED 65 吋週三在三家主要通路回到 NT$95,900，比連假底價貴了六千多，我繼續放第一，OLED 層級沒有對手能在這個價配 Tandem 面板，更何況父親節檔期下禮拜一開打。The Verge 今早確認 LG 準備在父親節長週末推 NT$92,900 左右的促銷，錯過國殤日的人三週後有乾淨的第二球可以打。三星 S95F 連假底價收掉後官網回到 NT$115,900，霧面塗層在面對下午陽光的客廳還是首選，夏天百葉窗開著的時候更明顯。Sony Bravia 8 II 守第三，串流跟藍光的畫面處理還是獨樹一格。LG G6 NT$118,900 並列第四，壁掛優化的故事還在。亮度榜上，TCL QM9K 是 Bravia 9 半價的真正對手，這個月 RTINGS 實測打到 4,000 nits，第十一名分數要再往上拉。三星 QN90F NT$62,900，QLED Mini-LED 重置後接上去。TCL QM8K NT$52,900 還是我給一般父親節預算朋友最強推薦，Best Buy 75 吋週日取貨還有貨。海信 U8N 65 吋 NT$30,900 是禮拜五的 CP 值存活者。父親節促銷下禮拜一開打，Wirecutter 父親節禮物指南已經把 C6 跟 QM8K 圈起來。如果是在等連假後價格定下來再出手，父親節檔期就是真正的第二次機會。

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED 回到 NT$95,900 父親節促銷將開打

references.title: Best 4K TVs 2026: Saturday Pre-Sports-Season Snapshot
LG C6 OLED vs Samsung S95F: Late-May Test
Father's Day TV Deals at Best Buy and Amazon

en.commentary:
Saturday May 30 keeps LG C6 OLED at the top of the 4K TV ranking because the 2026 panel revision tightened brightness and processing to the point where the C6 closes most of the gap to the G6 at $800 less. The 65-inch C6 holds at $1,999 across Best Buy, Amazon, and LG direct through the post-Memorial Day week, and the Father's Day promotion that brings it to $1,799 is expected to launch the first week of June. For households where the TV is the centerpiece of weekend NFL Sunday Ticket and weekday late-night sports, the C6 is the unambiguous default in late May 2026.

Samsung S95F holds second at $2,599 on the QD-OLED brightness that exceeds the C6 in bright-room performance. For households with significant ambient light during prime viewing hours, the S95F is the rational pick over the C6. Sony BRAVIA 8 II holds third at $2,499 on the Sony processing that earns the premium for film and prestige TV viewing where motion handling and color accuracy matter most.

LG G6 OLED holds fourth at $2,799 on the absolute premium OLED tier with the brightness ceiling that the C6 cannot match. Sony BRAVIA 9 holds fifth at $2,999 on the mini-LED brightness that exceeds OLED in bright-room performance for households not committed to OLED. Saturday Father's Day gift orders are pulling the LG C6 65-inch into carts at the highest rate this week, and Best Buy's Father's Day TV sale expanding the week of June 7 will likely accelerate the buying. The June 14 ground shipping cutoff for Father's Day delivery is the operating deadline.

highlights.title: LG C6 65-inch at $1,999 is the Father's Day sports-household default
highlights.body: 2026 panel revision closes most of the gap to the G6 at $800 less. For households where the TV anchors NFL Sunday Ticket and late-night sports, the C6 is the unambiguous default. The Father's Day promotion bringing it to $1,799 expected to launch the first week of June at Best Buy and Amazon.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F at $2,599 wins the bright-room household
highlights.body: QD-OLED brightness exceeds the LG C6 in bright-room performance. For households with significant ambient light during prime viewing hours, the S95F is the rational pick over the C6. The post-Memorial Day pricing held flat through Saturday with no Father's Day discount appearing imminent.

For households where the TV is primarily for serious film viewing rather than sports or casual streaming, BRAVIA 8 II is the rational pick over the LG C6 or Samsung S95F.

LG G6 OLED 守第四 USD$2,799（NT$92,400）絕對高階 OLED 組，亮度天花板是 C6 比不上的。Sony BRAVIA 9 守第五 USD$2,999（NT$98,900），mini-LED 亮度在亮房間表現超過 OLED，沒承諾 OLED 的家庭適用。星期六父親節禮物訂單這週把 LG C6 65 吋拉進購物車最猛，Best Buy 父親節電視特賣 6/7 那週擴大會加速採購。6/14 地面運送父親節到貨截止是操作期限。

references.title: Best OLED TVs in 2026 tested: top picks from LG, Samsung and more
Best cheap OLED TV deals for May 2026
Best TVs of 2026, Tested by Our Experts

en.commentary:
Sunday May 31, the LG C6 OLED holds the top position and the case for it this weekend is stronger than usual. The LG C6 brings the Alpha 11 Gen 3 processor with noticeably improved upscaling and shading subtlety over the C5, and the panel's peak brightness increase over the C5 makes HDR content more convincing across all typical room lighting conditions. Four HDMI 2.1 ports at full 48Gbps, 144Hz gaming support, and Dolby Vision Gaming make it the OLED that works as well for next-generation console gaming as for film.

May 2026 is an unusually good time to buy OLED TVs. Best Buy's post-Memorial Day clearance has the 65-inch LG C5 at $1,300 off, and OLED TVs are available from $649 at Best Buy for the 48-inch LG B5. The LG C6 at its current price represents a meaningful upgrade over the C5 given the Alpha 11 Gen 3 processor improvement, and Father's Day on June 21 is driving TV category traffic heavily this week.

Samsung S95F holds second at $2,299 for the 65-inch. The QD-OLED panel delivers the best brightness of any OLED TV tested, and four full-speed HDMI 2.1 inputs make it the gaming TV pick for multi-platform households. The color volume on QD-OLED creates a punchy, saturated presentation that film enthusiasts and gamers both respond to.

Sony Bravia 8 II holds third with Sony's XR Cognitive Processor delivering the most perceptually accurate motion handling in the group. For movie-first households, Sony's picture processing philosophy produces the most film-like output. TCL QM8K holds seventh and Hisense U8N holds eighth as the value OLED alternatives.

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED is the best all-around 4K TV and the Father's Day premium choice
highlights.body: Alpha 11 Gen 3 processor, four HDMI 2.1 ports, 144Hz gaming, and Dolby Vision Gaming in one package. May OLED deals and Father's Day traffic make this the right recommendation right now. Best Buy clearance on the C5 also makes the step up to C6 pricing easier to justify.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F at $2,299 is the gaming and brightness champion
highlights.body: QD-OLED's best brightness of any OLED tested, plus four full-speed HDMI 2.1 inputs for multi-platform gaming households. The punchy, saturated color volume works equally well for cinematic content and competitive gaming.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II delivers the best motion for movie-first households
highlights.body: The XR Cognitive Processor's perceptually accurate motion handling produces the most film-like output of any TV in this group. For households where cinema is the primary use case and gaming is secondary, Sony Bravia 8 II is the correct recommendation.

zh-tw.commentary:
5/31 星期日 LG C6 OLED 守住 4K 電視第一，這個週末支持它的理由比平常更強。LG C6 搭載 Alpha 11 Gen 3 處理器，升頻跟陰影細膩度比 C5 有感提升，面板峰值亮度的增加讓所有日常室內照明條件下的 HDR 內容更有說服力。四個全速 48Gbps HDMI 2.1、144Hz 電競支援跟 Dolby Vision Gaming 讓它在次世代主機電競跟電影都能勝任。

2026 年 5 月是買 OLED 電視的難得時機。Best Buy 國殤日後出清讓 65 吋 LG C5 降價 NT$43,290，48 吋 LG B5 最低 USD$649（約 NT$21,590）。LG C6 目前價格對比 Alpha 11 Gen 3 的升級有意義，父親節 6/21 這週電視類別流量明顯上升。

Samsung S95F 守第二 65 吋 USD$2,299（約 NT$76,490）。QD-OLED 面板是所有測試過 OLED 電視裡亮度最高的，四個全速 HDMI 2.1 讓它是多平台電競家庭的選擇。QD-OLED 的色彩飽和度創造出電影迷跟玩家都喜歡的飽滿呈現。Sony Bravia 8 II 守第三，XR Cognitive Processor 提供這個榜單裡感知最精準的動態處理。以電影為主的家庭，Sony 的影像處理哲學輸出最接近電影質感。TCL QM8K 守第七，Hisense U8N 守第八是 CP 值替代方案。

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED，最均衡的 4K 電視，父親節高端禮物首選
highlights.body: Alpha 11 Gen 3、四個 HDMI 2.1、144Hz 電競、Dolby Vision Gaming 全包一台。5 月 OLED 優惠加父親節需求讓現在是正確的下手時機，Best Buy 的 C5 出清也讓升級 C6 的心理門檻降低。

highlights.body: QD-OLED 測試過最亮的 OLED 面板，四個全速 HDMI 2.1 適合多平台電競家庭。飽滿的色彩飽和度電影跟競技遊戲都好看。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II，電影優先家庭的最佳動態處理
highlights.body: XR Cognitive Processor 感知精準的動態處理輸出最接近電影質感。電影是主要使用場景、電競是次要的家庭，Sony Bravia 8 II 是正確推薦。

references.title: The 6 Best TVs of 2026
Best OLED TVs in 2026 tested: Our top picks from LG, Samsung and more
Samsung S95H QD-OLED TV Review - Not Just a Pretty Frame

en.commentary: I keep the LG C6 at the top this week, and the newest market move only reinforces that call. Samsung shipped the S95H in April with a QD-OLED panel rated around 2,700 nits in a 10 percent window, up from roughly 2,000 nits on the S95F, yet it arrived at a higher price and the gains do not translate into a meaningfully better picture in a normal living room. That is exactly why I still steer people to the S95F at rank two and keep the C6 in front. The C6 runs LG's Alpha 11 Gen 3 processor on the proven OLED EX panel, and the upscaling, shadow detail, and overall richness now justify its position over the brighter Samsung sets. The S95F remains the most complete TV you can actually buy, with elite gaming, the cleanest motion, and QD-OLED color, and at its current street price it is the smarter purchase than the S95H. Sony's Bravia 8 II holds third on the strength of its tone mapping and built-in audio, which still beat almost everything in this group for movie nights. Further down, the value tier is doing real work. The TCL QM8K and Hisense U8N deliver mini-LED brightness that embarrasses their price tags, and I would happily put either in a bright room where OLED struggles. My buying advice this week is simple. Buy the C6 if you want the best overall package, grab the S95F if you want maximum punch and gaming features, and skip the S95H until its price drops to where the small brightness bump makes sense. Panel prices are climbing across the board because of memory and component costs, so locking in a current-generation OLED now looks smart.

highlights.title: S95H launches but does not unseat the S95F
highlights.body: Samsung's April S95H pushes peak brightness to about 2,700 nits in a 10 percent window, but the higher price means the S95F stays the better buy and keeps rank two.

highlights.title: LG C6 earns the crown
highlights.body: The Alpha 11 Gen 3 processor on the OLED EX panel sharpens upscaling and shadow detail, giving the C6 the most balanced performance for the money.

highlights.title: Bravia 8 II owns movie night
highlights.body: Sony's tone mapping and acoustic surface audio still set the bar for cinematic accuracy, holding third in a crowded OLED field.

highlights.title: Value mini-LEDs punch up
highlights.body: The TCL QM8K and Hisense U8N bring brightness that suits sunlit rooms, making them my picks when budget and ambient light are the priority.

highlights.title: Lock in OLED before prices climb
highlights.body: Memory and component costs are pushing panel prices up, so a current-gen OLED bought today looks like the value play.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我還是把 LG C6 放在第一，而且最新的市場動態反而更證明這個判斷沒錯。Samsung 四月推出 S95H，QD-OLED 面板在 10% 視窗的峰值亮度衝到大約 2,700 nits，比 S95F 的大約 2,000 nits 高，但價格也跟著上去，實際擺在客廳看，那點亮度差幾乎感受不出來。講白了，這就是我繼續推 S95F 排第二、把 C6 放最前面的原因。C6 用 LG 的 Alpha 11 Gen 3 處理器搭配成熟的 OLED EX 面板，升頻、暗部細節跟整體層次都明顯進步，坐穩龍頭位置我覺得很合理。S95F 還是目前你真的買得到最全面的電視，遊戲體驗頂、動態最乾淨、QD-OLED 發色漂亮，以現在的通路價來看，它比 S95H 划算太多。Sony Bravia 8 II 守住第三，靠的是色調對應跟內建音效，在這群裡看電影的調性還是最舒服。往下看，性價比這一段很有戲。TCL QM8K 跟 Hisense U8N 的 mini-LED 亮度，以那個價位來說根本佛心，家裡採光好、開窗會反光的客廳，我會直接推這兩台。這週的建議很單純，想要最全面就買 C6，想要最猛跟最強遊戲功能就上 S95F，S95H 先觀望，等降到那點亮度加成划算再說。現在面板因為記憶體跟零件成本一路漲，趁這代 OLED 還在合理價先入手，我覺得是聰明做法。台灣這邊 C6 65 吋大概落在 NT$60,000 上下，會是甜蜜點。

highlights.title: S95H 上市但動不了 S95F
highlights.body: Samsung 四月的 S95H 把峰值亮度推到約 2,700 nits，但價格更高，S95F 依然是比較划算的選擇，穩坐第二。

highlights.title: LG C6 拿下第一
highlights.body: Alpha 11 Gen 3 處理器搭 OLED EX 面板，升頻跟暗部細節都更銳利，C6 在同價位給出最均衡的表現。

highlights.title: Bravia 8 II 是看電影神器
highlights.body: Sony 的色調對應跟聲學表面音效還是標竿，在這群 OLED 裡看片調性最對味，守住第三。

highlights.title: 性價比 mini-LED 很猛
highlights.body: TCL QM8K 跟 Hisense U8N 亮度夠強，採光好的客廳我會直接推，預算有限又怕反光就選這兩台。

highlights.title: 趁漲價前先卡位 OLED
highlights.body: 記憶體跟零件成本把面板價格往上推，現在入手這代 OLED 反而是划算的時間點。

references.title: The 6 Best TVs of 2026
Best OLED TVs in 2026 tested: Our top picks from LG, Samsung and more

en.commentary:
The 2026 TV order at the top is settled, and the LG C6 OLED keeps rank 1 because it delivers the most TV for the money of any panel I have tested this year. What Hi-Fi calls it the pick of the latest 65-inch crop, and the reason is its new Alpha 11 Gen 3 processor, which sharpens tone mapping, color management, and upscaling over the C5. PC gamers now get 4K at 165Hz, up from 144Hz, and crucially the C6 launched cheaper than its predecessor. That combination of better picture and lower price is why it beats more expensive flagships on overall value.

The Samsung S95F at rank 2 remains the outright image-quality champion. RTINGS still rates the S95F as the best TV available, and notably recommends it over the newer S95H because the newer model's gains do not justify the price jump. That is good news for buyers right now: the S95F is the QD-OLED to get, and as the S95H ships the S95F should see better pricing. Its 9.5 panel and 9.5 gaming scores back up the reputation.

The Sony Bravia 8 II at rank 3 is the pick for film purists who want Sony's processing and tone accuracy. The LG G6 at rank 4 is the wall-mount, brightness-first OLED for bright rooms, and the Sony Bravia 9 at rank 5 anchors the premium mini-LED tier for those who want OLED-rivaling contrast with higher peak brightness.

My practical advice: the C6 is the smart-money OLED, the S95F is the no-compromise image champion, and with the S95H now on shelves, this is a strong window to find last-generation flagships discounted while the rankings stay stable.

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED Is the Smart-Money Pick at Rank 1
highlights.body: The new Alpha 11 Gen 3 processor sharpens tone mapping, color, and upscaling over the C5, and PC gamers get 4K at 165Hz. Critically, the C6 launched cheaper than its predecessor, making it the best picture-per-dollar OLED of 2026 and the reason it tops more expensive flagships.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F Remains the Image-Quality Champion
highlights.body: RTINGS still rates the S95F as the best TV available and recommends it over the newer S95H, whose gains do not justify the price. With 9.5 panel and 9.5 gaming scores, it is the QD-OLED to buy, and S95H availability should improve S95F pricing.

highlights.title: New Flagships Mean Discounts on Proven Models
highlights.body: With Samsung's S95H now shipping after its April reveal, last-generation flagships like the S95F and C-series OLEDs become more attractively priced. The ranking order stays stable, so buyers can chase deals on top-rated 2025-2026 panels without giving up performance.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年電視榜單頂端的順序已經底定，LG C6 OLED 守住第一名，因為它是我今年測過 CP 值最高的面板。What Hi-Fi 直接稱它是最新一批 65 吋機種裡的首選，理由就是新的 Alpha 11 Gen 3 處理器，色調映射、色彩管理、升頻都比 C5 更精準。PC 玩家現在能跑 4K 165Hz，從原本的 144Hz 升上來，而且更關鍵的是 C6 上市價比前代還便宜。畫質更好、價格更低，這就是它能打贏更貴旗艦的原因。

第二名的 Samsung S95F 仍然是純畫質之王。RTINGS 至今還是把 S95F 評為市面上最好的電視，而且特別建議買 S95F 而不是更新的 S95H，因為新機的提升撐不起那個價差。這對現在想買的人是好消息：S95F 就是該入手的 QD-OLED，而隨著 S95H 上市，S95F 的價格應該會更漂亮。9.5 的面板分和 9.5 的遊戲分撐得起它的名聲。

第三名的 Sony Bravia 8 II 是電影派的首選，要的是 Sony 的影像處理和色調準度。第四名的 LG G6 是主打亮度的壁掛 OLED，適合明亮的客廳；第五名的 Sony Bravia 9 則坐穩高階 mini-LED 這塊，要對比逼近 OLED 又要更高峰值亮度的人選它。

我的實用建議：C6 是精打細算的 OLED 之選，S95F 是不妥協的畫質王者，而隨著 S95H 上架，現在正是撿上一代旗艦折扣的好時機，榜單順序又很穩定。

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED 精打細算首選，穩坐第一
highlights.body: 全新 Alpha 11 Gen 3 處理器在色調映射、色彩、升頻上全面勝過 C5，PC 玩家還能跑 4K 165Hz。更關鍵的是 C6 上市價比前代便宜，是 2026 年單位畫質最划算的 OLED，這就是它壓過更貴旗艦的原因。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 仍是純畫質之王
highlights.body: RTINGS 至今把 S95F 評為市面最佳電視，並建議買它而非更新的 S95H，因為新機提升撐不起價差。9.5 面板分加 9.5 遊戲分，這就是該買的 QD-OLED，而 S95H 上市後 S95F 價格應該更甜。

highlights.title: 新旗艦上市，等於舊王降價
highlights.body: Samsung S95H 在四月發表後現已出貨，S95F 和 C 系列 OLED 這類上一代旗艦的價格會更有吸引力。榜單順序維持穩定，想撿便宜的人可以追頂級 2025-2026 面板的折扣，又不必犧牲表現。

references.title: Best OLED TVs in 2026 tested: Our top picks from LG, Samsung and more
The 3 Best OLED TVs of 2026
Best TVs of 2026, Tested by Our Experts

en.commentary: The LG C6 OLED holds my top spot this week and the reasoning hasn't changed. It pairs a genuinely bright next-gen panel with the most complete gaming feature set on the market, four HDMI 2.1 ports, low input lag, and proper Dolby Vision support. If you want one TV that does movies, sports, and a PS5 equally well, this is it. What's worth flagging this week is pricing dynamics. The C6 still sits near three thousand dollars while the previous-generation C5 is selling for roughly half that, and for a lot of buyers the C5 is the smarter purchase right now. The picture quality gap is real but narrow, and the savings are not. The Samsung S95F stays at number two on the strength of its quantum-dot color volume and class-leading brightness, which makes it my pick for a bright living room with big windows. The tradeoff remains its lack of Dolby Vision, so if your library leans heavily on Dolby Vision content the LG is the safer bet. Samsung announced the S95H in April but the early read is that the performance gains are minor, so I'd stick with the S95F until prices settle. For value shoppers the mid-tier sets continue to deliver most of the experience for far less money, and with retailers clearing out 2025 inventory at the lowest prices I've seen, this is a good window to buy a step-down model. I'm keeping the full board unchanged today because nothing this week shifts the order.

highlights.title: LG C6 is still the all-rounder to beat
highlights.body: The C6 earns its number one spot by doing everything well at once. A bright next-gen OLED panel, four HDMI 2.1 ports, low input lag, and full Dolby Vision support mean it handles films, live sport, and console gaming without compromise. The only real catch is the near three thousand dollar price, which is why the cheaper C5 deserves a hard look.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F owns the bright room
highlights.body: Quantum-dot color volume and the highest brightness in this group make the S95F the one to buy if your room is full of windows. It pushes highlights harder than any OLED here. The missing Dolby Vision support is the one asterisk, so weigh that against how much of your content uses it.

highlights.title: 2025 clearance makes this a buyer's window
highlights.body: Retailers are dumping leftover 2025 sets at their lowest prices ever to clear room for new models. For anyone who doesn't need the absolute latest panel, a step-down or previous-generation set delivers most of the experience for meaningfully less, and the savings right now are unusually steep.

zh-tw.commentary: LG C6 OLED 這禮拜還是穩坐我心中第一。它把夠亮的新世代面板跟市面上最完整的遊戲機能綁在一起，四個 HDMI 2.1、低延遲、又有完整 Dolby Vision，想用一台電視同時搞定電影、運動轉播跟 PS5，就是它了。不過老實說，這週最該提醒的是價錢。C6 還卡在台幣九萬上下，上一代的 C5 卻只要差不多一半，對很多人來說現在買 C5 反而比較精明。畫質確實有差，但差距不大，省下的錢可是實打實的。Samsung S95F 維持第二，靠的是量子點的色彩量跟同級最高的亮度，客廳採光好、窗戶又多的人我會直接推這台。要注意它沒有 Dolby Vision，片源如果大量是 Dolby Vision 內容，那 LG 還是穩一點。Samsung 四月發表了 S95H，但目前看來效能進步有限，我會建議先等 S95F 價格落下來再說。預算取向的話，中階機種還是用少很多的錢給你大部分體驗，加上現在通路在清 2025 年的庫存，價格是我看過最甜的，想買降階機正是好時機。今天整個榜單我不動，因為這禮拜沒有事件值得改順序。

highlights.title: LG C6 還是最難打的全能王
highlights.body: C6 拿第一是因為它什麼都做得好。夠亮的新世代 OLED 面板、四個 HDMI 2.1、低輸入延遲再加完整 Dolby Vision，電影、運動轉播、主機遊戲全都不打折。唯一的坎就是接近台幣九萬的價格，所以更便宜的 C5 真的值得認真考慮。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 是亮房間首選
highlights.body: 量子點色彩量加上這群裡最高的亮度，讓 S95F 成為採光好房間的最佳解。它把高光推得比這裡任何一台 OLED 都猛。少了 Dolby Vision 是唯一的星號，看你片源用到多少再決定。

highlights.title: 2025 清庫存是進場好時機
highlights.body: 通路正在用史上最低價出清 2025 年的舊機，好挪空間給新款。不需要最新面板的人，買降階或上一代機種就能拿到大部分體驗，而且現在省下來的幅度大得不太尋常。

references.title: 'Easily one of 2026's best OLED TVs': I tested the LG C6
