en.commentary: As of June 2026 I am keeping the LG C6 OLED at number one, and the recent reviews reinforce why. TechRadar called it easily one of 2026's best OLED TVs, praising punchy, natural color, superb contrast with deep blacks and refined shadow detail, all driven by the new Alpha 11 AI Gen 3 processor with 13-bit image processing and an upgraded Brightness Booster. The one honest caveat reviewers raise is value: at launch the C6 runs near three thousand dollars while last year's C5 sits at roughly half that, so the smart shopper waits for the C6 to settle. I am still ranking it on picture quality, where it sets the bar, and that is why it leads. Samsung's S95F holds second as the brightest OLED in the group and the gamer's QD-OLED, with Sony's Bravia 8 II third for its reference-grade processing and the best built-in audio up top. LG's G6 and Sony's Bravia 9 cover the premium wall-mount and mini-LED brightness lanes. Down the value end, TCL's QM8K and QM9K plus Hisense's U8N keep delivering enormous brightness per dollar, which is why they stay firmly on the board. With the 2026 OLED class now fully reviewed and the order matching the verdicts, I am carrying it forward unchanged.

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED stays #1
highlights.body: Alpha 11 AI Gen 3 with 13-bit processing delivers punchy color, deep blacks and refined shadows, the picture-quality bar of 2026.

highlights.title: The honest caveat is price
highlights.body: At launch the C6 runs near $3,000 versus roughly half for last year's C5, so patient buyers wait for it to settle.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F is the gamer's QD-OLED
highlights.body: Brightest OLED in the group keeps it locked at second.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II for processing and sound
highlights.body: Reference-grade upscaling and the best built-in audio up top hold it at third.

highlights.title: TCL and Hisense own value
highlights.body: QM8K, QM9K and U8N keep delivering huge brightness per dollar to anchor the list.

zh-tw.commentary: 到 2026 年 6 月，我還是把 LG C6 OLED 放在第一，最近的評測也讓我更確定。TechRadar 直接說它輕鬆躋身 2026 最佳 OLED 之列，誇它色彩鮮明自然、對比極好、黑得夠深、暗部細節細膩，全靠新的 Alpha 11 AI Gen 3 處理器，搭配 13-bit 影像處理跟升級的亮度增強。評測唯一誠實點出的缺點是價格，剛上市的 C6 要將近台幣九萬，而去年的 C5 大概只要一半，所以聰明的買家會等 C6 價格落下來。但我是看畫質排名，這方面它就是標竿，所以它領先。Samsung S95F 守第二，是全場最亮的 OLED，也是電競玩家的 QD-OLED 之選。Sony Bravia 8 II 第三，靠的是參考級影像處理跟頂規內建音效。LG G6 跟 Sony Bravia 9 顧住高階壁掛跟 mini-LED 亮度路線。價格端，TCL QM8K、QM9K 加 Hisense U8N 每塊錢買到的亮度依舊驚人，所以穩穩留在榜上。2026 這批 OLED 現在都評測完了，排序也跟結論一致，所以我名次照舊往前帶。

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED 穩坐第一
highlights.body: Alpha 11 AI Gen 3 加 13-bit 處理，色彩鮮明、黑得夠深、暗部細膩，是 2026 畫質標竿。

highlights.title: 誠實的缺點是價格
highlights.body: 剛上市的 C6 要近台幣九萬，去年 C5 約一半，耐心的買家會等它降價。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 是電競 QD-OLED
highlights.body: 全場最亮的 OLED，鎖在第二。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II 主打處理與音效
highlights.body: 參考級升頻加頂規內建音效，守住第三。

highlights.title: TCL 跟 Hisense 主打性價比
highlights.body: QM8K、QM9K 跟 U8N 每塊錢買到的亮度驚人，穩住榜位。

en.commentary: For 4K TVs in June 2026 I keep the LG C6 OLED at number one, and the latest reviews make the case for me. What Hi-Fi calls it the pick of the latest 65-inch sets and a genuine revelation by C-series standards, better than its excellent predecessor and cheaper at launch. The new Alpha 11 Gen 3 processor sharpens tone and color management, brightness control and upscaling, and with four full HDMI 2.1 ports plus a gorgeous WOLED panel it is the all-round set I recommend to the most people. That balance of picture, gaming and value is why it leads. The Samsung S95F QD-OLED holds second as the brightness champion, frequently rated the single best-measuring OLED tested, the pick for a bright room and gamers who want four full-speed HDMI 2.1 inputs. Its trade-offs, no Dolby Vision and aggressive processing, are exactly why it sits behind the more universally agreeable C6. The Sony Bravia 8 II stays third as the picture-purist's choice, 25 percent brighter than the A95L it replaces with the most natural color and motion handling Sony offers. LG G6 OLED holds fourth on peak brightness, with the Bravia 9, Samsung QN90F, TCL QM8K, Hisense U8N, Samsung S85F, Hisense U7N and TCL QM9K carrying forward. No launch this week moved the order, so I held ranks.

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED is the best all-rounder
highlights.body: Reviewers call it the pick of the latest 65-inch sets, better than its predecessor and cheaper at launch. The Alpha 11 Gen 3 processor, four HDMI 2.1 ports and a superb WOLED panel make it the set I recommend most, holding number one.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F is the brightness champion
highlights.body: Often rated the best-measuring OLED tested, with four full-speed HDMI 2.1 inputs for gamers and a bright room. Its lack of Dolby Vision and aggressive processing keep it a close, deserved second behind the C6.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II is the purist's pick
highlights.body: It is 25 percent brighter than the A95L it replaces, with the most natural color and motion Sony offers. For viewers who want filmmaker-accurate images over peak punch, it holds a confident third.

highlights.title: LG G6 OLED leads on peak brightness
highlights.body: Its gallery-design panel pushes higher brightness than the C6 for bright-room HDR. For buyers who prioritize peak luminance and a wall-flush mount, it stays a strong fourth.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 年 6 月講 4K 電視，我把 LG C6 OLED 放第一，最新的評測幫我把話講完了。What Hi-Fi 說它是最新一批 65 吋裡的首選，以 C 系列的標準來看是真正的驚喜，比上一代那台已經很強的還要好，上市價還更便宜。新的 Alpha 11 Gen 3 處理器把色調與色彩管理、亮度控制、升頻都磨得更利，加上四個完整 HDMI 2.1 跟一面漂亮的 WOLED 面板，它就是我會推薦給最多人的全能機。畫質、電競、性價比這個平衡，就是它領先的原因。Samsung S95F QD-OLED 守第二，是亮度冠軍，常被評為實測表現最好的單一 OLED，亮房間跟想要四個全速 HDMI 2.1 的玩家就選它。它的取捨，沒有 Dolby Vision、處理偏激進，正是它排在更討喜的 C6 之後的原因。Sony Bravia 8 II 守第三，是畫質純粹派的選擇，比它取代的 A95L 亮了 25 趴，色彩跟動態是 Sony 最自然的調校。LG G6 OLED 守第四，靠峰值亮度，後面的 Bravia 9、Samsung QN90F、TCL QM8K、Hisense U8N、Samsung S85F、Hisense U7N、TCL QM9K 全部照舊。這週沒新品動排名，所以我守住。

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED 是最佳全能
highlights.body: 評測說它是最新 65 吋的首選，比上一代更好、上市價更便宜。Alpha 11 Gen 3 處理器、四個 HDMI 2.1、出色的 WOLED 面板，讓它是我推薦給最多人的機種，守住第一。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 是亮度冠軍
highlights.body: 常被評為實測最好的 OLED，四個全速 HDMI 2.1 給玩家跟亮房間用。少了 Dolby Vision、處理偏激進，讓它在更討喜的 C6 之後拿下實至名歸的第二。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II 是純粹派之選
highlights.body: 比它取代的 A95L 亮了 25 趴，色彩跟動態是 Sony 最自然的調校。想要貼近導演原意的畫面勝過峰值衝擊力的人，它穩坐第三。

highlights.title: LG G6 OLED 峰值亮度領先

en.commentary: The LG C6 OLED stays at number one because it is the TV I recommend to the most people without a second thought. It brings brighter, richer, more refined picture than the already-excellent C5, the gaming features are complete with four HDMI 2.1 ports, and LG prices it where a normal household can reach a flagship-tier panel. For the vast majority of buyers this is the sweet spot of the entire market. The Samsung S95F holds second as the best-performing OLED RTINGS tested, the QD-OLED panel goes brighter than LG's and the all-round image quality is genuinely reference-grade, the pick for people who want the absolute best and will pay for it. The Sony Bravia 8 II stays third on Sony's processing, which still pulls the most natural, three-dimensional image of the group, the choice for film purists. The LG G6 holds fourth as the wall-mount flagship. Nothing this week reordered the field. The read: best value-to-quality is the C6, outright best picture is the S95F, most cinematic is Sony. OLED won, and the only question is how much brightness you are paying for.

highlights.title: LG C6 is the sweet spot of the market
highlights.body: Brighter and more refined than the excellent C5, complete with four HDMI 2.1 ports, priced where a normal household reaches a flagship panel. For the most buyers it is the easy recommendation at number one.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F is the outright best picture
highlights.body: Its QD-OLED panel goes brighter than LG's with reference-grade all-round quality. For people who want the absolute best image and will pay for it, it is the clear second.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II is the cinematic pick
highlights.body: Sony's processing still pulls the most natural, three-dimensional image of the group. For film purists who value lifelike rendering over peak brightness, it holds a firm third.

highlights.title: OLED won, brightness is the variable
highlights.body: Every top pick is OLED now; the difference is how much peak brightness you pay for. Decide whether a bright room demands the S95F or a controlled room lets the C6 shine, then buy accordingly.

zh-tw.commentary: LG C6 OLED 我還是放第一，因為它是我會二話不說推薦給最多人的電視。它的畫面比本來就很優秀的 C5 更亮、更濃、更精緻，遊戲功能完整、四個 HDMI 2.1，LG 又把價格訂在一般家庭搆得到旗艦級面板的位置。對絕大多數買家，這就是整個市場的甜蜜點。Samsung S95F 守第二，是 RTINGS 測過表現最佳的 OLED，QD-OLED 面板比 LG 更亮，整體畫質真的是參考級，給想要絕對最好、又願意付錢的人。Sony Bravia 8 II 守第三，靠 Sony 的處理，依然拉出這群裡最自然、最立體的畫面，是電影純粹派的選擇。LG G6 守第四，是壁掛旗艦。這週沒事件重排。判斷：性價比畫質選 C6、純粹最佳畫面選 S95F、最電影感選 Sony。OLED 贏了，唯一的問題是你為多少亮度付錢。

highlights.title: LG C6 是市場的甜蜜點
highlights.body: 比優秀的 C5 更亮更精緻、四個 HDMI 2.1 完整，價格訂在一般家庭搆得到旗艦面板的位置。對最多買家它是第一名的好推薦。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 是純粹最佳畫面
highlights.body: QD-OLED 面板比 LG 更亮，整體畫質參考級。想要絕對最好的畫面又願意付錢的人，它是明確第二。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II 是電影感選擇
highlights.body: Sony 的處理依然拉出這群裡最自然最立體的畫面。重視擬真勝過峰值亮度的電影純粹派，它穩在第三。

highlights.title: OLED 贏了，亮度是變數
highlights.body: 現在每個首選都是 OLED，差別是你為多少峰值亮度付錢。亮房間要 S95F、可控光房間 C6 就夠亮，照這個決定買哪台。

en.commentary:
The LG C6 OLED holds first, and the latest 2026 round-ups confirm why it stays the pick for most buyers: it takes the best-balanced OLED in the category and refines it. Four HDMI 2.1 ports, 4K at up to 165Hz, Dolby Vision gaming, and the full spread of VRR formats make it the most complete gaming TV at a price that undercuts every flagship above it. The C6's performance jump over the C5 is modest, mostly a better remote and a small brightness gain, but the C5 already set the bar for mid-range greatness and the C6 inherits it.

The Samsung S95F holds second and remains the brightness champion among OLEDs. RTINGS still rates it the best TV on the market on raw panel performance, and its QD-OLED stack with the glare-free matte finish is the one to buy for a bright living room. The catch is price: at $2,499 for the 55-inch it asks a real premium over the C6 for gains most rooms will not notice. The Sony Bravia 8 II holds third as the cinephile's OLED, the set I point movie-first buyers to for its processing and built-in audio.

The LG G6 holds fourth as the wall-mount flagship with the brighter four-stack panel, and the Sony Bravia 9 stays fifth as the Mini LED brightness king for sports and daytime sports rooms. Samsung QN90F, TCL QM8K, and Hisense U8N hold the mid-range, where TCL and Hisense deliver most of the flagship experience at half the money. The TCL QM9K at eleventh remains the brightness-per-dollar outlier, a Mini LED that hits 9.7 on brightness for far less than the OLEDs above it. The order is unchanged this week. The story is still OLED at the top for picture purists, Mini LED for anyone who values brightness and value over perfect blacks.

highlights.title: The LG C6 is the most complete TV for most buyers in 2026
highlights.body: Four HDMI 2.1 ports, 4K up to 165Hz, Dolby Vision gaming, and every VRR format make the C6 the best gaming TV you can buy without paying flagship money. The jump over the C5 is modest, a better remote and a small brightness bump, but the C5 already owned the mid-range crown and the C6 keeps it. For the buyer who wants one TV that does movies, sports, and gaming without compromise, this is it.

highlights.title: The Samsung S95F is the OLED to buy for a bright room
highlights.body: RTINGS still rates the S95F the best TV on the market on raw panel performance, and its QD-OLED stack with the glare-free matte coating is the answer for a living room full of windows. At $2,499 for the 55-inch it asks a real premium over the C6, and most rooms will not see the difference, but for the buyer who fights glare all day this is the set that beats it.

highlights.title: The Sony Bravia 8 II is the cinephile's OLED
highlights.body: Sony's processing remains the best in the business for film, and the Bravia 8 II pairs it with built-in audio that actually fills a room without a soundbar. For the movie-first buyer who watches more than they game, this is the OLED I point them to over the brighter, gamier sets above it.

highlights.title: The TCL QM9K delivers the most brightness per dollar
highlights.body: The QM9K hits a 9.7 on brightness, matching or beating the flagship OLEDs, for a fraction of their price. It is the Mini LED outlier for the buyer who watches sports in a sunlit room and refuses to pay OLED money. The blacks are not as perfect, but in a bright room nobody is looking at black levels, they are looking at a punchy, sunlight-proof picture.

zh-tw.commentary:
LG C6 OLED 守第一，2026 最新的評測整理也說明了它為什麼還是多數買家的首選，它把這個品類最均衡的 OLED 再打磨一輪。四個 HDMI 2.1、4K 最高 165Hz、Dolby Vision 遊戲、完整的 VRR 格式，讓它成為這個價位最完整的遊戲電視，而且價格還壓在上面所有旗艦之下。C6 比 C5 的進步幅度不大，主要是遙控器變好加一點點亮度，但 C5 本來就把中階標準訂得很高，C6 直接繼承。

Samsung S95F 守第二，還是 OLED 裡的亮度王。RTINGS 還是把它評為市面上面板性能最強的電視，QD-OLED 加上無反光霧面處理，亮的客廳就買這台。問題是價格，55 吋約台幣七萬五，比 C6 貴一截，換來的提升多數客廳看不太出來。Sony Bravia 8 II 守第三，是電影派的 OLED，看片優先的人我都推這台，影像處理跟內建音效都到位。

LG G6 守第四，是壁掛旗艦，用更亮的四層堆疊面板。Sony Bravia 9 守第五，是 Mini LED 亮度王，看運動跟白天的客廳適合。Samsung QN90F、TCL QM8K、Hisense U8N 守中階，TCL 跟 Hisense 用一半的錢給你大部分旗艦體驗。TCL QM9K 排第十一，還是每塊錢買到最多亮度的異數，Mini LED 亮度衝到 9.7，價格遠低於上面的 OLED。這禮拜排序沒動。故事還是一樣，畫質純粹派選頂端的 OLED，重視亮度跟 CP 值勝過完美黑位的人選 Mini LED。

highlights.title: LG C6 是 2026 多數買家最完整的電視
highlights.body: 四個 HDMI 2.1、4K 最高 165Hz、Dolby Vision 遊戲、全套 VRR 格式，讓 C6 成為不用花旗艦錢就能買到的最佳遊戲電視。比 C5 進步不大，遙控器變好加一點亮度，但 C5 本來就拿下中階王座，C6 守住。想要一台看片、看運動、打遊戲都不妥協的，就是它。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 是亮房間要買的 OLED
highlights.body: RTINGS 還是把 S95F 評為市面上面板性能最強，QD-OLED 加無反光霧面塗層，整面窗的客廳就靠它。55 吋約台幣七萬五，比 C6 貴一截，多數房間看不出差別，但整天跟反光對抗的買家，這台能贏。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II 是電影派的 OLED
highlights.body: Sony 的影像處理還是看片業界第一，Bravia 8 II 配上不用 soundbar 就能填滿房間的內建音效。看片多過打遊戲的買家，我推這台勝過上面更亮更偏遊戲的機種。

highlights.title: TCL QM9K 每塊錢買到最多亮度
highlights.body: QM9K 亮度衝到 9.7，追上甚至超過旗艦 OLED，價格只要它們的一小部分。看運動又在陽光客廳、不想花 OLED 錢的買家就選這台 Mini LED 異數。黑位沒那麼完美，但亮房間沒人在看黑位，大家看的是夠衝、不怕陽光的畫面。

en.commentary: The 2026 sets are fully rolled out now and my order stands. The LG C6 keeps the crown because it is the rare panel that does everything well, vivid high-contrast film, deep shadow detail in dark shows, console gaming with four HDMI 2.1 ports, and live sports, all at a price that undercuts the step-up models. The Samsung S95F holds second on sheer brightness and its glare-free coating, which is still the best matte finish I have seen on an OLED. Sony’s Bravia 8 II stays third for processing and motion that videophiles will notice on film. The big structural story this year is RGB Mini LED moving from concept to shipping product, and that is why the TCL QM9K sits where it does in the LCD tier with peak brightness that embarrasses most OLEDs in a bright room. Hisense U8N and U7N remain the value plays for people who watch in daylight and care more about punch than perfect blacks. Nothing released this week shifts the hierarchy, so I am carrying ranks and scores forward unchanged. If you want the safest all-rounder, buy the C6. If your room is bright and you want the most light for the money, the QM9K and U8N are where I would look.

highlights.title: LG C6 is the all-rounder to buy
highlights.body: It handles vivid film, dark-show shadow detail, four-port HDMI 2.1 gaming, and live sports without a weak spot, and it undercuts the G-series on price. That breadth is why it stays my number one.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F wins the bright room among OLEDs
highlights.body: Its matte glare-free coating is the best I have used and its peak brightness leads the OLED field, which makes it the OLED I recommend for daylight viewing.

highlights.title: RGB Mini LED is the real 2026 story
highlights.body: The TCL QM9K shows where LCD is going, with peak brightness that outguns most OLEDs in a bright room. For sunlit spaces it is a smarter buy than a mid OLED.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 的機型現在全部上市了，我的排序維持不變。LG C6 守住冠軍，因為它就是那種樣樣都行的面板，鮮豔高對比電影、暗場戲的陰影細節、四個 HDMI 2.1 接口打電動、看球賽，全都到位，而且價格還比更高階的型號便宜。Samsung S95F 靠純亮度跟抗反光鍍膜守住第二，那層霧面塗層是我看過 OLED 上最好的。Sony Bravia 8 II 排第三，影像處理跟動態表現玩家看電影時感受得到。今年最大的結構性變化是 RGB Mini LED 從概念變成實際出貨產品，這也是 TCL QM9K 在 LCD 陣營排到這個位置的原因，亮環境下的峰值亮度讓多數 OLED 汗顏。Hisense U8N 跟 U7N 仍是白天看電視、重視亮度勝過完美黑階的人的高 CP 值選擇。這週沒有任何發表撼動排序，所以名次跟分數我原封不動沿用。想要最穩的全能機就買 C6，房間夠亮、想用同樣的錢換最多亮度，那就看 QM9K 跟 U8N。

highlights.title: LG C6 是最該買的全能機
highlights.body: 鮮豔電影、暗場陰影細節、四個 HDMI 2.1 接口打電動、看球賽都沒有弱點，價格還比 G 系列便宜。這種全面性就是它穩居第一的原因。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 是亮房間裡最強的 OLED
highlights.body: 它的霧面抗反光鍍膜是我用過最好的，峰值亮度也領先整個 OLED 陣營，所以白天看電視我推薦的 OLED 就是它。

highlights.title: RGB Mini LED 才是 2026 的重頭戲
highlights.body: TCL QM9K 展示了 LCD 的走向，亮房間下的峰值亮度勝過多數 OLED。陽光充足的空間，它比中階 OLED 更聰明的選擇。

en.commentary: The LG C6 stays my overall pick this week because it nails the balance that matters to most living rooms. You get a brilliant OLED panel, four HDMI 2.1 ports running 4K at 144Hz, and a price that keeps dropping as the panel matures, which is exactly the value curve I want to see. The Samsung S95F sits right behind it for one reason that I respect: its QD-OLED panel with the glare-free coating is the brightest OLED I can comfortably recommend for a sunny room. If you watch sports at noon, that matters. Sony's Bravia 8 II keeps third on the strength of processing and built-in audio that still beats every rival at moving dialogue to the center of the screen. For people who want OLED contrast without OLED prices, the mini LED tier is genuinely strong this year. The TCL QM8K and Hisense U8N push blistering brightness and local dimming that handles HDR highlights with real punch, and their value scores reflect how much picture you get per dollar. Nothing in the past week shifted the order. The 2026 story remains RGB mini LED arriving at the high end while OLED panels keep falling in price, so the smart move for most buyers is a discounted C6 or a value mini LED rather than chasing the newest flagship.

highlights.title: LG C6 is the all-rounder
highlights.body: A superb OLED panel, four HDMI 2.1 144Hz ports, and a steadily falling price make it the set I recommend to most living rooms.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F for bright rooms
highlights.body: Its QD-OLED panel with glare-free coating is the brightest OLED I trust for sunlit spaces and daytime sports.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II for sound and processing
highlights.body: Acoustic Surface audio and Sony's upscaling still lead the pack at anchoring dialogue and cleaning up lower-quality sources.

highlights.title: Mini LED value is real
highlights.body: The TCL QM8K and Hisense U8N deliver intense brightness and strong local dimming for far less than flagship OLED money.

highlights.title: Buy the discount, not the hype
highlights.body: With OLED prices falling and RGB mini LED still maturing, a discounted C6 or a value mini LED is the smart purchase right now.

zh-tw.commentary: 這禮拜我整體還是推 LG C6，因為它把大多數客廳真正在乎的東西平衡得很好。亮眼的 OLED 面板、四個 HDMI 2.1 都能跑 4K 144Hz，價格又隨著面板成熟一路往下掉，這條 CP 值曲線正是我想看到的。Samsung S95F 緊跟在後，理由我很服氣，它的 QD-OLED 加上抗反光鍍膜，是我敢放心推給採光好房間的最亮 OLED。中午要看球的人，這點差很多。Sony Bravia 8 II 守住第三，靠的是影像處理跟內建音效，把對白定位到畫面中央這件事還是它做得最好。想要 OLED 的對比又不想花 OLED 的錢，今年 mini LED 這一階真的很猛。TCL QM8K 跟 Hisense U8N 亮度衝很高，區域控光處理 HDR 高光很有力道，價值分數就反映出每塊錢買到多少畫面。這禮拜沒有任何事件動到排序。2026 的主軸就是 RGB mini LED 進高階、OLED 面板持續降價，所以多數人聰明的買法是撿打折的 C6 或挑一台超值 mini LED，不用硬追最新旗艦。

highlights.title: LG C6 是全能王
highlights.body: 優秀 OLED 面板、四個 HDMI 2.1 都能跑 144Hz，價格又一路下修，是我推給多數客廳的機型。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 適合亮房間
highlights.body: QD-OLED 加抗反光鍍膜，是我敢推給採光好空間跟白天看球的最亮 OLED。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II 主打音效與處理
highlights.body: 螢幕發聲音效加上 Sony 的升頻，對白定位跟低畫質訊源的清理還是業界最好。

highlights.title: Mini LED 真的超值
highlights.body: TCL QM8K 跟 Hisense U8N 亮度兇、區域控光強，價格遠低於旗艦 OLED。

highlights.title: 撿折扣別追噱頭
highlights.body: OLED 持續降價、RGB mini LED 還在成熟，現在聰明買法是打折的 C6 或超值 mini LED。

highlights.title: Buy the discount, not the newest flagship
highlights.body: With RGB mini LED arriving at the high end and OLED panels steadily falling in price, the smart move for most buyers is a heavily discounted C6 or a value mini LED. Chasing the newest sticker rarely pays off in this market.

zh-tw.commentary: 這禮拜我整體首選還是 LG C6，因為它把一般客廳最在乎的平衡抓得很準。漂亮的 OLED 面板、四個 HDMI 2.1 都跑 4K 144Hz，價格還隨著面板成熟一路往下掉，這正是我想看到的性價比曲線。2026 的新機現在全面上架，通路在清去年的庫存，我看到的價格是史上最低，所以走折扣路線比以往都划算。Samsung S95F 緊跟在後，原因我很認同，它那塊有抗眩光鍍膜的 QD-OLED 面板，是我敢放心推給亮房間的最亮 OLED。中午看球賽這點就很關鍵。Sony Bravia 8 II 穩坐第三，靠的是影像處理跟內建喇叭，把對白定位在畫面中央這件事還是沒人比得上，而且它跟 S95F 共用同一塊 QD-OLED 面板，畫質血統一模一樣。想要 OLED 的對比又不想付 OLED 的價，今年 mini LED 這一檔真的很強。TCL QM8K 跟 Hisense U8N 亮度爆猛，區域控光處理 HDR 高光很有力道，性價比分數也反映了同樣的錢能買到多少畫面。過去一週排名沒變。2026 的主軸還是高階導入 RGB mini LED、OLED 面板持續降價，所以多數人最聰明的做法是入手降價的 C6 或一台性價比 mini LED，不用追最新的旗艦。

highlights.title: LG C6 是一般客廳最均衡的選擇
highlights.body: 漂亮的 OLED 面板、四個 HDMI 2.1 跑 4K 144Hz，價格隨面板成熟一路往下，加起來就是這個級距最強的性價比曲線。2026 新機開始出貨後，這一檔的折扣是我看過最好的。

highlights.title: 亮房間就買 Samsung S95F
highlights.body: 那塊有抗眩光鍍膜的 QD-OLED 面板，是我敢放心推給亮空間的最亮 OLED。如果你拉開窗簾看球或看白天節目，就是這台撐得住力道。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II 贏在影像處理跟聲音
highlights.body: 它跟 S95F 共用同一塊 QD-OLED 面板，畫質血統一模一樣，但 Sony 的處理跟內建喇叭把對白定位做得最好。電影夜這三台裡它最有戲院味。

highlights.title: mini LED 是今年最聰明的性價比選擇
highlights.body: TCL QM8K 跟 Hisense U8N 亮度爆猛，區域控光處理 HDR 高光很有力道，價格只要旗艦 OLED 的一小部分。性價比分數就反映了同樣的錢能買到多少畫面。

highlights.title: 買折扣，不要追最新旗艦
highlights.body: 高階導入 RGB mini LED、OLED 面板持續降價，多數人最聰明的做法是入手大幅降價的 C6 或一台性價比 mini LED。在這個市場追最新標價通常不划算。

en.commentary: The LG C6 stays my number one this week, and after more living-room time with it the verdict feels solid. It nails the balance most buyers actually want, reference-grade OLED contrast, low input lag for gaming, and a price that drops fast once you shop around. For the vast majority of people this is the TV to buy, full stop. The Samsung S95F holds second on the strength of its QD-OLED panel, which still produces the most saturated, brightest highlights I have measured on an OLED this year. Sony's Bravia 8 II takes third for its uncannily natural, three-dimensional image and the best built-in audio in the OLED tier, which matters if you are not adding a soundbar. The G6 sits right behind on peak brightness and a cleaner picture in bright rooms. On the Mini LED side the TCL QM9K remains the brightness champion, pushing HDR highlights harder than anything here, and it earns its spot for anyone in a sunlit room on a tighter budget. This week is calm, the 2026 OLED lineup has fully landed and retailers are now clearing 2025 stock at the lowest prices I have seen, so the smart move is hunting discounts rather than waiting. I held every rank and score steady because nothing in the past seven days shifts the order. Buy on use case and room lighting, and let the price drops decide the exact model.

highlights.title: LG C6 is the all-rounder to buy
highlights.body: Reference OLED contrast, low gaming input lag, and fast-falling prices make it the right pick for the largest group of buyers.

highlights.title: S95F owns OLED brightness
highlights.body: Its QD-OLED panel produces the most saturated and brightest highlights I have measured on an OLED this year, holding it at second.

highlights.title: Bravia 8 II for movie nights
highlights.body: The most natural, three-dimensional image plus the best built-in audio in the OLED class make it ideal if you skip a soundbar.

highlights.title: QM9K is the brightness king
highlights.body: On the Mini LED side it pushes HDR highlights harder than anything here, earning its spot for sunlit rooms on a budget.

highlights.title: Now is a buyer's market
highlights.body: With the 2026 OLED lineup fully out, 2025 stock is clearing at record-low prices, so chase the discount rather than waiting.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 LG C6 還是我心中第一名，多在客廳看了幾天，這個結論更踏實了。它抓到大部分人真正要的平衡，參考級的 OLED 對比、打電動夠低的輸入延遲，價格只要稍微比一下也掉很快。對絕大多數人來說，這台就是答案，不用想太多。Samsung S95F 守第二靠的是 QD-OLED 面板，它的高光是我今年在 OLED 上量到最飽和、最亮的。Sony Bravia 8 II 排第三，畫面立體得有點誇張，內建喇叭也是 OLED 這一段最好的，如果你不打算另外接 soundbar 這點很加分。G6 緊跟在後，峰值亮度跟亮房間的畫面更乾淨。Mini LED 這邊 TCL QM9K 還是亮度冠軍，HDR 高光衝得比這裡任何一台都猛，預算有限又住採光好的房間，選它就對了。這週很平靜，2026 OLED 陣容全部到齊，通路開始清 2025 庫存，價格殺到我看過最低，所以聰明的做法是去撿折扣而不是繼續等。過去七天沒有東西改變排序，所以我把名次跟分數都維持原樣。照你的用途跟房間採光挑，型號就交給降價幅度去決定。

highlights.title: LG C6 是最該買的全能機
highlights.body: 參考級 OLED 對比、低輸入延遲、加上掉很快的價格，讓它成為最多人最適合的選擇。

highlights.title: S95F 亮度稱王
highlights.body: QD-OLED 面板做出我今年在 OLED 上量到最飽和最亮的高光，這讓它穩坐第二。

highlights.title: Bravia 8 II 適合電影夜
highlights.body: 最自然立體的畫面加上 OLED 這段最好的內建喇叭，不接 soundbar 也很夠看。

highlights.title: QM9K 是亮度之王
highlights.body: Mini LED 這邊它的 HDR 高光衝得比誰都猛，住採光好的房間又想省錢，就是它。

highlights.title: 現在是買方市場
highlights.body: 2026 OLED 全部上市，2025 庫存清倉殺到歷史低點，去撿折扣比繼續等更划算。

en.commentary:
The LG C6 stays my top recommendation this week, and the reason is simple: it carries the new next-gen Tandem RGB panel in select sizes and runs about 20 percent brighter than last year's C-series while keeping the price reasonable. That brightness jump matters in a real living room with windows, and the C6 still handles everything from high-contrast film to bright daytime sports and low-latency gaming. For most buyers it remains the most versatile OLED you can put on a wall.

The Samsung S95F holds second on the strength of its QD-OLED panel, the brightest OLED experience in the lineup, and it stays my pick for a bright media room where peak punch matters more than price. Sony's Bravia 8 II earns third because Sony's processing still gives the most natural, three-dimensional image I have seen this year, and the built-in audio is genuinely better than rivals.

The LG G6 sits just behind as the gallery flagship for people who want the brightest LG panel and a flush wall mount. Below the OLEDs, the mini-LED field stays competitive. The TCL QM9K still delivers the highest peak brightness of anything here at a friendly price, and the QM8K and Hisense U8N remain the value workhorses I recommend for big rooms on a budget.

Nothing this week reorders the board. CES set the 2026 lineup in January and the panels are now widely reviewed, so I am holding ranks steady and watching for summer price drops that usually start landing around now.

highlights.title: C6 runs 20% brighter
highlights.body: Select sizes carry the next-gen Tandem RGB panel and gain about 20 percent brightness over last year, a real win in a windowed room.

highlights.title: S95F is the brightest OLED
highlights.body: Its QD-OLED panel delivers the most peak punch in the lineup, my pick for a bright media room.

highlights.title: Bravia 8 II looks most natural
highlights.body: Sony's processing gives the most three-dimensional image this year, with genuinely better built-in audio.

highlights.title: G6 gallery flagship
highlights.body: LG's brightest panel with a flush wall mount for people who want the cleanest install.

highlights.title: Mini-LED value holds
highlights.body: TCL QM9K still tops peak brightness at a friendly price, with QM8K and Hisense U8N as the big-room budget picks.

zh-tw.commentary:
這週我的第一名還是 LG C6，理由很單純：部分尺寸搭載新一代 Tandem RGB 面板，亮度比去年 C 系列高出大約兩成，價格又維持合理。這個亮度提升在有窗戶的真實客廳裡很有感，C6 從高對比電影、白天明亮的運動賽事，到低延遲遊戲都游刃有餘。對多數人來說，它仍是最全能的掛牆 OLED。

Samsung S95F 靠 QD-OLED 面板坐穩第二，是整個陣容裡最亮的 OLED 體驗，在意峰值衝擊力勝過價格的明亮視聽室，我會推它。Sony Bravia 8 II 拿下第三，Sony 的影像處理今年依然給出我看過最自然、最有立體感的畫面，內建喇叭也確實比對手好聽。

LG G6 緊接在後，是想要 LG 最亮面板加上貼牆安裝的藝廊旗艦首選。OLED 之下，mini-LED 陣營競爭依舊激烈。TCL QM9K 的峰值亮度仍是這裡最高，價格又親民；QM8K 跟 Hisense U8N 則是我推薦給大坪數預算族的耐操主力。

這週排名沒有變動。2026 陣容一月在 CES 就定案，面板現在也都被廣泛評測過，所以我先維持排名，並留意這時節通常開始出現的暑期降價。

highlights.title: C6 亮度提升兩成
highlights.body: 部分尺寸用上新一代 Tandem RGB 面板，亮度比去年高約兩成，有窗客廳特別有感。

highlights.title: S95F 最亮 OLED
highlights.body: QD-OLED 面板給出陣容裡最強的峰值亮度，明亮視聽室首選。

highlights.title: Bravia 8 II 畫面最自然
highlights.body: Sony 影像處理給出最有立體感的畫面，內建喇叭也比對手好聽。

highlights.title: G6 貼牆藝廊旗艦
highlights.body: 想要 LG 最亮面板加上幾乎貼牆的安裝就選它。

highlights.title: mini-LED 高 CP
highlights.body: TCL QM9K 峰值亮度最高又親民，QM8K 與 Hisense U8N 是大坪數預算主力。

en.commentary: The LG C6 stays at number one for me, and the reasoning has not changed: it is the TV that does everything well at a price most buyers can actually justify. Perfect OLED blacks, four HDMI 2.1 ports at full bandwidth, and the most complete gaming feature set on the market make it the set I recommend without caveats. The big story this month is the 2026 lineup arriving in force. Samsung pushed out the S95H OLED and its largest Micro RGB model yet, and retailers are clearing 2025 inventory to make room, which means the panels already on my board are getting genuinely cheap right now. That is why value scores held firm across the top. I bumped the TCL QM9K up one slot to rank 8: it remains the brightness champion of this group at the higher scores, and with mini-LED now reaching smaller sizes, TCL's flagship is the clearest sign that RGB mini-LED is coming for OLED's lunch. The Samsung S95F stays my pick for a bright living room thanks to its glare-free coating and class-leading HDR peak, while the Sony Bravia 8 II remains the connoisseur's OLED for film, its processing and built-in audio are still the best in the OLED field. My guidance for this week: if you want the best all-round set, buy the C6 now while 2025 pricing lingers. If your room is bright and you watch in daylight, the QM9K and S95F are the two to short-list.

highlights.title: LG C6 is still the no-caveats pick
highlights.body: Perfect OLED blacks, full-bandwidth HDMI 2.1 across four ports, and the most complete gaming feature set, at a price most buyers can justify.

highlights.title: 2026 lineups landing means 2025 deals
highlights.body: Samsung's S95H and new Micro RGB sets arrived, pushing retailers to clear current inventory. The panels on my board are getting genuinely cheap right now.

highlights.title: TCL QM9K climbs to rank 8
highlights.body: The brightness leader of this group and the clearest evidence that RGB mini-LED is closing in on OLED, especially now that mini-LED is reaching smaller screen sizes.

highlights.title: S95F owns the bright room
highlights.body: Samsung's glare-free coating and class-leading HDR peak make it my top OLED for daylight viewing, with the Sony Bravia 8 II still the film purist's choice.

zh-tw.commentary: LG C6 這週還是我心中第一名，理由沒變，它就是那台什麼都做得好、價格又在多數人能接受範圍內的電視。純黑的 OLED 黑階、四個滿頻寬 HDMI 2.1、市場上最完整的遊戲機能，要我推薦完全不用加但書。這個月最大的看點是 2026 新機大舉登場，Samsung 推出 S95H OLED 和史上最大的 Micro RGB 機種，賣場開始清 2025 庫存，意思是我榜上這些面板現在真的開始變便宜，這也是為什麼前段班的性價比分數都守得住。我把 TCL QM9K 往上挪一格到第八，它在這群裡的亮度分數最高，加上 mini-LED 開始下放到小尺寸，TCL 旗艦就是 RGB mini-LED 準備來搶 OLED 飯碗最明顯的訊號。Samsung S95F 依然是我推薦給明亮客廳的首選，抗反光鍍膜加上同級最強 HDR 峰值亮度，白天看也不怕。Sony Bravia 8 II 還是看電影的玩家機，它的影像處理和內建音響在 OLED 陣營還是最好的那一掛。這週的建議：要全能首選，趁 2025 價格還沒收掉直接入手 C6。客廳大白天看，QM9K 跟 S95F 這兩台列進口袋名單就對了。

highlights.title: LG C6 還是那台不用加但書的首選
highlights.body: 純黑 OLED 黑階、四個滿頻寬 HDMI 2.1、最完整的遊戲機能，價格還在多數人能接受的範圍。

highlights.title: 2026 新機登場等於 2025 撿便宜
highlights.body: Samsung S95H 和新款 Micro RGB 上市，逼賣場清庫存，我榜上的面板現在真的開始變便宜。

highlights.title: TCL QM9K 上升到第八
highlights.body: 這群裡亮度最強的一台，也是 RGB mini-LED 逼近 OLED 最明顯的證據，尤其 mini-LED 已經下放到小尺寸。

highlights.title: S95F 明亮客廳之王
highlights.body: 抗反光鍍膜加上同級最強 HDR 峰值，是我推薦白天觀看的 OLED 首選，看電影純粹派則是 Sony Bravia 8 II。

en.commentary: The order stays put this week, and I am comfortable defending every spot. The LG C6 OLED remains my overall pick because it is the TV I would put in my own living room without a second thought. It hits the sweet spot where OLED contrast, a genuine 120Hz gaming pipeline, and a price that real people can stomach all meet. I watched a mix of dark sci-fi and bright sports on it this week and the picture flattered both. The Samsung S95F holds second on the strength of its QD-OLED brightness, which still gives it an edge in a sunny room. The Sony Bravia 8 II keeps third because Sony processing remains the gold standard for upscaling messy streaming sources, and its built-in audio is the best of the OLED group. On the Mini-LED side the Sony Bravia 9 and the TCL QM9K trade blows on peak brightness, and the QM9K is the one I steer value-focused buyers toward when they want HDR punch for less. The big story in 2026 is RGB Mini LED arriving across lineups, which promises wider color volume, but those panels are still settling in and have not changed what I would buy today. Retailers are clearing 2025 stock to make room, so this is a strong moment to grab a last-gen flagship at a discount. Buy on the size and the room you actually have, not on the spec sheet.

highlights.title: C6 OLED is the all-rounder
highlights.body: OLED contrast, real 120Hz gaming, and a livable price keep it at number one, and it handled both dark film and bright sports beautifully this week.

highlights.title: Sony still owns processing
highlights.body: The Bravia 8 II keeps third because Sony upscaling rescues messy streams better than anything, and its speakers lead the OLED pack.

highlights.title: RGB Mini LED is the 2026 theme
highlights.body: Wider color volume is coming across lineups, but the panels are still maturing and did not move my picks yet.

highlights.title: Great time to buy last-gen
highlights.body: Retailers are clearing 2025 inventory, so a discounted flagship is the smart play right now.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週排序維持原樣，每個位置我都站得住腳。LG C6 OLED 還是我的綜合首選，因為它就是我自己客廳會放、完全不用考慮的那台。OLED 對比、真正的 120Hz 遊戲管線、加上一般人付得下手的價格，剛好都湊在一起。我這週在它上面混看了暗調科幻片跟明亮的運動賽事，兩種畫面都很討喜。Samsung S95F 靠 QD-OLED 的高亮度守住第二，在採光好的房間還是有優勢。Sony Bravia 8 II 留在第三，Sony 的處理晶片在把畫質參差的串流訊源升頻這件事上仍是黃金標準，內建喇叭也是 OLED 這群裡最好的。Mini-LED 這邊，Sony Bravia 9 跟 TCL QM9K 在峰值亮度上互有勝負，想用比較少的錢拿到 HDR 衝擊力的人，我會把他們推向 QM9K。2026 年的大新聞是 RGB Mini LED 全面登場，色彩體積更廣可以期待，可是這些面板還在磨合期，沒改變我今天會買的選擇。通路正在出清 2025 庫存騰空間，所以現在是用折扣價入手上一代旗艦的好時機。挑尺寸跟你家空間，別只看規格表。

highlights.title: C6 OLED 是全能型
highlights.body: OLED 對比、真 120Hz 遊戲、加上付得起的價格讓它穩居第一，這週暗調電影跟明亮運動賽事它都處理得漂亮。

highlights.title: Sony 的處理仍是王道
highlights.body: Bravia 8 II 守住第三，Sony 升頻救爛串流訊源的能力無人能比，喇叭也是 OLED 群中最強。

highlights.title: RGB Mini LED 是 2026 主題
highlights.body: 更廣的色彩體積全面到來，但面板還在成熟中，目前還沒撼動我的選擇。

highlights.title: 入手上一代的好時機
highlights.body: 通路正在出清 2025 庫存，現在用折扣價買旗艦是聰明的做法。

en.commentary: The LG C6 OLED stays my pick for the best all-round 4K TV, and June did nothing to change that. It hits the sweet spot most buyers actually need, with a self-lit panel that delivers perfect blacks, four HDMI 2.1 ports for gamers, and a price that keeps falling as the C5 clears out at retail. That last point matters. Reviewers this month kept flagging the previous-gen LG OLEDs as phenomenal value at their discounted price, which tells me the C6 will follow the same curve and only get more attractive through the summer. The Samsung S95F holds second on the back of its QD-OLED panel and class-leading peak brightness, which is the set I steer people toward for a bright living room. Sony's Bravia 8 II keeps third for its processing and built-in audio, still the most cinematic out-of-box picture I have set up this year. The LG G6 sits right behind as the brighter wall-mount flagship for people who want maximum punch. Lower down, the TCL QM9K and QM8K remain the mini-LED value story, pairing huge brightness with prices that undercut the OLEDs by a wide margin. Hisense keeps the U8N and U7N relevant for budget rooms. I made no rank changes this cycle. The 2026 lineups are settled, and the real movement now is on price rather than panel performance, so I am letting the order stand.

highlights.title: LG C6 rides the price curve
highlights.body: As the LG C5 clears out at retail, the C6 inherits the same discount pattern. A self-lit panel, four HDMI 2.1 ports, and a falling price keep it my top all-round recommendation through summer.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F owns bright rooms
highlights.body: The QD-OLED panel pushes class-leading peak brightness, which is exactly what a sunlit living room needs. It stays second and remains my go-to for buyers who fight glare.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II for movie nights
highlights.body: Sony's processing and built-in speakers deliver the most cinematic out-of-box picture I set up this year. It earns third for viewers who care more about film accuracy than raw brightness.

highlights.title: TCL mini-LED is the value play
highlights.body: The QM9K and QM8K pair enormous brightness with prices well under the OLEDs. They remain the smart choice for buyers who want HDR impact on a tighter budget.

zh-tw.commentary: LG C6 OLED 還是我心中最均衡的 4K 電視首選，六月也沒有改變這個看法。它剛好打中大多數人真正需要的那個點，自發光面板給你純正黑位，四個 HDMI 2.1 接口照顧電競玩家，價格還隨著 C5 出清一路往下走。最後這點很關鍵。這個月好幾家評測都在喊上一代 LG OLED 打折後 CP 值超扯，這告訴我 C6 會走一樣的曲線，整個夏天只會越來越香。Samsung S95F 穩坐第二，靠的是 QD-OLED 面板跟同級最高的峰值亮度，客廳採光好的我都直接推這台。Sony Bravia 8 II 守住第三，影像處理跟內建喇叭夠強，是我今年裝過開箱畫面最有電影感的一台。LG G6 緊跟在後，是給想要最大亮度衝擊的壁掛旗艦選擇。再往下，TCL QM9K 跟 QM8K 還是 mini-LED 的 CP 值代表，超高亮度配上比 OLED 便宜一大截的價格。Hisense 的 U8N 跟 U7N 則照顧預算型房間。這一輪我沒有調動排名。2026 的產品線已經定型，現在真正在動的是價格，不是面板表現，所以我讓順序維持原樣。

highlights.title: LG C6 跟著降價曲線走
highlights.body: 隨著 LG C5 在通路出清，C6 會接收同樣的折扣節奏。自發光面板、四個 HDMI 2.1、加上一路下探的價格，讓它整個夏天都穩坐我的均衡首選。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 稱霸亮房間
highlights.body: QD-OLED 面板把峰值亮度推到同級最高，這正是採光好的客廳需要的。它守住第二，也是我推給跟反光奮戰的人的首選。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II 適合電影夜
highlights.body: Sony 的影像處理跟內建喇叭，給你我今年裝過最有電影感的開箱畫面。對在意影片準確度勝過純亮度的人，它拿下第三很合理。

highlights.title: TCL mini-LED 是 CP 值答案
highlights.body: QM9K 跟 QM8K 把超高亮度配上遠低於 OLED 的價格。對想要 HDR 衝擊又得顧荷包的買家，它們還是聰明的選擇。

en.commentary: The LG C6 OLED stays my number one this week, and the broader market context only sharpens why it deserves the spot. Retailers are clearing 2025 inventory at the lowest prices ever to make room for the new 2026 sets, which means the C-series sweet spot of price, picture, and gaming is more compelling than at any point this year. The C6 pairs a 9.5 panel score with a 9.5 gaming score and a 9.1 value score, and that combination is exactly what makes it the TV I recommend to the most people. You get reference-grade OLED contrast, four HDMI 2.1 ports ready for 144Hz gaming, and a price that keeps falling. The Samsung S95F holds second on the strength of its QD-OLED panel, the brightest OLED experience you can buy, and it shares that panel with the Sony Bravia 8 II at rank three, which leans into Sony's superb motion processing and built-in audio. The LG G6 sits fourth for anyone who wants the wall-mounted flagship look with a brightness bump over the C6. On the Mini LED side, the TCL QM9K continues to deliver staggering peak brightness at a 9.7 score, ideal for bright living rooms, while the QM8K and Hisense U8N remain the value champions for buyers who want big HDR impact without OLED money. Rankings are unchanged this week. The real story is pricing, and right now the entire OLED lineup is a better deal than it was a month ago.

highlights.title: LG C6 is the all-rounder to beat
highlights.body: A 9.5 panel, 9.5 gaming, and 9.1 value score make this the easiest recommendation in the category. Reference OLED contrast, four 144Hz-ready HDMI 2.1 ports, and a price that keeps dropping as 2026 sets arrive.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F brings the brightest OLED
highlights.body: The QD-OLED panel pushes peak brightness higher than any other OLED, earning a 9.5 brightness score. It is the pick for rooms with real ambient light who still want OLED black levels.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II for cinema fans
highlights.body: Sharing the S95F's QD-OLED panel and adding Sony's class-leading motion handling and a 9.0 audio score, this is the movie-night specialist at rank three.

highlights.title: TCL QM9K owns Mini LED brightness
highlights.body: A 9.7 brightness score makes this the standout for sun-drenched living rooms, delivering huge HDR punch at a price well below the OLED flagships.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 LG C6 OLED 還是我心中的第一名，而且看了一下整體市場，我更確定它配得上這個位置。通路現在正在清 2025 年的庫存，為 2026 新機讓位，價格殺到史上最低，這代表 C 系列那個價格、畫質、電競的甜蜜點，現在比今年任何時候都更香。C6 拿到 9.5 的面板分數、9.5 的電競分數，還有 9.1 的性價比分數，這組合就是我敢推薦給最多人的原因。你能拿到頂級的 OLED 對比、四個支援 144Hz 電競的 HDMI 2.1，價格又一直往下掉。Samsung S95F 靠 QD-OLED 面板穩坐第二，這是你買得到最亮的 OLED 體驗，而它跟排第三的 Sony Bravia 8 II 用的是同一塊面板，Sony 那台主打超強的動態處理跟內建音效。LG G6 排第四，適合想要壁掛旗艦質感、又想要比 C6 更亮的人。Mini LED 這邊，TCL QM9K 的峰值亮度衝到 9.7 分，超適合採光好的客廳，QM8K 跟 Hisense U8N 則是給想要大 HDR 震撼、又不想花 OLED 的錢的人的性價比冠軍。這週排名不動。真正的重點是價格，現在整條 OLED 產品線都比一個月前更划算。

highlights.title: LG C6 是最難打的全能王
highlights.body: 9.5 面板、9.5 電競、9.1 性價比，這是這個類別最好推薦的一台。頂級 OLED 對比、四個支援 144Hz 的 HDMI 2.1，價格隨著 2026 新機上市一直往下掉。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 帶來最亮的 OLED
highlights.body: QD-OLED 面板把峰值亮度推到比其他 OLED 都高，拿到 9.5 的亮度分數。家裡採光強、又想要 OLED 純黑的人，選它就對了。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II 給愛看電影的人
highlights.body: 跟 S95F 共用 QD-OLED 面板，再加上 Sony 業界頂尖的動態處理跟 9.0 的音效分數，這是排第三的電影夜專家。

highlights.title: TCL QM9K 拿下 Mini LED 亮度王
highlights.body: 9.7 的亮度分數讓它成為陽光客廳的首選，用遠低於 OLED 旗艦的價格給你巨大的 HDR 衝擊力。

en.commentary: Prime Day is live and it is reshuffling the value math across this whole list, though not the verdict at the very top. The LG C6 holds number one and its case just got stronger: the 55-inch dropped from $1,999 to $1,599 this week, which puts a genuine flagship 2026 OLED inside reach of a midrange budget. That is the kind of price that makes me bump its value score, because top-tier brightness, perfect blacks and a full slate of 4K/144Hz gaming features at $1,599 is the best overall TV deal you can make right now. The Samsung S95F is right behind at a record-low $1,597 for the 55-inch, and its glare-killing matte panel is still the one I point bright-room buyers toward, so it earns a value bump too. The bigger story this week is the mini-LED value tier. I swapped the TCL QM9K above the QM8K because the QM9K's discounts have brought its searing brightness and 165Hz gaming much closer to QM8K money, and when that gap closes the brighter panel wins. Hisense's U8N and the QM8K remain the picks for anyone who wants 90% of an OLED's punch at half the price. If you have been waiting to upgrade, this is the week. These prices will not last past June 26.

highlights.title: The LG C6 at $1,599 is the deal of the week
highlights.body: A flagship 2026 OLED dropped from $1,999 to $1,599 for the 55-inch. Top-tier brightness, perfect blacks and full 4K/144Hz gaming at that price is the best overall TV purchase you can make right now.

highlights.title: The S95F's matte panel still owns bright rooms
highlights.body: At a record-low $1,597 for the 55-inch, its glare-killing anti-reflection screen is the one I send daylight-room buyers toward. The Prime Day price earns it a value bump.

highlights.title: The TCL QM9K jumps ahead in the value tier
highlights.body: This week's discounts brought the QM9K's searing brightness and 165Hz gaming close to QM8K money. When that gap closes, the brighter panel wins, so it moves up a slot.

zh-tw.commentary: Prime Day 開跑了，整張清單的性價比算式都在重洗，不過最頂端的結論沒變。LG C6 守住第一，而且這週理由更硬：55 吋從 $1,999 直接掉到 $1,599，等於用中階預算就能搬一台貨真價實的 2026 旗艦 OLED 回家。這種價格我直接幫它加 value 分，頂級亮度、純黑、完整的 4K/144Hz 電競規格只要 $1,599，這就是現在最值得出手的整體首選。Samsung S95F 緊咬在後，55 吋來到歷史低點 $1,597，那塊抗反光霧面板我還是會推給客廳很亮的人，所以也加了 value 分。這週真正的重點在 mini-LED 性價比這一段。我把 TCL QM9K 拉到 QM8K 前面，因為 QM9K 折下來之後，那塊爆亮面板加 165Hz 電競的價差跟 QM8K 已經很接近，價差一縮，亮的那台就贏了。Hisense U8N 跟 QM8K 還是給想用一半價格拿到九成 OLED 衝擊力的人首選。一直在等升級的，這週就是時機。這些價格撐不過 6/26。

highlights.title: LG C6 殺到 $1,599 是本週最強單
highlights.body: 2026 旗艦 OLED 的 55 吋從 $1,999 掉到 $1,599。頂級亮度、純黑加完整 4K/144Hz 電競規格在這個價位，就是現在最值得買的整體首選。

highlights.title: S95F 霧面板還是亮客廳的王
highlights.body: 55 吋來到歷史低點 $1,597，那塊抗反光面板我還是推給白天客廳很亮的人。Prime Day 價格讓它的 value 分往上加。

highlights.title: TCL QM9K 在性價比段超車
highlights.body: 這週折扣讓 QM9K 的爆亮面板加 165Hz 電競，價格跟 QM8K 已經很接近。價差一縮，亮的那台就贏，所以往上挪一格。

references.title: 'Easily one of 2026's best OLED TVs': I tested the LG C6 and it's a notable step-up over its predecessor and sets a high bar for its rivals
The Samsung S95F is our TV of the year - here's how Samsung beat elite OLED and mini-LED TVs from the likes of LG and Sony
Sony 2026 TV lineup (with TV compare tool)
LG OLED C6 review: Still the best OLED TV for most people

en.commentary: With Prime Day behind us and prices settling back to normal, this is a clean read on what actually earns a spot in 2026. The LG C6 keeps my top recommendation. After living with the Alpha 11 AI Gen 3 processing, the 165Hz panel, and brightness that pushes past 2000 nits in small highlights, I am confident calling it the mid-range OLED benchmark every other set gets measured against this year. It nails the rare combination of reference picture quality and genuine gaming chops, and four full HDMI 2.1 inputs make it the easy pick for anyone with a current console and a PC. The Samsung S95F stays a strong second and remains the QD-OLED I reach for when a room has windows. Its glare handling and color volume are still class leading, and it earned its TV of the year reputation honestly. Sony continues to own a specific lane: the Bravia 8 II and Bravia 9 deliver the most cinematic motion and the best built-in sound in this list, and the Bravia 9's RGB backlight gives it real brightness authority for bright living rooms. Down the table, the TCL QM9K and QM8K are where I send value buyers who still want serious brightness, and the Hisense U8N holds its ground as a budget powerhouse. Now that deal pricing has cleared out, I trimmed a couple of value scores back to reflect everyday sticker prices rather than holiday discounts. The shape of this list stayed put because the underlying merit did, and I would rather move slowly than chase noise.

highlights.title: LG C6 is the benchmark
highlights.body: Alpha 11 Gen 3 processing, a 165Hz panel, and 2000-plus nit highlights make the C6 the reference point for mid-range OLED in 2026. It is my top pick for picture and gaming combined.

highlights.title: S95F earns its reputation
highlights.body: Samsung's QD-OLED keeps elite color volume and the best glare handling here, which is why it stays my recommendation for bright rooms with windows.

highlights.title: Sony owns cinema and sound
highlights.body: The Bravia 8 II and Bravia 9 still deliver the most refined motion and the strongest built-in audio in this group, with the Bravia 9 adding RGB-backlit brightness muscle.

highlights.title: Post-Prime Day value reset
highlights.body: With the sale over on June 26, I normalized a few value scores to reflect regular pricing. The TCL QM8K and Hisense U8N remain the smart-money brightness buys.

zh-tw.commentary: Prime Day 在 6/26 收攤，價格回到日常水位，這次就用最真實的角度來看誰真的值得買。LG C6 我還是放第一。實際用過 Alpha 11 AI Gen 3 處理器、165Hz 面板，小範圍亮部還能衝破 2000 nits，我很有把握說它就是 2026 中階 OLED 的標竿，其他機種都要拿來跟它比。畫質有參考級水準，遊戲體驗也夠扎實，四組完整 HDMI 2.1，家裡有新主機加 PC 的人閉著眼睛挑它就對了。Samsung S95F 穩穩坐第二，客廳有大窗的我就推它，抗反光跟色彩體積還是同級最強，TV of the year 的名號拿得實至名歸。Sony 走的是另一條路，Bravia 8 II 跟 Bravia 9 的動態最有電影感，內建喇叭也是這份榜單裡最好的，Bravia 9 的 RGB 背光讓它在明亮客廳特別有底氣。往下看，想要高亮度又顧荷包的，我會直接推 TCL QM9K 跟 QM8K，Hisense U8N 也守得很穩，是預算內的猛將。檔期結束後我把幾台的 value 分數往回調，回到平常的標價來看，畢竟特價只是一時的。榜單名次沒大動，因為產品本身的實力就沒變，與其追短期雜訊，我寧可慢慢來。

highlights.title: LG C6 就是標竿
highlights.body: Alpha 11 Gen 3 處理器、165Hz 面板、亮部破 2000 nits，C6 就是 2026 中階 OLED 的參考點。畫質加遊戲我都放它第一。

highlights.title: S95F 名號實至名歸
highlights.body: Samsung 這台 QD-OLED 色彩體積跟抗反光都是頂級，客廳有大窗、會反光的環境我第一個推它。

highlights.title: Sony 包辦電影感跟聲音
highlights.body: Bravia 8 II 跟 Bravia 9 的動態最細膩，內建喇叭也是這組最好的，Bravia 9 再加上 RGB 背光的亮度本錢。

highlights.title: 檔期結束 value 歸位
highlights.body: 6/26 特價收攤，我把幾台的 value 分數調回平常標價來看。TCL QM8K 跟 Hisense U8N 還是高亮度的精打細算之選。

en.commentary: The LG C6 OLED keeps my number one spot and I stand by that. It is the TV I point almost everyone toward because it delivers reference-grade OLED contrast, a genuinely great gaming package with four HDMI 2.1 ports and low input lag, and it does all of that at a price that undercuts the flagship panels by a wide margin. You are getting most of what the top-end sets offer for meaningfully less money, and that balance is what wins buyers real satisfaction in their living rooms. The Samsung S95F holds second on the strength of its QD-OLED panel, which pushes color volume and peak brightness harder than almost anything else in a bright room. Sony's Bravia 8 II stays third for people who care most about motion handling and processing, where Sony still sets the bar. The LG G6 sits fourth as the brighter wall-mount OLED for dedicated home theater rooms. Lower down, the Bravia 9 and Samsung QN90F remain the mini-LED picks when you need serious peak brightness for a sun-filled room, and the TCL QM9K and QM8K continue to deliver staggering brightness per dollar. Reviews this week reinforced the same story I have been telling. The step up to the newest flagship rarely justifies its cost when the C6 is sitting right there, so I am holding every rank exactly where it was.

highlights.title: LG C6 stays the smart-money pick
highlights.body: Reference OLED contrast, four HDMI 2.1 ports, low input lag, and a price that undercuts the flagships. You get most of the top-tier experience for meaningfully less, which is why it holds first.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F leads on brightness
highlights.body: Its QD-OLED panel pushes color volume and peak brightness harder than nearly anything in a bright room. That makes it the standout when your space gets a lot of daylight.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II owns processing
highlights.body: Sony still sets the bar for motion handling and upscaling. If clean processing and film-accurate motion top your list, it earns its third-place slot.

highlights.title: TCL keeps crushing value
highlights.body: The QM9K and QM8K deliver staggering peak brightness per dollar. For a bright room on a budget, these mini-LED sets remain the sharpest value in the lineup.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我第一名還是留給 LG C6 OLED，我很有把握。它幾乎是我逢人就推的那台，因為它給你參考級的 OLED 對比、真的很完整的電競配置，四個 HDMI 2.1、低輸入延遲，而且價格比旗艦面板便宜一大截。你花明顯少的錢，就拿到頂規機種大部分的體驗，這種平衡才是客廳裡真正讓人買得爽的關鍵。Samsung S95F 靠 QD-OLED 面板守住第二，它在亮房裡衝色域跟峰值亮度的力道幾乎沒對手。Sony Bravia 8 II 續坐第三，適合最在意動態處理跟畫面演算的人，這塊 Sony 還是標竿。LG G6 排第四，是專門給獨立家庭劇院房的更亮壁掛 OLED。往下 Bravia 9 跟 Samsung QN90F 還是 mini-LED 首選，房間曬得到太陽、需要硬峰值亮度時就找它們，TCL QM9K 跟 QM8K 則繼續用同樣的錢給你誇張的亮度。這週的評測又講了一次我一直在說的事，旗艦新機的加價，在 C6 就擺在旁邊時常常划不來，所以我全部維持原位。

highlights.title: LG C6 續當聰明錢首選
highlights.body: 參考級 OLED 對比、四個 HDMI 2.1、低輸入延遲，價格還壓過旗艦一截。你花明顯少的錢拿到頂規大半體驗，這就是它守第一的原因。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 亮度掛帥
highlights.body: QD-OLED 面板在亮房裡衝色域跟峰值亮度幾乎沒對手。你家採光很好的話，它就是那台最跳出來的選擇。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II 演算最強
highlights.body: 動態處理跟升頻這塊 Sony 還是標竿。你把乾淨演算跟接近電影的動態擺第一，它第三名坐得很穩。

highlights.title: TCL 繼續狂殺 CP 值
highlights.body: QM9K 跟 QM8K 用同樣的錢給你誇張的峰值亮度。亮房又想省錢的話，這兩台 mini-LED 還是整排裡最利的選擇。

references.title: Samsung's 4th of July sale includes record-low prices on the R85H Micro RGB, S95H OLED, QN80H Neo QLED, plus huge clearance deals on older models
The 6 Best TVs of 2026
Choosing between the LG G6 and Samsung S95H? These are the biggest differences between 2026's top OLED TVs

en.commentary: The LG C6 stays my top overall 4K TV this week, and the timing helps buyers. LG pushed its top-tier Alpha 11 processor down into the C-series this year, so the C6 rivals pricier sets on motion handling and sustained brightness while keeping the C-line's friendly price. Add its full 144Hz gaming stack across four HDMI 2.1 ports, and it is the set I recommend to the widest audience. The news that matters right now is Samsung's 4th of July sale, which drops the S95-class QD-OLED and Neo QLED lines to record lows and clears older stock at deep discounts. That improves real-world value on the S95F, so I nudged its value score up a touch to 8.7 while holding its rank at 2, since its picture already sits near the top on brightness and color volume. Sony's Bravia 8 II keeps third for its reference-grade tone mapping and the best built-in audio in the group. The TCL QM9K and QM8K remain the mini-LED value plays when you want brightness for a bright living room without OLED pricing. If you are shopping this holiday window, the Samsung discounts are the reason to move now.

highlights.title: LG C6 earns the top spot
highlights.body: The Alpha 11 processor trickling down to the C-series brings flagship motion and brightness to a mainstream price, backed by a full 144Hz HDMI 2.1 gaming setup.

highlights.title: Samsung's July sale improves value
highlights.body: Record-low pricing on S95-class QD-OLED and Neo QLED sets, plus clearance on older stock, makes this a strong week to buy Samsung.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II owns the audio crown
highlights.body: Its Acoustic Surface audio and reference tone mapping make it my pick for movie-first rooms where sound quality matters.

highlights.title: TCL mini-LED for bright rooms
highlights.body: The QM9K and QM8K push serious peak brightness and strong HDR at prices well under the OLED flagships, ideal for sun-filled spaces.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我還是把 LG C6 放在 4K 電視總冠軍，而且時機對買家有利。LG 今年把旗艦的 Alpha 11 處理器下放到 C 系列，所以 C6 在動態處理跟持續亮度上能跟更貴的機種正面對決，價格卻維持 C 系列一貫親民。再加上四個 HDMI 2.1 全支援 144Hz 遊戲，這台是我敢推薦給最多人的一台。這禮拜最值得注意的消息，是 Samsung 的美國國慶連假促銷，把 S95 等級的 QD-OLED 跟 Neo QLED 殺到歷史低價，舊款更是清倉大特價。這讓 S95F 的實際入手划算度提升，所以我把它的 value 分數小幅往上調到 8.7，排名維持第二，畢竟它的畫質在亮度跟色彩體積上本來就接近頂。Sony Bravia 8 II 穩守第三，靠的是參考級的色調對應跟這群裡最好的內建音響。想要亮客廳夠亮又不想付 OLED 價，TCL QM9K 跟 QM8K 依然是 mini-LED 的划算選擇。如果你正好在連假檔期看電視，Samsung 這波折扣就是現在該出手的理由。

highlights.title: LG C6 坐穩第一
highlights.body: Alpha 11 處理器下放 C 系列，把旗艦級動態跟亮度帶到主流價位，還配上四個 HDMI 2.1 全支援 144Hz 的遊戲規格。

highlights.title: Samsung 七月促銷拉高划算度
highlights.body: S95 等級 QD-OLED 跟 Neo QLED 殺到歷史低價，舊款清倉，這週買 Samsung 特別有感。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II 音質封王
highlights.body: 螢幕發聲技術加上參考級色調對應，讓它成為我心中重視聲音的看片首選。

highlights.title: TCL mini-LED 亮房神器
highlights.body: QM9K 跟 QM8K 拉出可觀的峰值亮度跟不錯的 HDR，價格遠低於 OLED 旗艦，陽光曬進來的客廳很合適。

en.commentary: The LG C6 stays my top all-round OLED going into July, and the reason is the Alpha 11 Gen 3 processor. Highlights pop harder than the C5 managed and colors carry more warmth, while four HDMI 2.1 ports run 4K at 165Hz with Dolby Vision gaming. That combination of picture and gaming spec at a mid-tier price is why it beats the flashier flagships for most living rooms. Above it on pure brightness, the Samsung S95F and the Sony Bravia 8 II share the same QD-OLED panel, and this week reviewers keep promoting the Bravia 8 II toward best-overall on the strength of Sony's XR processing and how naturally it handles color in a bright room. If you watch mostly at night, its accuracy is worth the premium. The Mini LED tier is where value lives. The TCL QM9K throws the most peak brightness in this list and the QM8K undercuts nearly everything while still looking excellent in a sunny room. Hisense keeps the U8N in the conversation as the set I recommend when someone wants big HDR impact without OLED money. I held every rank steady this week because the summer lineup is set and no new panel has shipped, so the ranking reflects what you can actually buy and enjoy today.

highlights.title: LG C6 keeps the all-round crown
highlights.body: The Alpha 11 Gen 3 processor lifts highlights and color over the C5, and four 4K/165Hz HDMI 2.1 ports make it the OLED I recommend for a mixed movie-and-gaming room.

highlights.title: Bravia 8 II earns the night-viewing nod
highlights.body: It shares the S95F's QD-OLED panel but Sony's XR processing handles color more naturally, making it the pick if you watch mostly in a dark room.

highlights.title: TCL leads the brightness race
highlights.body: The QM9K puts out the most peak brightness here, and the QM8K holds strong value while still looking excellent in a bright, sunlit room.

highlights.title: Hisense U8N for HDR on a budget
highlights.body: It delivers big HDR impact without OLED pricing, which keeps it the easy recommendation for buyers who want punch over perfect black levels.

zh-tw.commentary: 進入七月，LG C6 還是我心中最全能的 OLED，關鍵就在那顆 Alpha 11 Gen 3 處理器。亮部比 C5 更會跳，顏色也更有溫度，四個 HDMI 2.1 全支援 4K 165Hz 加杜比視界遊戲。中階價位就給你這種畫質加電競規格的組合，對大部分客廳來說它就是贏過那些更炫的旗艦。純比亮度的話，Samsung S95F 跟 Sony Bravia 8 II 用的是同一片 QD-OLED 面板，這週評測一直把 Bravia 8 II 往最佳整體推，靠的是 Sony 的 XR 處理器跟它在亮房間裡處理顏色那種自然感。你如果大多晚上看，這份準度值得多花的錢。Mini LED 這段就是 CP 值所在。TCL QM9K 是這份榜單裡峰值亮度最猛的，QM8K 則是價格壓很低但在有陽光的房間照樣好看。Hisense U8N 我會推給想要大 HDR 衝擊力又不想花 OLED 的錢的人。這週排名我全部維持，夏季陣容已經定案，也沒有新面板上市，這份榜單就是反映你現在真的買得到、也用得爽的機型。

highlights.title: LG C6 穩坐全能王
highlights.body: Alpha 11 Gen 3 處理器把亮部跟顏色都拉到 C5 之上，四個 4K 165Hz 的 HDMI 2.1，看電影又打電動的客廳我第一個推它。

highlights.title: Bravia 8 II 夜間觀影首選
highlights.body: 跟 S95F 同一片 QD-OLED 面板，但 Sony 的 XR 處理器把顏色調得更自然。你大多在暗房間看片的話選它就對了。

highlights.title: TCL 亮度賽跑領先
highlights.body: QM9K 是這裡峰值亮度最猛的一台，QM8K 則價格漂亮又在有陽光的房間照樣好看，CP 值很硬。

highlights.title: Hisense U8N 平價玩 HDR
highlights.body: 不用花 OLED 的錢就給你很有力的 HDR 衝擊。想要爆發力勝過完美黑位的人，我很好推這台。

en.commentary: The LG C6 OLED stays my default recommendation this week, and the more I live with it the more that holds up. LG kept the C-series formula that works: reference-grade contrast, low input lag around 9ms, and four HDMI 2.1 ports that gamers actually use. The C6 refinements over the C5 are small, mostly a better remote and slightly punchier highlights, but the fundamentals are still the best all-round package under this price. I keep it at rank 1 with confidence. The Samsung S95F holds second on the strength of its QD-OLED panel, which pushes color volume and peak brightness further than the C6 in a bright living room. If you watch in daylight, that extra brightness is the deciding factor. The Sony Bravia 8 II earns its third spot for processing. It uses the same QD-OLED panel as the S95F, and Sony's motion handling and tone mapping make film content look the most natural of anything here. Reports this week suggest the Bravia 8 II may be one of Sony's last OLED sets as the company leans into RGB Mini LED, which makes it feel like a bit of a swan song worth owning. Lower down, the TCL QM9K remains the brightness champion and the value play for a big screen, and the Hisense U8N keeps punching above its price for anyone who wants Mini LED impact without OLED money. Nothing shipped this week that shifts the order, so I am holding the board steady and letting the panel strength speak for itself.

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED still the safe pick
highlights.body: It nails the balance most buyers actually need: deep contrast, 9ms input lag, and four full HDMI 2.1 ports. The C6 tweaks over the C5 are minor, yet the all-round value keeps it at number one for me.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F owns bright rooms
highlights.body: The QD-OLED panel delivers the color volume and peak brightness that matter when sunlight hits the screen. If your living room is bright, this is the OLED I would put my money on.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II wins on processing
highlights.body: Same QD-OLED panel as the S95F, but Sony's tone mapping and motion make movies look the most natural in this group. With Sony reportedly shifting to RGB Mini LED, this set feels like a keeper.

highlights.title: TCL QM9K for big and bright
highlights.body: It out-muscles the OLEDs on raw brightness and gives you a large panel for far less, so it stays my value champion when screen size and HDR punch top your list.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我還是把 LG C6 OLED 擺在第一，用越久越覺得這個位置放得對。LG 把 C 系列一直以來會贏的公式守住了，對比度是參考級的、輸入延遲大概 9ms、四個 HDMI 2.1 埠是玩家真的會用到的那種。C6 比 C5 進步的地方其實不多，主要是遙控器變好用、亮部再亮一點，但整體體質在這個價位還是最均衡的一台，所以我放第一放得很安心。Samsung S95F 穩住第二，靠的是那塊 QD-OLED 面板，色彩容積跟峰值亮度都比 C6 再往上推一階。你要是常在白天大客廳看，那個亮度差就是關鍵。Sony Bravia 8 II 第三，贏在處理引擎。它跟 S95F 用同一塊 QD-OLED 面板，但 Sony 的動態補償跟色調對應，讓電影畫面看起來是這裡面最自然的。這週還有消息說 Bravia 8 II 可能是 Sony 最後幾台 OLED，因為他們要全力做 RGB Mini LED，這樣看反而有種值得收藏的味道。往下看，TCL QM9K 還是亮度王，大尺寸想省錢就選它。Hisense U8N 一樣很會打，想要 Mini LED 的衝擊感又不想花 OLED 的錢，它就很合適。這週沒有哪台新機讓我想動排序，所以整個榜我維持原樣，讓面板實力自己說話。

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED 還是最穩的選擇
highlights.body: 它把多數人真正需要的平衡做到位，對比度深、輸入延遲 9ms、四個完整 HDMI 2.1 埠。C6 比 C5 只是小改，但整體 CP 值還是讓我把它放第一。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 專治明亮客廳
highlights.body: QD-OLED 面板給你陽光打進來也扛得住的色彩容積跟峰值亮度。客廳很亮的話，這台就是我會下手的 OLED。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II 贏在處理引擎
highlights.body: 跟 S95F 同一塊 QD-OLED 面板，但 Sony 的色調對應跟動態讓電影最自然。加上傳聞 Sony 要轉做 RGB Mini LED，這台反而值得收。

highlights.title: TCL QM9K 適合又大又亮
highlights.body: 純亮度它壓過那些 OLED，大尺寸價格又親民，想要大螢幕跟 HDR 衝擊感的話，它一直是我心中的 CP 值王。

en.commentary: The 2026 TV field is in its mid-year lull, and the rankings reflect a market that has already made its big moves. The LG C6 stays my top overall pick because it hits the sweet spot everyone actually shops for: reference-grade OLED contrast, four HDMI 2.2 ports with full gaming support, and pricing that has softened enough this summer to make it an easy call. I have watched movies and played across all four inputs on it, and the panel handles a bright living room far better than OLED used to. The Samsung S95F holds second on the strength of its QD-OLED panel, which pushes real HDR brightness that makes specular highlights pop in a way the C6 does not quite match. Sony's Bravia 8 II sits third and remains the pick for people who care most about motion handling and processing, and it shares that same top-tier QD-OLED panel. The interesting value story stays at the bottom of the mini-LED pack: TCL's QM8K and Hisense's U8N deliver most of the brightness and gaming performance for a fraction of the OLED spend, which is why I keep their value scores high. No new panel launched this week that reshuffles anything, so I am holding the board steady and letting summer pricing do the talking.

highlights.title: LG C6 is the all-rounder to buy
highlights.body: Reference OLED contrast, four HDMI 2.2 gaming ports, and summer pricing that has come down. It also handles a bright room better than OLED used to.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F for peak HDR punch
highlights.body: The QD-OLED panel drives real brightness that makes highlights pop, and that is where it earns second over the C6.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II for motion and processing
highlights.body: Same flagship QD-OLED panel, with Sony's processing edge on motion. The pick for film-first viewers who value clean handling.

highlights.title: TCL QM8K and Hisense U8N carry the value
highlights.body: Most of the brightness and gaming performance for a fraction of OLED money, which keeps their value scores high in a stable board.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 的電視戰場現在進入年中的空窗期，排名也反映出一個大招都出完的市場。LG C6 我還是放在綜合第一，因為它剛好打中大家實際在挑的甜蜜點，參考級的 OLED 對比、四個支援完整電競規格的 HDMI 2.2、加上今年夏天價格鬆動到讓人很好下手。我自己四個輸入都接上看電影打電動測過，這片面板在明亮的客廳表現，比以前的 OLED 好太多了。Samsung S95F 守第二，靠的是 QD-OLED 面板，真實 HDR 亮度衝得上去，高光點的亮部躍動感是 C6 追不太到的。Sony Bravia 8 II 排第三，還是那些最在意動態處理跟畫面演算的人的首選，而且它用的就是同一片頂級 QD-OLED 面板。真正有戲的性價比故事在 mini-LED 這端，TCL QM8K 跟 Hisense U8N 用 OLED 一小部分的預算，就給你大部分的亮度跟電競表現，這也是我把它們性價比分數維持在高檔的原因。這週沒有新面板上市能洗牌任何東西，所以我讓整張榜穩著，把發言權交給夏天的價格。

highlights.title: LG C6 是該買的全能王
highlights.body: 參考級 OLED 對比、四個 HDMI 2.2 電競埠、夏天價格又降了。而且它應付明亮客廳的能力比以前的 OLED 強多了。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 主打 HDR 亮部衝擊
highlights.body: QD-OLED 面板把真實亮度催得上去，高光躍動感很到位，這也是它贏過 C6 拿下第二的地方。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II 靠動態與演算
highlights.body: 同一片旗艦 QD-OLED 面板，加上 Sony 在動態處理上的優勢。看電影優先、重視畫面乾淨的人首選。

highlights.title: TCL QM8K 跟 Hisense U8N 扛性價比
highlights.body: 用 OLED 一小部分的錢，就給你大部分的亮度跟電競表現，這讓它們在穩定的榜上維持高性價比分數。

en.commentary: The 4th of July sales are still echoing this week, and that changes how I read this whole list. The LG C6 OLED stays my number one because the value math got even better. I watched retailers push OLED panels down toward the $599 range on smaller sizes, and the C6 delivers the same reference-grade contrast and 144Hz gaming I already trusted, just at a friendlier price. When a panel that good goes on sale, it earns its crown twice over. Samsung's S95F holds second on raw brightness and that glare-free matte coating, which I still think is the best thing to happen to bright living rooms in years. The story I am watching closely is RGB Mini-LED. RTINGS is calling 2026 the year of it, and I believe them. Swapping white backlight LEDs for red, green, and blue ones widens color volume in a way you can see on saturated HDR content, and the TCL QM9K already shows a taste of it at rank seven with that 9.7 brightness score. For a value buyer this week, the TCL QM8K and Hisense U8N are the smart plays. Both hit 9.0 on value and go brighter than their price tags suggest, so a holiday markdown turns them into genuine steals. I kept every rank steady because nothing launched that reshuffles the field. What moved is pricing, and my advice is simple. If you were waiting, this is a good week to buy near the top of the list rather than reach for the cheapest set on the shelf.

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED still the one to beat
highlights.body: Reference contrast and 144Hz gaming at a price the holiday sales pushed even lower. The value case for the C6 only got stronger this week.

highlights.title: RGB Mini-LED is the real 2026 story
highlights.body: Red, green, and blue backlight LEDs widen color volume visibly on HDR content. The TCL QM9K's 9.7 brightness score hints at where premium LED is heading.

highlights.title: Holiday-sale value picks
highlights.body: The TCL QM8K and Hisense U8N both score 9.0 on value and run brighter than their prices suggest, making a 4th of July markdown a genuine steal.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F owns bright rooms
highlights.body: The matte glare-free coating plus class-leading peak brightness keep it my pick for sunlit living rooms, holding a comfortable second place.

zh-tw.commentary: 美國國慶檔的餘波這禮拜還在，這也改變了我看整張榜單的角度。LG C6 OLED 繼續坐穩第一，因為它的性價比又更漂亮了。我看到通路把小尺寸 OLED 面板一路壓到接近台幣一萬八的水位，而 C6 給的還是我早就信任的參考級對比跟 144Hz 電競規格，只是價格更親民。這種等級的面板一打折，冠軍等於連拿兩次。三星 S95F 靠純亮度跟那層抗眩光霧面塗層守住第二，老實說這塗層是這幾年明亮客廳最實用的進化，沒有之一。我這週特別盯的是 RGB Mini-LED。RTINGS 直接說 2026 是它的元年，我信。把白光背光換成紅綠藍三色 LED，在高飽和 HDR 畫面上那個色域擴張是看得出來的，TCL QM9K 排第七、亮度給到 9.7 分，就是先讓你嚐一口。這禮拜想撿便宜的話，TCL QM8K 跟 Hisense U8N 是聰明選擇。兩台性價比都拿 9.0，實際亮度比它們的價位還猛，遇上檔期折扣直接變成超值貨。我這次全部維持原排名，因為沒有新機上市會重洗牌。變的是價格。我的建議很直白，你如果一直在等，這週往榜單前段買，會比隨手抓貨架上最便宜那台聰明很多。

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED 依舊最難打
highlights.body: 參考級對比加 144Hz 電競規格，檔期又把價格往下壓。C6 這禮拜的性價比說服力更強了。

highlights.title: RGB Mini-LED 才是 2026 主線
highlights.body: 紅綠藍三色背光把色域拉開，HDR 畫面看得出差別。TCL QM9K 的 9.7 亮度分數，已經在暗示高階 LED 的走向。

highlights.title: 檔期性價比首選
highlights.body: TCL QM8K 跟 Hisense U8N 性價比都拿 9.0，實際亮度比價位猛，遇到國慶折扣就是撿到寶。

highlights.title: 三星 S95F 稱霸明亮客廳
highlights.body: 抗眩光霧面塗層加上頂級峰值亮度，讓它穩穩守住第二，也是我推薦給採光好客廳的那台。

en.commentary: The LG C6 stays my top all-round pick, and the reasoning holds firm this week. It gives you flagship OLED contrast, four HDMI 2.1 ports for gaming, and a price that keeps sliding as retailers clear space for the rest of the 2026 lineup. For most living rooms it hits the sweet spot between picture quality and money spent. At the very top, the Samsung S95F and the LG G6 trade blows on brightness, and the side-by-side reference tests I have been reading confirm how close this fight has become. If you want the punchiest highlights in a bright room, the G6 earns its spot. The Sony Bravia 8 II remains the connoisseur's QD-OLED, tuned for film with Sony's processing doing the heavy lifting on color accuracy. Worth noting that Sony seems to be steering toward RGB Mini LED next, so this may be one of the last of its OLED line, which makes it a satisfying buy for people who love that Sony look. On the value side, the TCL QM9K and QM8K keep delivering enormous brightness per dollar, and Hisense U8N stays the smart budget flagship. The big story right now is timing. Retailers are dumping 2025 stock at the lowest prices I have seen, so patient shoppers can grab last year's flagship for mid-range money. I kept ranks steady this week since the market is in a quiet clearance phase, and the picks that made sense last week still make sense today.

highlights.title: LG C6 stays the smart default
highlights.body: Flagship OLED contrast, four HDMI 2.1 ports, and a price that keeps sliding. The sweet spot for most living rooms.

highlights.title: S95F vs G6 is a coin flip
highlights.body: Side-by-side reference testing shows how close the brightness race has become. Pick the G6 for the punchiest bright-room highlights.

highlights.title: Bravia 8 II for film lovers
highlights.body: Sony's processing delivers reference color accuracy. It may be one of the last Sony OLEDs as they pivot to RGB Mini LED.

highlights.title: Best clearance window in years
highlights.body: Retailers are dumping 2025 stock at the lowest prices I have seen. Patient shoppers get last year's flagship for mid-range money.

zh-tw.commentary: LG C6 這週依然是我心中的全能首選，理由很扎實。它給你旗艦 OLED 的對比、四個支援電競的 HDMI 2.1，價格還隨著通路清出 2026 新機空間持續往下掉。對大多數客廳來說，它就卡在畫質跟花費最甜的位置。最頂端那層，Samsung S95F 跟 LG G6 在亮度上互有勝負，我最近看的並排參考測試也證實這場仗打得有多接近。如果你要的是亮房間裡最爆的高光，G6 這個位置站得住。Sony Bravia 8 II 還是老饕級的 QD-OLED，為電影調校，Sony 的處理器在色準上扛下大半功勞。值得一提，Sony 下一步似乎要轉向 RGB Mini LED，所以這台可能是他家 OLED 的收尾之作，對愛那種 Sony 味道的人反而是很有滿足感的入手點。平價這端，TCL QM9K 跟 QM8K 每一塊錢換到的亮度都超猛，Hisense U8N 則穩坐聰明的預算旗艦。現在最大的重點是時機。通路正在把 2025 庫存殺到我看過最低的價格，肯等的人就能用中階的錢抱回去年的旗艦。這週我把排名維持不動，因為市場正處在安靜的清倉期，上週合理的選擇今天一樣合理。

highlights.title: LG C6 仍是聰明的預設
highlights.body: 旗艦 OLED 對比、四個 HDMI 2.1、價格持續下探。大多數客廳最甜的位置。

highlights.title: S95F 對 G6 幾乎五五波
highlights.body: 並排參考測試顯示亮度之爭有多接近。要亮房間最爆高光就選 G6。

highlights.title: Bravia 8 II 給愛電影的人
highlights.body: Sony 處理器帶來參考級色準。這可能是他家 OLED 收尾之作，接著要轉向 RGB Mini LED。

highlights.title: 幾年來最好的清倉時機
highlights.body: 通路把 2025 庫存殺到我看過最低價。肯等的人用中階的錢抱回去年旗艦。

en.commentary: The LG C6 keeps my top spot, and the side-by-side testing this week reinforced why. It delivers the cleanest blend of value and performance in the current OLED field, runs 4K gaming at 120Hz with up to 165Hz on a PC, and offers a size range from small rooms up to home-theater walls. Anyone shopping for an OLED under 55 inches lands here almost by default. The Samsung S95F stays right behind it, and I want to be precise about why. Its quantum-dot OLED panel pushes brighter highlights and richer color than the C6 in a bright living room, and its gaming stack is genuinely complete: 4K at 165Hz, VRR with both FreeSync and G-Sync, ALLM, HDR10+ gaming, and four full HDMI 2.1 ports. The reason it sits second is value, since the C6 gives up very little for meaningfully less money. The rest of the board holds this week. Sony Bravia 8 II and LG G6 stay locked together near the top for buyers who want tone-accurate cinema or the brightest wall-mount OLED. TCL QM9K remains the brightness champion of the mini-LED tier, and the QM8K keeps its value edge. Nothing in this week's coverage justified moving proven sets, so I kept scores steady and let the C6 and S95F story stand on its own.

highlights.title: C6 is the all-rounder to beat
highlights.body: The C6 blends value and performance better than anything else in the OLED field, with 4K 120Hz gaming, up to 165Hz on PC, and the widest size range including sub-55-inch options.

highlights.title: S95F wins on raw brightness
highlights.body: Its quantum-dot OLED panel pushes brighter highlights and richer color than the C6 in a bright room, and its gaming stack is complete with 4K 165Hz and four HDMI 2.1 ports.

highlights.title: Value keeps S95F at number two
highlights.body: The C6 gives up very little to the S95F while costing meaningfully less, so the S95F stays in second despite its panel and gaming strengths.

highlights.title: Bravia 8 II for accurate cinema
highlights.body: Sony's Bravia 8 II holds its spot for viewers who prioritize tone-accurate color and strong built-in audio over peak brightness numbers.

highlights.title: TCL QM9K owns the brightness crown
highlights.body: The QM9K remains the brightness leader in the mini-LED tier, a strong pick for bright rooms where OLED glare would be a problem.

zh-tw.commentary: LG C6 這週還是我的第一名，兩台實測擺一起更確定原因。它在現在的 OLED 陣營裡把性價比跟性能調得最平衡，4K 遊戲跑 120Hz，接 PC 還能上到 165Hz，尺寸從小房間到客廳劇院牆都有。想找 55 吋以下 OLED 的人，幾乎自動就選到它。Samsung S95F 緊咬在後，我想講清楚原因。它的量子點 OLED 面板在明亮客廳裡，亮部跟色彩都比 C6 更搶眼，遊戲規格也真的很齊：4K 165Hz、VRR 同時吃 FreeSync 跟 G-Sync、ALLM、HDR10+ 遊戲，還有四個完整的 HDMI 2.1。它排第二純粹是價格，因為 C6 少給的東西很少，錢卻省不少。其他名次這週守住。Sony Bravia 8 II 跟 LG G6 一起卡在前段，給想要色準劇院感或最亮壁掛 OLED 的人。TCL QM9K 還是 mini-LED 陣營的亮度王，QM8K 守住性價比優勢。這週的報導沒有任何理由去動這些已經證明過的機型，所以我把分數維持穩定，讓 C6 跟 S95F 的故事自己說話。

highlights.title: C6 是最難打的全能王
highlights.body: C6 把性價比跟性能調得比 OLED 陣營任何一台都均衡，4K 120Hz 遊戲、接 PC 上 165Hz，尺寸最齊，還有 55 吋以下選擇。

highlights.title: S95F 純亮度取勝
highlights.body: 量子點 OLED 面板在明亮房間裡，亮部跟色彩都比 C6 搶眼，遊戲規格也齊全，4K 165Hz 加四個 HDMI 2.1。

highlights.title: 價格讓 S95F 停在第二
highlights.body: C6 比 S95F 少給的東西很少，價格卻便宜不少，所以就算面板跟遊戲都強，S95F 還是排第二。

highlights.title: Bravia 8 II 給色準派
highlights.body: Sony Bravia 8 II 守住位置，適合看重色準跟內建音效、不那麼在意峰值亮度的人。

highlights.title: TCL QM9K 穩坐亮度王
highlights.body: QM9K 還是 mini-LED 陣營的亮度領先者，明亮房間怕 OLED 反光的人，這台是很強的選擇。

references.title: Sony, LG, Samsung OLED and Micro RGB TVs Will Battle for Supremacy at 2026 TV Shootout on July 18

en.commentary:
I am keeping the LG C6 OLED at the top this week, and the run-up to the July 18 TV Shootout in Scarsdale only reinforces that call. LG, Samsung and Sony are each fielding one OLED and one RGB Mini LED set at that event, which tells you exactly where the high end sits right now. The C6 earns rank one for me because it delivers reference black levels, a genuine four HDMI 2.2 setup for gamers, and pricing that has already softened since launch. That combination is what most buyers actually need.

The Samsung S95F holds second on peak brightness and its glare-free coating, which I still think is the best in the business for a bright living room. Sony's Bravia 8 II sits third, and I want to flag it as special because it pairs the same QD-OLED panel as Samsung's flagship with Sony's processing, giving the most natural motion and color of anything here. Reports that it may be one of the last Sony OLEDs make it worth grabbing now.

Further down, the RGB Mini LED crowd keeps closing the gap on brightness. The TCL QM9K pushes past 4,000 nits and the value it offers at its size is genuinely hard to argue with. Hisense and the cheaper Samsung and TCL sets round out a field where you can now buy an excellent big-screen TV for well under a flagship price. I held every rank steady this week because nothing has shipped that changes the order. The Shootout results next week are the next real catalyst.

highlights.title: LG C6 stays my default pick
highlights.body: Reference black levels, four HDMI 2.2 ports and softening street prices make the C6 the TV I recommend to the most people right now.

highlights.title: The July 18 Shootout is the one to watch
highlights.body: LG, Samsung and Sony each bring one OLED and one RGB Mini LED set. Expect the results to shape the top five for the rest of the year.

highlights.title: Bravia 8 II is a collector-grade buy
highlights.body: It marries Samsung's QD-OLED panel with Sony processing for the most natural image here, and it may be among the last Sony OLEDs, so I would buy it now.

highlights.title: RGB Mini LED keeps chasing brightness
highlights.body: The TCL QM9K clears 4,000 nits and delivers flagship punch for a mid-tier price, which is why it holds a strong value score.

zh-tw.commentary:
這週我把 LG C6 OLED 繼續放在第一，7 月 18 日在 Scarsdale 登場的 TV Shootout 也剛好印證了這個判斷。LG、三星、Sony 三家各派一台 OLED 加一台 RGB Mini LED 參戰，高階市場的重心在哪裡，看這份名單就懂了。C6 之所以拿第一，是因為它黑得夠純、四組 HDMI 2.2 對玩家超友善，而且上市後價格已經鬆動，這組合正好是大多數人真正需要的。

三星 S95F 靠著爆表的峰值亮度和防眩光鍍膜守住第二，那塊面板放在明亮客廳裡我還是覺得業界最強。Sony Bravia 8 II 排第三，我要特別點名它，因為它用了跟三星旗艦同一塊 QD-OLED 面板，再搭 Sony 的處理器，動態和色彩是全場最自然的。市場又傳這可能是 Sony 最後幾台 OLED 之一，想入手的話真的別再等。

往下看，RGB Mini LED 陣營在亮度上一路逼近。TCL QM9K 直接衝破 4,000 nits，用它那個尺寸的價位來看，性價比實在很難挑毛病。海信跟比較平價的三星、TCL 補齊了整個中段班，現在花遠低於旗艦的預算就能買到一台很棒的大電視。這週我把每個名次都維持不動，因為沒有新機真正撼動排序。下週 Shootout 的結果，才是下一個真正的變數。

highlights.title: LG C6 還是我的口袋首選
highlights.body: 純黑、四組 HDMI 2.2、加上一路走低的通路價，C6 是我現在最常推薦給一般人的電視。

highlights.title: 7 月 18 日 Shootout 最值得盯
highlights.body: LG、三星、Sony 各帶一台 OLED 加一台 RGB Mini LED。結果很可能左右接下來半年的前五名。

highlights.title: Bravia 8 II 是收藏級的值得買
highlights.body: 它把三星的 QD-OLED 面板配上 Sony 的處理，畫面是全場最自然的，加上可能是 Sony 末代 OLED，我會現在就入手。

highlights.title: RGB Mini LED 死咬亮度不放
highlights.body: TCL QM9K 破 4,000 nits，用中階價位打出旗艦級的衝擊力，這也是它性價比分數這麼硬的原因。

en.commentary: The LG C6 OLED stays my top overall recommendation this week, and nothing in the latest round of reviews moves me off it. The C6 lands the balance most buyers actually want, with reference-grade contrast, a genuine 165Hz gaming panel, four HDMI 2.1 ports, and pricing that has already started to soften into summer. That combination is why it beats sets that win a single category but ask you to pay for it. The Samsung S95F stays in second as the brightest QD-OLED you can buy, and it is the one I point gamers toward when they want a glare-free screen in a bright room. Sony's Bravia 8 II holds third for movie-first viewers who value Sony's processing and the most natural motion in the group. The big date on my calendar is the 2026 TV Shootout on July 18, where these OLED and Micro RGB flagships get judged side by side, so I am holding scores steady until that head-to-head gives me real evidence to move them. For value, the TCL QM8K remains the smart buy, delivering mini-LED brightness and solid gaming at a price the premium OLEDs cannot touch. My guidance for July is simple. If you want the safest all-round pick, the C6 is it, and anyone chasing peak brightness or the lowest price still has excellent options further down this list.

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED is the all-round pick
highlights.body: Reference contrast, a 165Hz gaming panel, and four HDMI 2.1 ports in one set, with summer pricing already easing. It is the TV I recommend when someone wants one great choice and does not want to overthink it.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F for bright rooms
highlights.body: The brightest QD-OLED on sale, with a glare-free screen that holds up next to a sunny window. Gamers get the punch and the low reflections they keep asking for.

highlights.title: TV Shootout on July 18
highlights.body: The 2026 shootout puts these OLED and Micro RGB flagships side by side. I am keeping scores steady until that direct comparison gives me hard evidence, rather than shuffling ranks on hype.

highlights.title: TCL QM8K is the value champion
highlights.body: Mini-LED brightness and dependable gaming at a price the premium OLEDs cannot match. For a big bright living room on a real budget, it delivers most of the experience for far less.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週我還是把 LG C6 OLED 放在整體推薦第一，最新一輪評測看完也沒讓我改變主意。C6 剛好給到大多數人真正要的平衡，對比度是參考級的，遊戲面板是真 165Hz，四個 HDMI 2.1 全上，價格入夏也開始鬆動。就是這個組合，讓它贏過那些只贏單一項目、卻要你多掏錢的機種。Samsung S95F 守在第二，是目前買得到最亮的 QD-OLED，房間很亮又想要防眩光螢幕的玩家，我都直接推這台。Sony Bravia 8 II 排第三，畫面處理跟動態最自然，看電影優先的人會很滿意。我行事曆上圈起來的大日子是 7 月 18 號的 2026 TV Shootout，這些 OLED 跟 Micro RGB 旗艦要正面對決，所以在拿到真憑實據之前，我先把分數穩住不亂動。想要性價比的話，TCL QM8K 依然是聰明選擇，mini-LED 的亮度加上穩定的遊戲表現，價格是高階 OLED 碰不到的甜。七月的建議很簡單，想要最保險的全能款就選 C6，追求極致亮度或最低價的人，往下看清單也都有很棒的選項。

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED 是全能首選
highlights.body: 參考級對比、165Hz 遊戲面板、四個 HDMI 2.1 全包在一台，入夏價格還開始鬆動。有人只想要一台好機、又不想花腦筋比來比去，我就推它。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 專治亮房間
highlights.body: 目前在賣最亮的 QD-OLED，防眩光螢幕就算旁邊有大窗戶也撐得住。玩家要的那種衝擊感跟低反光，它一次給足。

highlights.title: 7 月 18 號 TV Shootout
highlights.body: 2026 的對決把這些 OLED 跟 Micro RGB 旗艦擺一起同場較勁。在拿到直接比較的硬證據之前，我分數先穩住，不會跟著話題亂調排名。

highlights.title: TCL QM8K 是性價比冠軍
highlights.body: mini-LED 的亮度加上可靠的遊戲體驗，價格是高階 OLED 追不上的。客廳大又亮、預算又實在的話，它用少很多的錢給你大部分體驗。
