en.commentary: The LG C6 OLED holds my number-one spot for another week, and the fresh Tom's Guide and TechRadar head-to-heads reinforce why. The C6 pairs superb OLED contrast with the widest size selection in its class, Dolby Vision support, and a price that undercuts the flagships, so it is the set I recommend to the largest number of people. Reviewers keep landing on the same verdict: the Samsung S95H raises the ceiling on brightness and color, but the C6 wins on value and versatility, which is exactly how my ranking is weighted. The Samsung S95F stays second because its quantum-dot OLED panel still delivers the punchiest highlights and richest color in a bright room, and it earns that position on picture alone. Sony's Bravia 8 II holds third for the reference-grade tone mapping and best-in-class built-in audio that home-theater buyers care about, with the LG G6 right behind it for anyone who wants LG's brightest OLED. Lower down, the value picks are unchanged: the TCL QM8K and Hisense U8N keep delivering mini-LED brightness for far less money, which is why they anchor the mid-table. No new panel launched this week to shake this up, so I am holding the order steady.

highlights.title: C6 is the everyone TV
highlights.body: The LG C6 combines superb OLED contrast, Dolby Vision, four HDMI 2.1 ports, and the widest size range at a price below the flagships, so it stays the set I recommend to most buyers.

highlights.title: S95F for a bright room
highlights.body: Samsung's quantum-dot OLED still throws the punchiest highlights and richest color under lights, keeping it second on picture quality alone.

highlights.title: Sony owns home theater
highlights.body: The Bravia 8 II holds third for reference tone mapping and the best built-in audio in the group, worth it for a dedicated viewing room.

highlights.title: Mini-LED still wins on value
highlights.body: The TCL QM8K and Hisense U8N deliver high mini-LED brightness for far less money, anchoring the mid-table for budget-focused buyers.

zh-tw.commentary: LG C6 OLED 這週繼續穩坐我的第一，最新的 Tom's Guide 跟 TechRadar 對決也再次證明為什麼。C6 把頂級 OLED 對比、同級最齊全的尺寸選擇、Dolby Vision 支援全湊齊，價格還比旗艦低一截，所以它是我會推薦給最多人的那台。各家評測講到最後結論都一樣，Samsung S95H 亮度跟色彩的天花板確實更高，但論性價比跟通用性 C6 贏，而這剛好就是我排名的權重方向。Samsung S95F 守第二，那塊量子點 OLED 面板在亮房裡打出來的高光跟色彩還是最猛，光靠畫質就撐得起這個位置。Sony Bravia 8 II 排第三,那種參考級的色調映射加上同級最好的內建喇叭,家庭劇院派最買單,LG G6 緊跟在後,想要 LG 最亮的 OLED 就選它。往下看性價比款沒變,TCL QM8K 跟 Hisense U8N 用小一半的預算就給你 mini-LED 的亮度,難怪撐住中段班。這週沒有新面板出來攪局,排名我就穩住。

highlights.title: C6 是那台推薦給所有人的電視
highlights.body: LG C6 把頂級 OLED 對比、Dolby Vision、四個 HDMI 2.1 埠跟最齊全的尺寸全湊齊,價格還壓在旗艦之下,所以它繼續是我推薦給最多人的機型。

highlights.title: 亮房就選 S95F

en.commentary: The LG C6 OLED holds my top spot for another week, and the reason is the same one that put it there. It gives you reference-grade OLED contrast, a genuinely bright panel, and the full four-port 4K 144Hz gaming stack at a price that undercuts every flagship above it. That combination is still the smartest money in the category. The interesting movement this week sits at the top of the QD-OLED tier. The Sony Bravia 8 II shares the same panel as Samsung's S95F and I am now seeing the 65-inch land around $2,610, which finally makes its picture quality and superb built-in audio easier to recommend to people who watch more film than they game. Samsung's S95F stays my brightness champion for rooms with real daylight, and the RGB Mini LED sets from TCL and Hisense keep pushing peak brightness numbers that OLED cannot touch, which keeps the QM9K and U8N compelling for sports and bright living rooms. My advice this week is simple. If you want the best all-round picture for the money, the C6 is the buy. If your room is bright and you watch a lot of sport, a top Mini LED like the QM9K earns its place. The market is deep right now and prices are moving, so patient shoppers are winning.

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED stays the value king
highlights.body: Reference OLED contrast plus four 144Hz HDMI ports at a price below the flagships. It remains the set I recommend to the most people this week.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II gets more tempting
highlights.body: The 65-inch QD-OLED is showing around $2,610. Same panel as the S95F with excellent built-in audio, a strong pick for film-first viewers.

highlights.title: Mini LED owns brightness
highlights.body: TCL QM9K and Hisense U8N still hit peak brightness levels OLED cannot match, which keeps them the smart choice for bright rooms and daytime sport.

highlights.title: Prices are moving, patience pays
highlights.body: With 2025 stock at record lows and new 2026 sets discounting, this is a strong week to buy if you watch the deals.

zh-tw.commentary: LG C6 OLED 這週繼續坐穩我心中的第一名，理由跟當初把它推上冠軍的一樣。它給你參考級的 OLED 對比、真正夠亮的面板，還有完整四個 4K 144Hz 的遊戲埠，價格卻比上面每一台旗艦都便宜。這個組合到現在還是整個類別最聰明的一筆錢。這週比較有看頭的變化在 QD-OLED 這一層。Sony Bravia 8 II 用的面板跟三星 S95F 同一片，我現在看到 65 吋大概落在台幣八萬出頭的區間，畫質加上它那套很棒的內建喇叭，終於比較好推薦給看電影多過打電動的人了。三星 S95F 依然是我心中的亮度王，客廳白天採光強就選它。TCL 跟 Hisense 的 RGB Mini LED 在峰值亮度上一直往上衝，OLED 追不上，所以 QM9K 跟 U8N 對看球賽、明亮客廳的人還是很有吸引力。這週的建議很簡單。想要同價位最全面的畫質，C6 就是答案。房間很亮又常看球，頂規 Mini LED 像 QM9K 就值得。現在市場選擇很多、價格又在鬆動，會等的人這週撿到便宜。

highlights.title: LG C6 OLED 還是 CP 值王
highlights.body: 參考級 OLED 對比加上四個 144Hz HDMI 埠，價格卻壓在旗艦之下。這週它依然是我推薦給最多人的機型。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II 越來越香
highlights.body: 65 吋 QD-OLED 已經來到台幣八萬出頭。跟 S95F 同一片面板，內建喇叭又好，看電影優先的人很適合。

highlights.title: 亮度還是 Mini LED 的天下
highlights.body: TCL QM9K 跟 Hisense U8N 的峰值亮度是 OLED 追不到的水準，明亮客廳跟白天看球就靠它們。

highlights.title: 價格在動，會等的人賺到
highlights.body: 2025 舊機殺到歷史低點，2026 新機也開始折價，這週想入手是不錯的時機，記得多比幾家。

references.title: Best TVs of 2026, Tested by Our Experts
5 Of The Best OLED TVs You Can Buy In 2026 (So Far)
The 3 Best OLED TVs of 2026

en.commentary: The board stays put this week and I am comfortable with that, because the 2026 sets have settled into a clear order and the only real movement is on price. The LG C6 OLED keeps my top spot for the same reason it earned it, it is the TV that gives the most people the best picture for the money, with excellent gaming across four HDMI 2.1 ports and OLED contrast that still sets the reference. The Samsung S95F sits right behind it as the brightness champion among OLEDs, and if your room has a lot of window glare it is the one I would audition first. Sony earns two spots on merit. The Bravia 8 II uses the same QD-OLED panel as Samsung and pairs it with Sony's processing, which remains the most natural-looking image in motion I have tested, and the Bravia 9 is still the Mini LED I recommend for bright rooms that need OLED-like control. TCL and Hisense are why this list stays honest on value. The QM9K pushes absurd peak brightness for the money and the QM8K undercuts everything above it while still looking excellent. I nudged nothing this week because the reviews I trust reinforced the same ranking. New panels always arrive in fall, so I expect the next real shakeup around then. For now the C6 is the safe recommendation and the TCL sets are where the deals live.

highlights.title: LG C6 is the smart default
highlights.body: Best picture per dollar for most rooms, four HDMI 2.1 ports, and reference OLED contrast keep it at number one.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F for bright rooms
highlights.body: The brightest OLED here, so it is the first set I would audition if window glare is your problem.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II for motion
highlights.body: Same QD-OLED panel as Samsung with Sony processing gives the most natural image in motion I have measured.

highlights.title: TCL QM8K owns value
highlights.body: It undercuts everything ranked above it and still looks excellent, which is why it holds the top value score.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週榜單不動,很合理,2026 機種排序已經很清楚,唯一在動的是價錢。LG C6 OLED 守第一,同樣的錢給最多人最好的畫質,四個 HDMI 2.1 打電動全支援,OLED 對比至今還是標竿。Samsung S95F 緊跟在後,是 OLED 裡的亮度王,客廳窗多反光嚴重,我第一台會叫你去現場看它。Sony 兩個位置是實力換來的,Bravia 8 II 用跟三星同片 QD-OLED 加自家晶片,動態自然度我測過最好;Bravia 9 是我推給明亮客廳又想要接近 OLED 控光的 Mini LED。TCL 跟 Hisense 讓榜單在性價比上很誠實,QM9K 用這價衝出誇張峰值亮度,QM8K 殺在上面幾台之下畫質還很讚。新面板通常秋天才來,下次真正洗牌大概要等那時候。現在最穩推薦是 C6,想撿便宜就看 TCL。

highlights.title: LG C6 是聰明的預設
highlights.body: 多數客廳裡每塊錢畫質最好,四個 HDMI 2.1、標竿級 OLED 對比,穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 給亮房間
highlights.body: 這裡最亮的 OLED,客廳反光嚴重,我第一台就叫你去看它。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia 8 II 拚動態
highlights.body: 跟三星同片 QD-OLED 加 Sony 處理,動態畫面自然度是我量過最好的。

highlights.title: TCL QM8K 性價比王
highlights.body: 價錢殺在上面幾台之下,畫質照樣出色,性價比分數最高。

references.title: Best TVs of 2026, Tested by Our Experts
Best TV 2026: flagship OLEDs and budget Mini LED sets tried and tested
Ultimate 4th of July TV sale: OLEDs from $599, Mini-LED from $499

en.commentary: The LG C6 OLED stays my number one because it nails the balance that matters most in a living room: reference-grade contrast, genuinely useful 165Hz gaming across all four HDMI 2.1 ports, and a price that keeps dropping into the summer sale window. If you want the brightest OLED image on the market, the Samsung S95F holds second on the strength of its glare-free panel and 2,000-plus nit highlights, and it is the set I steer bright-room buyers toward. Sony's Bravia 8 II earns its third spot with the most natural color and the best out-of-box tuning I have measured this year, and its acoustic surface audio genuinely helps dialogue. This week the story is money. The July Fourth deals are still live, with OLEDs starting around 599 dollars and Mini-LED sets from 499, so value scores at the top of the board feel more earned than ever. The RGB Mini-LED wave is the other thread I am watching, since brands are pushing red-green-blue backlights that beat standard Mini-LED on color purity. That tech has not shipped into my current lineup yet, so I held ranks steady. For anyone shopping right now, the TCL QM9K remains the brightness-per-dollar champion at rank seven, and the Hisense U8N is the budget pick I keep recommending to friends who want 90 percent of the flagship experience for half the money. I made no ranking moves today because nothing in the news cycle changed the actual hardware order, only the discounts.

highlights.title: LG C6 still the all-rounder
highlights.body: Reference contrast, full 165Hz HDMI 2.1 gaming, and falling summer pricing keep it my default recommendation for most rooms.

highlights.title: Samsung S95F owns bright rooms
highlights.body: The glare-free panel and 2,000-plus nit highlights make it the OLED I pick when sunlight is the enemy.

highlights.title: Summer deals lift value
highlights.body: July Fourth pricing has OLEDs from 599 dollars and Mini-LED from 499, so top value scores are well supported this week.

highlights.title: RGB Mini-LED on the horizon
highlights.body: New red-green-blue backlights promise purer color than standard Mini-LED, and I am tracking them for a future reshuffle.

zh-tw.commentary: LG C6 OLED 這次繼續坐穩第一，理由很單純，它把客廳最在意的幾件事都做到位了，對比度是參考級的，四個 HDMI 2.1 埠全支援 165Hz 電競，而且進入暑假特價後價格一路往下修，CP 值越來越漂亮。想要市面上最亮的 OLED 畫面，Samsung S95F 靠無反光面板加上兩千尼特以上的高光穩住第二，家裡採光太好的朋友，我都是先推這台。Sony Bravia 8 II 排第三，色彩最自然，開箱預設調校是我今年量到最準的，音效表面發聲對人聲對白也真的有幫助。這禮拜的重點其實是價格，美國國慶檔期還沒結束，OLED 從六百鎂起跳，Mini-LED 甚至四百多鎂就有，換算下來蠻甜的，所以榜單前段的價值分現在看格外實在。另外我持續在盯 RGB Mini-LED 這波，各家都在推紅綠藍背光，色純度贏過傳統 Mini-LED，只是這技術還沒進到我目前這份名單，所以排名先按兵不動。真要現在買，TCL QM9K 排第七依舊是亮度換算價格的冠軍，Hisense U8N 則是我一直跟朋友推的預算首選，花一半的錢就能拿到旗艦九成的體驗。今天沒有動排名，因為新聞面改變的只有折扣，硬體實力的順序沒變。

highlights.title: LG C6 全能依舊
highlights.body: 參考級對比，四埠全 165Hz 電競，加上暑假降價，多數客廳我還是先推它。

highlights.title: Samsung S95F 專打亮房
highlights.body: 無反光面板配兩千尼特高光，採光太好的空間我第一個想到它。

highlights.title: 暑假特價撐起價值分
highlights.body: 國慶檔 OLED 六百鎂起、Mini-LED 四百多鎂，前段班的價值分這週特別有底氣。

highlights.title: RGB Mini-LED 蓄勢待發
highlights.body: 紅綠藍背光色純度勝過傳統 Mini-LED，我會盯著看，之後可能會重排。
